title: Social Media Manager
description:
We are looking for a Social Media Manager to join our team!



About the Role:

We are looking for a creative and detail oriented Social Media Manager to manage our online presence across key platforms. This role is responsible for planning, writing, and publishing engaging content while maintaining a consistent brand voice and messaging.



The role also includes copywriting for social media posts and ads, so we are looking for someone who can create content that is not only engaging but also supports campaign goals and audience growth.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage social media platforms such as
, Instagram, and TikTok

• Plan, write, and publish engaging content for social media posts

• Write clear and compelling copy for ads, captions, hooks, and promotional content

• Maintain posting schedules and ensure brand consistency across platforms

• Support content planning for campaigns, promotions, and audience engagement

• Track content performance and engagement metrics



Requirements:

• Proven experience in managing social media platforms

• Excellent command of written English and grammar

• Strong copywriting, creative writing, and research skills

• Able to write engaging content for both social media posts and ad campaigns

• Highly organized, detail oriented, and able to meet deadlines

• Basic knowledge of content analytics and performance tracking

• Familiarity with tools such as Semrush, Later, Meta Business Suite, Wix, and Klaviyo



Working days and hours:

• Full-time basis – 40 hrs/week (Mon–Fri)

• Working hours: 10 am to 6:30 pm (30 min lunch break)

• 14 days of Paid Annual Leave and Paid Public Holiday Benefits (all major holidays in the Philippines) included



Application Instructions:

Please submit your application with the following (applications without these will be less considered):

• Your CV/Resume.

• A short video introduction of yourself and why you’re a good fit.

• Why you are leaving your last job or what you were doing just before this application.

• Your relevant past experience (if any) and why you’d be the best fit for this role.

If you do not have experience, please be honest and state so as well.

* Applications without the above 4 points will be less considered.



P.S. Please format your replies in point form according to the 4 items asked above,

e.g.: 1. My resume is here:

2. Video introduction here:

3. I am doing… etc

4. I have… etc The more information you provide in your initial application, the better.

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Advanced Davinci Resolve Studio Editor (Real Estate + Motion Graphics Editor)
description:
We are a growing real estate media company specializing in cinematic, modern real estate listing videos and personal brand talking-head content. We work with top realtors, construction teams, and professional brands, and we are building systems that allow us to scale without sacrificing quality.

This editor role is critical to our growth. You will help maintain our visual standards, execute repeatable workflows, and ensure every project meets our quality expectations while delivering a 10/10 client experience.

Quality is non-negotiable. We do not cut corners and expect the same standard from everyone on our team.

We are looking for a DaVinci Resolve Studio Video Editor who has strong fundamentals and is actively leveling up into more advanced execution, especially with motion titles and modern social media styles.

Important:

To confirm attention to detail, please include the word “Resolve” in the first line of your application message. Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Responsibilities:

- Edit real estate listing videos with cinematic pacing, clean color, and polished audio.

- Edit talking-head videos with modern motion titles and simple animations inspired by trending social media styles.

- Execute consistent edits using provided LUTs, templates, and SOPs.

- Deliver projects on fast turnaround timelines (typically 24–48 hours).

- Maintain organization, consistency, and quality across repeat projects.



Job Requirements:

- Solid experience editing in DaVinci Resolve Studio. Studio version is required. 

- Comfortable creating clean motion titles and simple animations (lower thirds, callouts, emphasis text).

- Efficient color grading workflow and clean audio handling.

- Strong communication skills and proficiency in English.

- Willing to learn and work within our project management software, ClickUp.

- Ability to work within U.S. business hours (PST) or overlap when needed.

- High attention to detail and ability to take feedback well.



Culture Fit (Non-Negotiable):

- Punctual and reliable.

- Coachable and committed to continuous improvement.

- Positive, solutions-focused attitude.

- No ego — just excellence.



Compensation & Growth:

- Per gig position. Potential to grow into a part-time and/or full-time editor after working together for some time.

- Starts with a free test edit. If hired, you will be compensated for the edit. 

- Clear systems, SOPs, and feedback provided to help you improve.

- Opportunity for long-term work, increased responsibility, and higher compensation as quality and efficiency improve.



How to Apply:

Please send the following;

- A short introduction about yourself.

- Relevant work samples (real estate, talking-head, or social content preferred).

- Confirmation that you can meet 24–48 hour turnaround times and work within PST hours when required.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
???? Appointment Setter – Base Pay + Lifetime Recurring Commissions

We are hiring driven appointment setters to help scale one of the fastest-growing industries in the world — AI automation — specifically the fastest-growing subcategory within it: AI Voice Reception for businesses.

This is not a small opportunity.

This is not a “just make some calls” job.

This is a serious income-building position for high performers.



???? What We Sell

We offer a fully customizable AI Voice Receptionist that:

• Answers inbound calls 24/7

• Books appointments automatically

• Handles FAQs

• Captures and qualifies leads

• Integrates with calendars and CRM

• Converts missed calls into revenue

Local businesses routinely recover significant lost revenue while paying only $250–$500 per month.

Retention is high.

Clients stay.

Which means your commissions stack.



???? Your Role (Very Important)

Your job is NOT to sell the full service.

Your job is to:

• Quickly build interest

• Create curiosity

• Create urgency

• Qualify the prospect

• Book the demo

Your goal is to sell the appointment.

We handle the closing.

You are responsible for opening the door — we close the deal.



???? Compensation Structure

Base Pay:

$50 per week 

 Paid bi-weekly

+ Commission:

$10 per sale in recurring monthly income

Paid monthly

You earn $10 per active client every single month for as long as:

• The client remains active

• You are still working with the company

Commissions stack every month.

There is no cap.



This is for individuals who want to control their income.

**Client Retention is 90%



???? Income Example (5 Sales Per Week Average)

If you average 5 sales per week (20 per month):

Month 1

Active Clients: 20

Recurring: 20 × $10 = $200

Base: $200

Total: $400



Month 2

Active Clients: 40

Recurring: 40 × $10 = $400

Base: $200

Total: $600



Month 3

Active Clients: 60

Recurring: 60 × $10 = $600

Base: $200

Total: $800



Month 4

Active Clients: 80

Recurring: 80 × $10 = $800

Base: $200

Total: $1,000



Month 5

Active Clients: 100

Recurring: 100 × $10 = $1,000

Base: $200

Total: $1,200



Month 6

Active Clients: 120

Recurring: 120 × $10 = $1,200

Base: $200

Total: $1,400



And yes — it continues stacking as long as clients stay active.

After 12 months at that pace:

240 active clients

Recurring = $2,400

Base = $200

Total = $2,600/month



And it continues stacking every month.

If you stay consistent, your recurring income grows continuously.



Performance Bonuses 



???? Daily Expectations

Minimum requirement:

• 100 calls per day

• 5 days per week

You will also:

• Run cold
 campaigns

• Use proven templates (provided)

• Follow structured outreach systems

This is a volume + performance role.



???? Tools You Will Use

You will be provided with:

• CRM access

• Dialing system

• Cold
 templates

• Prospecting software

The prospecting system allows you to:

• Pull targeted local business leads

• Filter by industry and geography

• Extract contact information

• Build structured outreach lists

• Organize prospects inside the CRM

You will not be guessing — you will have systems and structure.



? Qualifications (Non-Negotiable)

• Minimum 2 years of sales experience setting and/or closing

• High-speed, stable internet connection

• Quiet working space with no distractions

• Motivated and self-driven personality

• Comfortable with rejection and high call volume

• Strong English communication skills

If you do not meet these requirements, this role is not a fit.



???? Who This Is For

We are looking for:

• Go-getters

• Competitive individuals

• Self-starters

• High-energy communicators

• People who want income tied to performance

• Individuals willing to go above and beyond

If you need micromanagement, this is not for you.

If you want guaranteed base-only income, this is not for you.

If you want serious upside and are willing to outwork others, this is a strong opportunity.



???? Why This Opportunity Is Different

You are stepping into:

The largest industry in the world — AI.

And the largest subcategory within it — AI-driven business automation.

Demand is accelerating.

Adoption is still early.

If you are confident in your ability and ready to take control of your income, apply.

title: Lead Manager
description:
We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company seeking an experienced Real Estate Lead Qualifier & Appointment Setter to handle inbound and outbound seller leads. Your job is to prequalify motivated sellers, gather key property info, build rapport, and set quality appointments for acquisitions.



This is NOT a cold data-entry job. We are looking for someone with experience talking to U.S. homeowners, real estate sellers, or high-ticket phone salespeople.



Responsibilities:

Call inbound + outbound seller leads promptly.

Prequalify leads based on motivation, condition, timeline, and price.

Enter accurate notes and update our CRM (Podio).

Set and confirm appointments for the acquisitions manager.

Follow scripts and objection handlers (with flexibility to adapt).

Build rapport and create trust with sellers.

Occasionally, make light offers or gauge seller price expectations.



Requirements:

Strong spoken English and confidence on the phone.

Previous experience in real estate acquisitions, lead management, or phone-based sales (preferred).

Ability to follow scripts while also adapting naturally.

Comfortable working U.S. hours (EST or CST overlap required).

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and clear audio.

Must be coachable, consistent, and results-driven.



What We Offer:

Hourly pay: $7 –$8 /hr, depending on experience.





Performance bonuses for appointments that lead to closed deals.

Steady, long-term work with a growing U.S. real estate company.

Supportive team and clear SOPs to help you succeed.





How to Apply:

Please start your application with the word “Motivation” so we know you read this.

In your application, share:

Your experience with real estate or phone sales.

Examples of past KPIs (appointments set, contracts closed, etc.).

A short audio/video introducing yourself (preferred).

title: Operations Assistant at Boutique Tax Consulting Firm
description:
ABOUT US



We help online entrepreneurs (agency owners, coaches, consultants, remote founders) relocate internationally, reduce taxes legally, and protect wealth using holistic strategies that combine operations, company setup, and compliance.

We’re growing rapidly and building a world-class remote team that values precision, speed, confidentiality, and ownership.



If you love checklists, clean systems, and you take pride in getting details right the first time — you’ll fit in here.



WHAT YOU'LL DO (CORE RESPONSIBILITIES)

You’ll support our operations team across a mix of admin + accounting + compliance tasks.

Some are simple and SOP-driven, others become more advanced as you level up.



Level 1 (Basics / SOP-driven)

• Bookkeeping support (categorizing transactions, reconciling accounts, receipts, basic

monthly cleanup)

• Updating and maintaining client workspaces in Notion (status updates, checklists,

deadlines, documents)

• Setting up companies through online providers (following step-by-step SOPs)

• Organizing sensitive client documents (passports, lease agreements, invoices) with

perfect naming + folder hygiene

• Following internal processes and improving them when you spot gaps



Level 2 (Client & Partner Coordination)

• Liaising with partners (accountants, local offices, service providers)

• Preparing partner “packs” from client info stored in Notion (e.g., forwarding required

documents cleanly and securely)

• Tracking deadlines and ensuring nothing slips



Level 3 (Compliance Support / Drafting) — Growth Path

• Drafting compliance deliverables under supervision, e.g.:

o Form 5472 + pro forma 1120 (data gathering + draft prep)

o UK tax return support (organizing data, drafting sections, reconciliation)

• You prepare; a manager will then review and sign off (as appropriate)



IMPORTANT: You don’t need to be an expert on day one. You do need to be highly reliable, detail-oriented, and eager to learn.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Required:

• Strong attention to detail (you naturally double-check your work)

• Comfortable working inside Notion every day (databases, templates, status tracking)

• Basic accounting/bookkeeping knowledge (you understand debits/credits conceptually

and can reconcile)

• Great written English + professional communication

• Able to follow SOPs exactly and ask smart questions when something is unclear

• Discreet and trustworthy — you’ll handle confidential documents

• A laptop and mobile phone to be able to work from

• Strong Wi-Fi connection



Nice to Have (Big Plus):

• Experience with Xero / QuickBooks (or similar)

• Experience supporting US LLC compliance or UK tax admin

• Experience in a remote ops / VA role with strict processes

• Interest in international business, compliance, and structured workflows

• On the Notion application, you’ll be asked what your favourite colour is. Reply ‘White’



GROWTH & PROMOTION PATH

This is not a dead-end VA role. If you prove yourself, you can move up to:

• Compliance Specialist (returns + filings support)

• Senior Ops Lead (owning client workflows end-to-end)

• Team Manager (leading assistants + quality control)



We’re expanding — so strong performers grow fast.



PAY STRUCTURE (WE PAY FOR TALENT)

• Start: Hourly during trial/training (rate depends on experience)

• Then: Monthly retainer progression with loyalty incentive, with salary gradually increasing every month

• Exceptional people can earn more via performance-based increases and expanded scope.



(Exact structure may be adjusted based on hours, speed, and skill level — but the above is the

intended progression.)



WORK SETUP

• Remote

• Consistent weekly hours (part-time or full-time depending on fit)

• Some overlap with Asia/Bangkok time is helpful for coordination

title: Technical Content Lead
description:
TECHNICAL CONTENT LEAD

(Title doesn’t matter. Impact does.)



There’s a specific kind of person we’re looking for.

Not just a writer.

Not just a developer.

Someone who has lived through WordPress.



You’ve built the late-night client sites.

You’ve wrestled with Elementor layouts that broke for no reason.

You’ve refreshed a dashboard and held your breath after updating plugins.

You’ve migrated hosts, cleaned hacked installs, debugged WooCommerce checkout chaos.



And somewhere along the way… you started writing about it.



Maybe it was a blog.

Maybe Medium.

Maybe just long Reddit replies where you explained things better than the official documentation ever did.



And you realized something:



You’re not just good at building things.

You’re good at explaining them.



You can take something technical, messy, and overwhelming…

and make it feel simple. Human. Clear.



If you’re reading this and thinking,

“Wait. That’s literally me.”

Keep reading.





WHY THIS ROLE EXISTS



SGEN is building something better.



But here’s the truth:



It doesn’t matter how good a product is if no one understands it.

We need someone who makes SGEN understandable to the outside world.



When someone Googles a question at 1:14 AM — frustrated, stuck, ready to quit —

 they shouldn’t find silence.



They should find you.



Clear answers.

Honest comparisons.

Step-by-step guidance.

A voice that sounds like a smart friend, not a corporate manual.



You are the bridge between complexity and clarity.



WHO YOU ARE



You’re naturally curious.

If something doesn’t have documentation, you don’t wait to be assigned. You fix it.



You open a product and instinctively think:

“This needs a getting-started guide.”

“That error message needs explaining.”

“New users will get stuck here.”



You remember what it felt like to not know what a CMS was.



And when you explain it, you don’t use jargon.

You don’t flex vocabulary.

You just make it make sense.



Your writing feels like a conversation over coffee.

Not stiff.

Not robotic.

Not AI-generated.

Just clear.



YOU HAVE OPINIONS (AND THAT'S GOOD)



You probably have thoughts about WordPress architecture.



You might love it.

You might be tired of it.

You definitely have stories.



We don’t need neutral.

We don’t need safe.



We need someone who can say:

“Here’s why this is broken.”

“Here’s why this is better.”

“And here’s where we still need to improve.”



Fair. Honest. Confident.



Not loud. Not defensive.



Just grounded in real experience.



YOU'RE NOT FRAGILE ONLINE



Reddit can be brutal.



Blog comments can be snarky.



Someone will say:

“SGEN is just another startup that’ll be dead in a year.”



You don’t panic.

You don’t rage-reply.

You don’t disappear.

You respond with clarity and calm.



Because you know the difference between criticism and noise.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO



You’ll dive deep into SGEN.



You’ll build test sites. Break things. Explore edges.



You’ll document:

- The first-click experience

- The confusing parts

- The missing explanations

- The friction



Then you’ll write:



Clear documentation.

Step 1. Step 2. Screenshot. Expected result.



Blog posts that actually say something.

Not filler. Not fluff. Not SEO sludge.



Comparison pages that feel honest.

Guides that prevent support tickets.

Reddit answers that genuinely help someone.



You’ll publish consistently. Weekly. Reliably.

Because content works through rhythm, not bursts.



WHAT MATTERS MOST

Native-level written English.

Not technically correct — natural.



When someone in the US reads your writing, they shouldn’t think,

“Oh, this was written overseas.”



They should think,

“This person gets it.”



You’ve built WordPress sites for at least 2 years.

Not theory. Not tutorials. Real clients. Real mess.



You understand:

- Plugin conflicts

- Theme weirdness

- Hosting nightmares

- Security scares



And when you write about them, it’s fro
mory — not Google.



You can write both:

- A bold opinion piece

 and

- A precise technical guide.



You understand basic SEO — not in a spammy way, but structurally.

You know what helps content rank without making it unreadable.



You can screenshot. Screen record. Annotate.

Because visual tools deserve visual documentation.



And most importantly:



You edit yourself.



You don’t ship first drafts.



You refine. Tighten. Clarify. Simplify.



THIS IS PROBABLY YOU IF...

- You’ve written long Reddit answers “just to help.”

- You’ve explained technical concepts to non-technical clients without making them feel dumb.

- You secretly enjoy reorganizing messy documentation.

- You get frustrated when products don’t explain themselves properly.

- You’ve thought, “I could write this better.”



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT



This is not generic content writing.

This is not keyword stuffing.

This is not pumping out 1,500 words of fluff twice a week.



We’re not looking for a writer who Googles technical topics.



We’re looking for a technical person who writes.



WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS



Great content doesn’t just bring traffic.

It builds trust.



It reduces support tickets.

It converts skeptics.

It makes a product feel mature.



A mediocre hire in this role will quietly weaken the brand.

The right hire will compound value every single week.



Are you the one we're looking for?

 your resume and portfolio to "phhr at seoguarantee dot com" with the subject line: Your Name – Technical Content Lead at Your Service.



COMPENSATION

For the right person in the Philippines with real WordPress experience and strong US-facing writing ability, this role ranges roughly from $1,200–$2,500 USD/month, depending on depth of experience and portfolio quality.



We will not underpay for excellence.



Because excellent content pays for itself.



If you’re reading this and thinking:

“They just described my career path.”

 “They’re describing the frustrations I’ve had.”

 “They’re describing how I write.”



Then maybe you’re not just interested.



Maybe you’re exactly who we’ve been looking for.



And we’d like to meet you.

title: TikTok Trend Researcher and Short Form Video Editor / Social Media Manager
description:
We are looking for someone who lives on the internet and understands TikTok and Instagram culture.

Your role is to research daily trends, edit short form videos to match those trends, and prepare finished videos for posting.

You will not be responsible for posting content or managing accounts. Your job is to identify trends, edit videos, and deliver ready to post content.



This role begins part time with opportunity for full time employment within 2-3 months. We are looking for someone long term who enjoys internet culture, 
 humor, and viral content.



TikTok Trend Researcher and Short Form Video Editor / Social Media Manager



Your main responsibility is turning raw video content into trend based edits that match what is currently performing well on TikTok and Instagram.



Responsibilities



- Research daily TikTok and Instagram trends.

- Identify trends that match a specific niche.

- Pull raw video content from Google Drive or Dropbox.

- Edit videos to match current viral formats.

- Export finished videos and organize them in Dropbox folders.

- Prepare daily videos for multiple accounts.

- Suggest caption or hashtag options when helpful. No AI.



Daily Workload



- During training period you will edit 4 videos per day across 4 different accounts.

- After training you will edit 6-8 videos per day across different accounts when hired full time.

- Each account requires one post per day.

- Videos will be provided through Dropbox or Google Drive. Your job is to turn those clips into trend based edits.



Work Schedule



Part time position.

20 to 25 hours per week.

Approximately 4 hours per day.

5 days per week.



Requirements



- Fast and stable internet connection.

- Strong understanding of TikTok and Instagram culture.

- Comfortable with 
 humor and internet trends.

- Experience editing short form video content.

- Experience with one or more editing programs such as CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

- Comfortable working with Google Drive and Dropbox.

- Organized with file management.

- Able to meet daily deadlines.

- Comfortable researching trends both inside a niche and across general TikTok.



Nice to Have

- Experience editing viral TikTok style content.

- Experience running theme pages or 
 pages.

- Experience identifying trends before they peak.

- Understand female led brands and culture



What We Provide



- Training on the niche and algorithm strategy.

- Access to content libraries.

- VPN access to view United States TikTok feeds.

- Clear systems for content workflow.

- Opportunity for long term employment and increased pay.

- Communication

- We communicate through messages, WhatsApp, or Viber.



Important

To confirm you read the entire job post please start your application with the word pineapple.

Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed. We prefer someone who has belief that they are more capable at creativity than AI, if we sense that responses as AI generated, we will move on to other ones, this is not a corporate job, we want real chronically online Gen Z that understands internet culture. 



Application Instructions



Please include the following in your application.



Send three TikTok or Instagram videos you have edited.

Send three TikTok trends you believe are currently viral.

Explain how you usually find trends before they peak.

Tell us which editing software you use most.

Send a screenshot of your internet speed from speedtest.net.

Send one TikTok video link that you believe will trend in the next 7 days and explain why.

, and TikTok.

Your main job is designing images — trainer tips, healthy habit graphics, event promos, tea
mber shoutouts, and member spotlights. You do NOT need to create video. We supply all video content for you to post with captions and hashtags.

, and TikTok

 instagram page and generate an ad similar to the style we have on the website (doesn't have to be YBX related)

Links to 2–3 social media accounts you manage or have managed

Your available start date

title: Video Editor — Stable Work, Fair Pay, and Path to Full-time (US Health Brand)
description:
Are you looking for consistent work, fair pay, and a path to full-time based on your performance? If yes, keep reading.



Most video editor jobs pay you a flat rate and that's it. Doesn't matter if your ad gets a million views or drives $50,000 in sales you get the same paycheck. No bonus. No raise. No recognition. Just the same rate, forever.



This role is different. When your ads win, you get paid more. When you prove yourself, your rate goes up. Perform well and you move to full-time. Keep growing and you become a senior editor on the team.



What You'll Do:



Receive a script from us

Build the full video using AI tools — talking heads, b-roll, voiceover

Source footage from TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube

Deliver clean, ready-to-run Meta ads



All AI tools are provided. You pay for nothing.



Before You Keep Reading:

Watch these examples first — this is the style we create:  

If you cannot match this style, do not apply.



What We're Looking For



Experience editing video ads for
 or Instagram

Willing to learn AI tools like HeyGen, Sora, and Kling

Fast, reliable, and coachable



Pay



$500/month to start

Performance bonuses when your ads win

Rates go up as you prove yourself

Path to full-time as we grow

Top performers move into senior editor roles





To Apply:



Send 2-3 examples of video ads you've made in the style of the videos in the drive above 

Tell us which AI tools you use

Your availability and expected monthly rate



In your application, tell us what you think is the most important part of a video ad, we read every message carefully.

title: Part-Time Remote Role | Long-Term Opportunity with Australian Business
description:
Job Title:  Admin / Logistics Assistant

Hours:  8.00am to 12.00pm (Australian Eastern Standard Time) - Monday to Friday

Reports to: Business Owners, Flynn Tarps



About Flynn Tarps:

Flynn Tarps is a family owned business supplying Australia’s builders, owner-builders, insurance companies, and commercial operators with heavy-duty PVC tarps for over 35 years. We provide tarp hire and sales across Melbourne, Sydney, and Brisbane.



We’re seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Admin / Logistics Assistant to manage day-to-day hire operations and help keep our business running smoothly.



Why Join Us:

- Family owned Australian business with 35 years in operation

- Long-term stable role (not short-term project work)

- Supportive business owners who value reliability and initiative

- Opportunity to grow into marketing and operations support



Key Goals:

- Manage day-to-day tarp hire orders with accuracy and attention to detail.

- Help organise day-to-day logistics for deliveries and pick-ups across Melbourne, Sydney, and Brisbane.

- Provide consistent and professional customer communication via
 and text when required.



Core Responsibilities:

- Process tarp hire orders: check customer details, update hire sheets, and confirm with customers.

- Manage customer
 inbox and SMS confirmations for deliveries and pick-ups.

- Book couriers and coordinate with depots in Melbourne, Sydney, and Brisbane.

- Help schedule pick-ups.

- Listen to call recordings (via Siptalk) and update hire sheets.

- Track and follow up long-term hires with courtesy check-in text messages.

- Ensure all customer communication is professional and timely.

- Other general admin tasks as directed



Future Growth Opportunity – with training provided:

- Help prepare quarterly Mailchimp newsletters.

- Assist with blog research and drafting.

- Coordinate customer reviews.



Skills & Experience:

- Prior experience in administration, logistics coordination, or VA support.

- Strong organisational skills and excellent attention to detail.

- Confident communicator – written and SMS.

- Competent with spreadsheets (Google sheets).

- Ability to work independently.

- Willingness to learn and grow.

- Understand Australian geography, particularly the major cities where we operate — Brisbane, Melbourne, and Sydney.



Tools You’ll Use:

- Gmail & Google Workspace (Docs, Google Sheets, Google Drive)

- Siptalk (call management)



Who You Are:

- Highly organised and detail-focused.

- Experience working independently

- Reliable and consistent - you follow through on tasks.

- Proactive problem solver.

- Professional and customer-focused.

- Open to learning new skills, particularly in marketing.



What Success Looks Like:

- All hire orders processed and confirmed on the same day.

- 100?curacy in hire sheet and customer details.

- Any pick ups communicated without delays.

- Stock records maintained daily.

- Customers consistently updated with professional communication.



Requirements:

- Reliable high-speed internet

- Quiet workspace for focused work

- Backup internet connection preferred

- Own computer suitable for remote work



Our Work Style:

We value reliability, clear communication, and people who take ownership of their work.

We are respectful, organised, and expect the same from our team.



How to Apply - please include the following:

- Resume

- Short introduction explaining why you are suited to this role

- Confirmation you can work from 8.00am to 12.00pm (Australian Eastern Standard Time) - Monday to Friday

- Your experience with Google Sheets



Also provide your answer to this question:

A new hire order has been received but the customer’s
 address is missing, which is required for invoicing. How would you handle this situation?



IMPORTANT: When applying for this role, please use the following subject line in your application message:

Flynn Tarps VA Application



Applications that do not follow these instructions or include the required information may not be considered.

title: Commercial Solar Admin (Australia)
description:
We are seeking an Australian Commercial Solar Admin Specialist with hands-on experience in Australian commercial solar projects (30 kW and above).



This role focuses on post-sale administration, approvals, compliance, and documentation for commercial solar and solar + battery projects. Once onboarded, you will be trusted to manage jobs independently within defined processes.



This role is not suitable for general VAs or candidates without direct Australian solar experience.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Commercial Solar Administration

- Manage DNSP grid connection applications for commercial solar systems (30 kW+)

- Prepare and submit pre-approval applications

- Respond to DNSP technical queries and requests for additional information

- Manage export limits, zero-export requirements, and protection conditions

- Upload and manage documentation across DNSP portals



2. Solar + Battery Projects

- Support commercial battery approvals and documentation

- Ensure batteries are included correctly in DNSP approvals and SLDs

- Manage commissioning evidence and compliance documentation

- Coordinate with installers to resolve approval or documentation gaps



3. Compliance & Documentation

Review and manage:

- Single Line Diagrams (SLDs)

- CEC-compliant documentation

- Installer and designer accreditation evidence

- Commissioning photos and reports

Prepare STC documentation for commercial systems

Package compliance folders for audit readiness



Coordination & Communication

Liaise with:

- Australian installers and electricians

- STC traders

- Retailers and DNSPs (via
 and portals)

Track job status, approvals, and outstanding actions

Flag risks, delays, or compliance issues early and escalate appropriately



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Candidates must have:

- Direct experience working with Australian solar companies

- Experience supporting commercial solar systems (30 kW+)

- Hands-on experience with at least one of the following:

- Grid connection applications

- STCs for commercial solar

- Australian DNSP portals



A solid understanding of:

- Export limits and DNSP pre-approval requirements

- Solar + battery integration fundamentals

- Clean Energy Council (CEC) compliance frameworks



Essential:

Victorian solar experience, including exposure to Victorian DNSPs such as:

- Powercor

- AusNet

- Jemena

- United Energy

- Experience across multiple Australian states (VIC, NSW, QLD)

- Experience managing commercial metering coordination

- Familiarity with CRMs such as Pylon, OpenSolar, ServiceM8, or similar

- Experience supporting mid-to-high volume solar installers



*Candidates without Australian solar experience should not apply.*



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

- AU time zone working hours (no graveyard shifts)

- We’re a passionate, forward-thinking team (and genuinely good humans)

- Growth opportunities as we expand

- Supportive culture where initiatives and ideas are celebrated



*Only applications submitted through the link will be considered. 

*Please do not apply if you don't have the qualifications, thank you!



Apply via:

mber

title: Customer Support Manager
description:
Customer Support Team Manager (Ecommerce | Dropshipping | Remote)



We are hiring a Customer Support Team Manager to lead and scale support operations across multiple high-volume ecommerce brands.



This is not a ticket-queue supervisor role. We are looking for an operational leader who understands the economics of dropshipping, protects profit through dispute management, and builds systems that reduce ticket volume while improving customer satisfaction.



If you are metrics-driven, process-oriented, and experienced in multi-brand ecommerce environments, this role is for you.



What You’ll Own

1. Team Leadership & Accountability

-Lead, coach, and develop a remote CS team with clear KPIs

-Drive performance culture through structured QA and feedback

-Implement performance improvement plans when necessary

-Ensure coverage, productivity, and response time targets are consistently met



2. Systems & Operational Excellence



-Fully own and optimize Gorgias (macros, automations, tagging, workflows)

-Build and refine SOPs that reduce inefficiencies and errors

-Improve first-response time, resolution time, CSAT, and refund rates

-Continuously identify automation opportunities to reduce ticket load



3. Performance & Risk Management



-Monitor KPIs daily (AHT, FRT, resolution rate, refund rate, dispute ratio)

-Proactively flag operational risks before they impact revenue

-Deliver structured weekly reports with actionable insights



4. Chargebacks & Disputes



-Oversee disputes across payment platforms

-Maintain a 55%+ win rate

-Strengthen documentation and evidence workflows to protect revenue



What We’re Looking For



-Proven experience managing CS teams across multiple ecommerce brands

-Strong dropshipping background (private label experience is a plus)

-Advanced Gorgias expertise (not basic user level)

-Deep understanding of chargebacks and dispute handling

-Data-driven, objective leadership style

-Strong operational discipline and ownership mindset



Role Details

-Fully remote

-Full-time

-Flexible schedule, but must overlap with core business hours

-Compensation: $6–$10/hour, depending on experience and proven performance



You will have full operational ownership and the opportunity to build a high-performance support structure across multiple brands.



How to Apply



Complete the application form below:

title: Credit Repair Disputer
description:
MUST SEND A 60 SECOND LOOM WITH YOUR EXPERIENCE TO BE CONSIDERED FOR POSITION!



Virtual Assistant for Credit Repair and Financial Literacy



Location: Remote



Are you passionate about helping others achieve financial freedom and literacy? We are seeking a skilled Virtual Assistant to join our team and assist clients in disputing inaccurate credit reports and navigating the complex world of credit repair and financial literacy.



YOU MUST RECORD A 2 MIN OR 60 SECOND VIDEO EXPLAINING YOUR KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ALONG WITH PROVEN RESULTS OF YOUR WORK OR YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



Responsibilities:

- Dispute inaccurate credit reports on behalf of clients, adhering to the laws outlined in the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).

- File complaints with consumer protection agencies such as the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), Better Business Bureau (BBB), and Attorney General's office when necessary.

- Utilize extensive knowledge of the credit repair process in America to provide expert guidance and support to clients.

- Communicate effectively with clients to address their concerns, answer inquiries, and provide updates on the dispute process.

- Demonstrate true determination and heart in advocating for clients' rights and financial well-being.



Qualifications:

- Previous experience working with a credit repair company, with a strong understanding of the credit repair process.

- Extensive knowledge of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and other relevant laws governing credit reporting and repair.

- Proven ability to file complaints with consumer protection agencies, such as the CFPB, BBB, and Attorney General's office.

- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to empathize and connect with clients.

- True determination and heart to help clients overcome financial challenges and achieve their goals.



Benefits:

- Flexible remote work environment.

- Opportunity to make a meaningful impact in the lives of others.

- Competitive compensation package.



If you have a passion for helping others and possess the skills and qualifications listed above, we want to hear from you! Apply now to join our team and make a difference in the world of credit repair and financial literacy.



3 Commas Solutions is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals regardless of race, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, or other protected status.

title: Part-Time Finance & Data Analyst (Remote, UK-Focused) – 4 Hours/Day
description:
About Us

We are a growing UK-based group of companies operating across services and technology. We require a highly organised, detail-oriented Finance & Data Analyst to take ownership of financial administration, bookkeeping, payroll preparation, associate payments, reporting, and data accuracy across a group of companies.

This is a hands-on operational role, not theoretical.



Your Core Responsibilities

Financial Administration & Bookkeeping



Full responsibility for daily and weekly bookkeeping

Loading, categorising, validating, and reconciling:



Bills

Receipts

Invoices





Obtaining missing receipts and invoices

Correct UK account assignments for tax and reporting

Weekly bank reconciliations and syncing bank accounts

Maintaining clean, audit-ready accounts at all times

Working primarily in Xero and/or QuickBooks





Associate Payments



Preparing associate payment statements

Validating calculations against source data and agreements

Reconciling associate payments to ERP data, revenue, and bank payments

Identifying and resolving discrepancies before payment

Maintaining clear, auditable records





Payroll (UK)

Required:



Preparing payroll data ready for submission to external accountants

Maintaining accurate payroll inputs:



Salaries

Contractors

Allowances and deductions





Reconciling payroll data to accounts and bank payments



Desirable:



Running UK payroll in-house

Submitting payroll using a UK payroll solution

Producing and distributing payslips to staff

Managing payroll schedules and payroll-related queries





VAT, Compliance & Statutory



Preparing and validating UK VAT returns

Ensuring correct VAT treatment across transactions

Filing annual confirmation statements

Preparing annual accounts ready for submission

Supporting compliance with UK accounting standards





Payments & Cashflow



Preparing and batching bill payments

Managing bi-weekly payment runs

Proactively reminding management of upcoming payments

Monitoring operating costs and identifying trends or risks





Financial Reporting & Data Analysis



Producing management accounts

Building financial dashboards and reports

Tracking operating costs and performance trends

Building reports using Power BI and spreadsheets

Analysing ERP and operational data for accuracy and consistency

Supporting a multi-entity group with accurate, timely data





Essential Experience

? Strong experience with Xero and/or QuickBooks accounting software

? Proven experience in UK bookkeeping

? Experience preparing payroll data for accountants

? Solid understanding of UK VAT

? Experience producing management accounts and dashboards

? Strong Power BI (or equivalent BI tools)

? Extremely high attention to detail

? Ability to work independently with accountability

? Must overlap UK (GMT) working hours



Desirable Skills

? Experience with DEXT (or similar receipt capture tools)

? Experience with Fathom or financial forecasting tools

? Experience using a UK payroll solution

? Experience running payroll and issuing payslips

? ERP system experience

? Multi-entity or group company experience



Who This Role Is NOT For

? Junior bookkeepers

? Candidates without UK finance experience

? Data-only analysts with no accounting responsibility

? Candidates requiring close daily supervision

title: Senior Technical Virtual Assistant (Automation + Systems Integrations)
description:
Job Description 



Job Title: Senior Technical Virtual Assistant (Automation + Systems Integrations) 

Employment Type: Contract 

Location: Remote 

Time Zone Requirement: Must be able to work within Central Standard Time (CST) business 

hours (partial overlap acceptable) 

Rate: $8–$12 per hour depending on experience



Overview 

We are seeking a Senior Technical Virtual Assistant (VA) to support a fractional CRO / RevOps 

consultant transitioning into a scalable AI and automation delivery model. 

This is an execution-first role. You will translate strategic requirements from the owner into 

clear technical tasks and deliver clean, reliable implementations with strong QA and 

documentation. 

The ideal candidate is an ops-minded builder who understands automation, integrations, and 

systems hygiene, and proactively identifies risks, dependencies, and missing inputs before issues 

arise.



Key Responsibilities



Automation & Integrations

*Build and maintain workflows using Zapier and Make

*Occasionally work with n8n

*Create multi-step automations with logic, filters, and error handling

*Connect systems using webhooks and APIs



Systems Setup

*Set up integrations between tools such as:

*CRMs


 platforms

*Airtable / Google Sheets

*Slack

*Scheduling tools

*Forms



QA & Monitoring

*Test automation workflows before launch

*Identify edge cases and prevent failures

*Add monitoring, logging, or alerts when needed



Documentation

*Record Loom videos explaining builds

*Create simple SOP documentation

*Write clear handoff notes



Project Support

*Help with automation and systems implementation for client projects

*Translate requirements into clear technical tasks

*Communicate blockers or missing information early



Required Skills



*Strong experience with:

Zapier

Make (Integromat)



*Experience building multi-step automations



Understanding of:

*Webhooks

*APIs

*JSON

*Basic authentication methods (API keys / OAuth)



Experience integrating tools like:

*CRM systems


 platforms

*Slack

*Google Sheets / Airtable

*Scheduling tools

*Forms



*Strong attention to detail and QA testing

*Good written English communication

*Comfortable creating documentation and Loom videos

*Able to work independently and manage tasks



Nice-to-Have Skills

*Experience with n8n

*Familiarity with voice AI workflows

*Experience with cold
 tools like Apollo, Instantly, or Smartlead

*CRM automation or RevOps workflows

*Basic JavaScript or Python

*Data cleanup and deduplication experience



What Success Looks Like

*Automations are built accurately and on time

*Workflows run reliably with minimal errors

*Documentation is clear and easy to follow

*Communication is proactive and organized

*Tasks are tracked and completed with no dropped items



Hiring Process 

Round 1 – Interview with Talent Team (skills + experience assessment) 

Round 2 – Interview with Hiring Manager (project scope + compensation discussion)



If interested kindly send a link of your resume/cv and share your relevant experience.

title: Full-Time Video Editor (After Effects + Premiere)
description:
True crime channel. Documentary-grade production. We have standards and every video needs to reflect that. Each video is 30–45 minutes, documentary style with talking head host. You handle everything from custom After Effects intros to the full edit.



How it works:

You'll receive scripts with editing direction, an asset library per case (b-roll clips, images, talking head footage, screenshots). Most assets are provided but manual searching and sourcing will still be needed from you to fill gaps.



The intro (60 sec) gets the premium editing, custom motion graphics, text reveals, sound design, transitions in After Effects. Every intro is unique, not copy-paste templates.



The body edit is clean minimal documentary-style work in Premiere — b-roll matched to talking head narration, cutaways at the right 
nts, photo keyframes, text overlays for names/dates/locations.



Requirements:

- Strong After Effects — real motion graphics, not just Premiere with plugins

- Premiere for long-form timeline editing

- Understanding of YouTube pacing and retention

- Good PC specs

- Reliable internet for daily large file transfers

- Available to start asap



Payment:

$800/mo, full time



Note: NDA + Hubstaff required



To apply:

- Examples of custom After Effects intros (true crime or documentary style preferred, if you have it)

- 1 example of a long-form edit (10+ min)

- Your current PC specs (CPU, RAM, GPU, storage, internet speed)

- When you can start



To confirm you read this entire listing, put in your proposal subject the word "FOCUS"

Graphic Designer Needed for Sports Tech App (UI Graphics / Game-Style Visuals)

?

?

title: Join the 'Disney' of Short-Stays as a Concierge Team Member
description:
We are the Disney of the short-stay industry.



Every stay is designed, choreographed, and delivered with the same intention you’d expect from a world-class global brand — where emotion matters, details matter, and the experience is remembered long after check-out.



This role is not customer support.

It is not a script-reading position.

It is not a place to hide behind automation.



We are looking for real brand ambassadors, people who understand that how something is said matters just as much as what is said.



--------------------



The Role

As a Concierge, you are the living expression of the brand.



You are the voice guests trust.

You are the tone they remember.

You are the reason a stay feels thoughtful, intentional, and human.



Guests are not interacting with software or templates.

They are interacting with you, and through you, the brand.



--------------------



What You’ll Be Responsible For

1. Serve as the primary point of contact for guests before, during, and after their stay

2. Deliver warm, confident, articulate communication across booking platforms, phone,
, and SMS

3. Represent the brand’s values, tone, and standards in every interaction

4. Ensure each guest experience feels seamless, considered, and personal

5. Resolve guest issues (A/C, Wi-Fi, access, appliances, etc.) calmly and decisively

6. Coordinate solutions with cleaning, maintenance, and building teams

7. Communicate disruptions or building notices with clarity and professionalism

8. Take ownership of outcomes, not just messages

9. Maintain a deep understanding of each property’s layout, features, and nuances

10. Coordinate with housekeeping teams to ensure spaces are guest-ready at all times

11. Speak confidently and accurately about each space and its surroundings

12. Maintain clear guest notes, handovers, and internal updates

13. Work in rhythm with the wider team to deliver consistency at scale



-----------------------



Non-Negotiables



1. Fluent English is essential.

You must communicate clearly, confidently, and naturally — both written and spoken.



2. No AI-generated guest communication.

ChatGPT or similar tools are not permitted for guest interactions.

This brand is built on real conversations with real people.



3. You represent something bigger than yourself.

This role requires pride, presence, and care in how you show up every day.



4. This is a role in a brand.

We are selective because every person in this position shapes how the world experiences us.



------------------------



Video Application (Required)



All applicants must submit a short video answering:



1. Who you are and how you present yourself

2. Your experience in hospitality or short-term stays (if any)

3. What being a brand ambassador means to you

4. If you were told you were joining the Disney of the short-stay industry, how would that change the way you approach your work?

title: Interior Designer (Full-Time, Remote) – Build Magical Spaces for a Global Hospitality Brand
description:
We’re looking for a full-time Interior Designer to join a fast-growing hospitality brand that builds immersive, story-driven spaces, often described as the Disney of short stays.



This is not a freelance or side-hustle role.



This is a full-time, exclusive position for a designer who wants to fully commit to one brand, own projects end-to-end, and build a long-term creative career.



If you’re looking to juggle multiple clients or keep other professional commitments, this role will not be the right fit.





About the Role:



You will be the sole Interior Designer responsible for running design projects from start to finish.



That means you will:



- Lead each project from concept to final delivery

- Drive timelines, milestones, and 
ntum

- Run kick-offs, reviews, and design sessions

- Own modelling, layouts, FF&E, and specifications

- Proactively push projects forward without being chased

- Collaborate with a creative director for vision and alignment



You won’t be given tasks.

You’ll be given ownership.





Exclusivity & Focus (Important):



This role requires full professional focus.





We’re looking for someone who:



- Treats this as their only professional design role

- Does not take on other client work or employment

- Wants to invest their creative energy into building one brand deeply

- Thinks and operates as if this were their own business



We believe the quality and pace of work we’re aiming for is only possible with complete focus and commitment.





The Kind of Designer We’re Looking For



This role is for someone who:

- Thinks like an owner, not an employee

- Is highly proactive and self-driven

- Is comfortable being the single point of responsibility

- Is responsive and reliable in fast-moving environments

ntum than about where you studied or how many years you’ve worked.

“This role requires full professional focus with no other work commitments. Why does that suit you at this stage of your career?” and "If someone was to tell you, you were going to join the Disney of the short-stay industry, how would that make you feel?"





If you’re looking for a place to truly own your craft and grow long-term, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Sales, Growth & Acquisitions Coordinator - Join the 'Disney' of short-stays
description:
Who We Are



We are a visionary company in the short-stay space with ambitions to become the “Disney of short-stays.” Every property we touch is transformed into a one-of-a-kind experience — something cinematic, magical, and unforgettable.



Our growth is accelerating, and we’re building a team that’s relentless about execution. This role is about being the backbone of our sales and acquisitions process — the one who makes sure nothing slips through the cracks.



The Role



We’re looking for a Growth & Acquisitions Coordinator to work directly with our Director of Growth & Acquisitions.



You will:



Keep our sales pipeline moving with flawless execution.

Make sure every call is scheduled, every lead followed up, every promise tracked.

Confidently communicate with clients, agents, and prospects by phone and
.

Proactively search for new growth opportunities — from real estate listings,
 groups, and industry networks — and feed them into the pipeline.

Be the “right hand” to the Director, ensuring she spends all her time selling and closing while you drive consistency, 
ntum, and new opportunities.



Responsibilities



1. Sales & Lead Support

Schedule and confirm discovery calls, prepare notes, and handle follow-ups.

Update CRM (Copper) and spreadsheets so data is always accurate.

Draft professional, natural
s after every sales interaction.



2. Client, Agent & Prospect Communication

Call clients and real estate agents to provide updates, confirm details, or chase deliverables.

Confidently step into outbound cold calls when required (scripts provided).



3. Business Building & Lead Generation

Monitor
 groups, property forums, and online marketplaces for potential property opportunities.

Share promising real estate listings and potential fits with the Director.

Support real estate partner outreach by sending information, updates, or opportunities.



4. Project Coordination

Track deals as they move from first call ? design ? transformation.

Ensure internal teams deliver on promises and deadlines.

Chase follow-ups relentlessly so nothing stalls.



5. Reporting & Admin

Generate weekly sales and pipeline reports.

Maintain organized files, inboxes, and schedules.

Flag bottlenecks before they become problems.



Requirements



1. Fluent, natural English — written and spoken. Neutral or Western-style accent preferred.

2. Confident making calls to clients, agents, and prospects.

3. Experience in sales coordination, business development support, or project management.

4. Highly organized, detail-obsessed, and proactive.

5. Comfortable in a fast-paced, ambitious startup environment.

6 Relentless about execution — you don’t let tasks slip.





Application Instructions (Do Not Skip)



To apply, please submit:



1. Your CV / Resume

2. A 2–3 minute video introducing yourself where you cover:

Your experience in a similar role.

An example of when you had to keep a sales pipeline or project moving.

How you’ve previously hunted for business opportunities (leads, partnerships, listings).

And most importantly: If someone told you that you are about to join a company that has the aspiration to become the “Disney of the short-stay industry” — what would you say?

title: Inbound Sales & Dispatch Specialist
description:
Company: Staff Connect (on behalf of an Australian client)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based applicants only)

Schedule: Rotating shifts between 5:00 PM – 9:00 AM AEDT

Employment Type: Full-Time

Salary: Competitive (based on skills and experience)

Leave: 1 week paid annual leave



About the Opportunity



Our client is Australia’s leading misfuelling response company, providing nationwide emergency assistance to drivers who a
 put the wrong fuel in their vehicle.



When customers call, they’re often stressed and stranded. Your role is to confidently guide them, secure the booking, and coordinate the technician response.



This is more than a dispatcher role — it’s a structured pathway toward leadership. High performers will gradually take on operational oversight and team responsibilities, with the goal of stepping into a Sales Manager / Team Leader position.



Staff Connect is helping build the client’s first offshore team in the Philippines — this is a ground-floor opportunity with real long-term growth.



The Role



You’ll begin in an Inbound Sales & Dispatch position, managing live calls and coordinating technicians across Australia.



As you prove your reliability, sales ability, and leadership potential, you’ll be given expanded responsibilities in operations, quality control, and team support.



Core Responsibilities

Inbound Sales & Job Coordination

- Answer incoming calls from motorists requiring urgent assistance

- Convert enquiries into confirmed bookings using empathy and confidence

- Coordinate nationwide technicians via scheduling platforms

- Secure deposits and accurately log all job details

- Manage cases from first contact through job completion

- Communicate via phone, Gmail, Slack, SMS, and booking systems



Operations & Quality Oversight

- Review previous day’s jobs for accuracy and completion

- Identify and correct unclosed or incorrectly logged jobs

- Ensure jobs are properly transferred to Xero and GeoOp



Monitor call logs for:

- Correct objection tagging

- Accurate ETAs and timestamps

- Proper discount logging

- Missed sales opportunities



- Assist in managing long fleet-related calls for PO numbers

- Track spill kit usage and upload relevant invoices in Xero (creation only)

- Act as a quality control layer to prevent operational errors



Process & Admin Support

- Update internal fleet documents using new templates

- Assist with SOP improvements and documentation updates

- Support onboarding and training initiatives as the team expands



Customer Escalation & Tech Coordination

- Manage escalated customer calls professionally

- Coordinate servo runs and tech card runs

- Participate in Slack huddles (camera-on when required)

- Be an active contributor during live team support sessions



Ideal Candidate

- At least 2 years’ experience in sales, dispatch, or call centre roles

- Strong track record of converting inbound enquiries

- Excellent English communication (written and spoken)

- Calm and composed under pressure

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail

- Confident using Google Workspace, Gmail, and Chrome

- Comfortable with Slack and video calls

- Reliable home setup with stable internet



Highly Regarded:

- Automotive or roadside assistance experience

- Knowledge of Australian geography

title: Legal Administration Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly organised and detail-oriented individual to join our esteemed legal team as an Administrative Assistant. The ideal candidate will play a crucial role in supporting our legal professionals and ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of the legal department.



Responsibilities:



Administrative Support:

- Provide administrative assistance to legal professionals, including managing schedules, coordinating meetings, and handling correspondence.

- Prepare and proofread legal documents, correspondence, and reports.

- Maintain and organise electronic and physical filing systems.



Communication and Coordination:

- Act as a liaison between legal tea
mbers and external parties, including clients, opposing counsel, and court personnel.

- Manage incoming calls,
s, and inquiries, directing them to the appropriate tea
mbers.



Document Management:

- Assist in drafting, editing, and formatting legal documents, contracts, and agreements.

- Coordinate document production and distribution, ensuring accuracy and confidentiality.



Calendar and Deadline Management:

- Maintain and update legal professionals' calendars, ensuring deadlines and court appearances are accurately tracked.

- Assist in monitoring and managing court deadlines and filing requirements.



Legal Research:

- Conduct preliminary legal research under the guidance of legal professionals.

- Compile and organise relevant legal resources and information.



Billing and Expense Management:

- Assist in tracking and managing legal expenses and billing activities.

- Prepare and process invoices, ensuring compliance with billing guidelines.



Ideally you will have experience in:

- Proven experience as an administrative assistant or in a similar role, preferably within a legal setting.

- Proficiency in Google Suite, Slack, Aircall and CRM tools.

- Exceptional organisational skills and attention to detail.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills - Including the ability to communicate with customers over the phone.

- Ability to handle sensitive and confidential information with discretion.

- Familiarity with legal terminology and processes is a plus.



Attributes:

- Team player with a positive and proactive attitude.

- Ability to multitask and prioritise assignments effectively.

- Strong problem-solving skills.

- Adaptability in a fast-paced legal environment



Please send your resume with your application. Thank you!

title: Google Ads Expert
description:
???? PLEASE READ THIS ENTIRE JOB POST BEFORE APPLYING ????



Senior Google Ads & YouTube Advertising Specialist (Expert Level Only)



We are looking for a high-level Google Ads expert who lives and breathes the Google advertising ecosystem.



This role is not suitable for beginners or intermediate media buyers. We are specifically looking for someone with deep, hands-on expertise managing complex Google Ads campaigns and advanced tracking setups.



If you are someone who understands how to build, track, optimize, and scale profitable campaigns inside Google Ads, including advanced tracking infrastructure, we would love to hear from you.



?



What You’ll Be Doing



You will be responsible for building, managing, optimizing, and scaling Google advertising campaigns across multiple campaign types, including:



• Search campaigns focused on lead generation

• Display and banner advertising campaigns

• Performance Max campaign setup and optimization

• YouTube advertising campaigns, including video retargeting

• Advanced retargeting campaigns across Search, Display, and YouTube

• Conversion-focused call campaigns driving inbound phone leads

• Creating and managing campaign structures across multiple ad groups and audiences

• Ongoing testing, optimization, and scaling of high-performing ads



You will also manage advanced tracking infrastructure, including:



• Implementing and managing Google Tag Manager

• Deep understanding of Google Analytics (GA4) for campaign analysis

• Setting up conversion tracking across multiple funnels

• Using UTM parameters correctly across campaigns

• Tracking and identifying which ad sets, audiences, and creatives are producing results



Your job is not just running ads — it is understanding the data behind the ads and continuously improving campaign performance.



?



What You’ll Need to Succeed



To be considered for this role, you must have exceptional experience with Google Ads.



We are specifically looking for someone who:



• Has extensive hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns

• Understands Google Tag Manager at an advanced level

• Has deep experience using Google Analytics (GA4) to analyze campaign performance

• Fully understands UTM tracking and attribution across campaigns

• Has experience running Performance Max campaigns successfully

• Has strong experience with YouTube Ads and video retargeting

• Is highly skilled with retargeting strategies across the Google ecosystem

• Has experience running conversion-based call campaigns

• Understands how to structure campaigns for scaling and optimization



You should also be:



• Data-driven and analytical

• Detail-oriented with campaign tracking

• Comfortable managing multiple campaigns and testing strategies

• Focused on results, conversions, and ROI



Again — this role is specifically for experienced Google Ads professionals.



?



Why You’ll Love This Role



• Work with a team that values expertise and results

• Manage high-impact campaigns where your work directly drives growth

• Opportunity for long-term work if you perform well

• You will have the ability to apply advanced strategies, not just basic ad management



We are looking for someone who takes ownership of campaigns and continuously improves performance.



?



How to Apply



When applying, please include:



1?? A brief summary of your experience managing Google Ads campaigns

2?? Examples of campaigns you have managed (especially lead generation)

3?? The types of Google campaigns you have the most experience with

4?? Your experience with Google Tag Manager, GA4, and conversion tracking



?? Applications that do not demonstrate real Google Ads experience will not be considered.



?



Important



To show that you actually read this entire job post, please start your application with the word:



“BlueRocket”



Applications that do not include this word will not be reviewed at all.

title: Website Production & Quality Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are hiring a Website Production & Quality Specialist to review, refine, and finalize websites before they are delivered to customers. Your responsibility is to ensure every site meets our internal quality checklist and standards for layout, structure, clarity, and consistency.



This is a hands-on role inside our WYSIWYG editor. You will not simply point out issues. You will fix them.



We are looking for someone who is able to commit to this role full-time and treat it as their primary professional focus.



This is a remote contract role.



What You’ll Do



• Review completed websites against a defined quality checklist

• Work directly inside our editor to correct layout, spacing, formatting, and structural issues

• Ensure headings, sections, links, and metadata are implemented correctly

• Improve unclear or awkward copy where needed

• Ensure consistency across all pages within a site

• Perform final quality checks before sites are considered complete

• Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements to internal processes



Required Skills and Experience



• Exceptional attention to detail. You naturally notice spacing inconsistencies, formatting errors, broken links, and structural issues

• Direct experience using WYSIWYG website editors or builders

• Confidence making layout and content edits independently

• Strong written English and ability to improve clarity

• Ability to work methodically through structured checklists without missing small issues

• Availability to commit full-time to this role as your primary professional focus



Nice to Have



• Experience reviewing small business websites

• Background in website production, publishing, or editorial roles

• Basic understanding of SEO structure and page hierarchy



Working Hours and Location



• Remote role based in the Philippines

• Core working hours aligned with EST

• First two weeks of training may require availability during PST hours

Looking For:

Python (Core Requirement)

 ? Write and run scripts confidently

 ? Debug issues independently

English (Critical)

 ? Fluent written and verbal communication

Claude API / LLM Experience

title: Get Google Reviews (Pay Per Review) ($0.75 per review around $4.50/hour)
description:
I am hiring a virtual assistant to help get Google reviews for my business. Your job will be to find real people online who are willing to exchange or leave reviews.



Most of the work will involve finding people in
 groups or 
 communities that do review-for-review exchanges and coordinating with them to leave reviews.



The reviews must stay live and cannot get deleted right away. Google is strict about where reviews come from, so you cannot use websites that sell reviews or advertise “selling reviews,” since those are often flagged and removed.



Pay:

• $0.75 per review that successfully stays posted

• Maximum paid reviews per day: 40

• Maximum you can earn per day: $30



On average, one assistant currently doing this work gets around 26 reviews per day while working about 4 hours a day, but it depends on how active you are. This means she makes around 20$ a day from 4 hours of work a day.



Methods Allowed:

You must use these methods only:

•
 groups that do review-for-review

•
 pages related to review exchanges

• Reddit communities that do review swaps



If you know other ways to get reviews that will stay live, you can suggest them and I will let you know if they are approved.



Requirements:

• Comfortable using
 and 

• Able to message people and coordinate review exchanges

• Reviews must stay posted and not get removed



How to Apply:

Send a short message explaining:

 1. Your experience with
 or 

 2. If you have done review outreach before

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / OPERATIONS COORDINATOR
description:
ABOUT US



LYNKS AI Agency is a fast-growing marketing agency specializing in lead generation for real estate and property management clients. We're scaling rapidly (5 active clients, adding more monthly) and our founder needs someone to manage his calendar, tasks, finances, and operations so he can focus on strategy and client relationships.











WHAT YOU'LL DO



Calendar Management:



• Manage calendars in Google Calendar AND GoHighLevel

• Schedule client calls, tea
etings, and personal appointments

• Send reminders before important meetings

• Coordinate time zones and avoid scheduling conflicts

Google Drive Organization:



• File organization and document management

• Keep Drive folders clean and structured

• Ensure easy access to important files

Time Management & Task Lists:



• Manage ClickUp tasks (or similar platforms like Asana, Trello, Monday)

• Keep founder on track with daily/weekly priorities

• Follow up on overdue tasks (gentle accountability)

• Track project deadlines and deliverables

Excel & Expense Tracking:



• Update Excel/Google Sheets spreadsheets

• Track expenses and categorize transactions

• Monitor recurring payments

• Organize receipts and financial data

Payment Tracking:



• Track client payments (who paid, who's overdue)

• Send invoice reminders

• Monitor subscription payments

Administrative Support:



•
 management (flag important messages)

• Follow-ups (make sure nothing falls through cracks)

• General organization and coordination



REQUIREMENTS



Must Have:



• 3+ years experience as Executive Assistant or Virtual Assistant

• Google Calendar AND GoHighLevel calendar management (must be comfortable with both)

• Google Drive organization (filing, folder structure, document management)

• ClickUp or similar task management (Asana, Trello, Monday, etc.)

• Excel/Google Sheets proficiency (formulas, tracking, data entry)

• Expense tracking and basic accounting

• Fluent English (written and spoken)

• Detail-oriented (nothing slips through the cracks)

• Proactive communication (remind before things are late, not after)

• Reliable internet and able to work Canadian business hours (8am-5pm EST)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



You're the right fit if you:



• Are extremely organized and detail-oriented

• Have experience managing calendars in multiple platforms

• Take initiative without being asked

• Can work independently with minimal supervision

• Think ahead and anticipate needs

• Are calm under pressure and handle multiple priorities

• Care about keeping things running smoothly



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



• Pay: $500 USD/month (paid monthly via Wise or PayPal)

• Hours: 40 hours/week, flexible within EST business hours

• Growth: As the agency grows, this role can expand with more responsibility

• Stability: Long-term position for the right person



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message with:



1. Experience Summary:  • How many years as EA/VA?

  • Have you managed calendars in GoHighLevel before?

  • What task management tools have you used?
