2. Answers to these questions:  • Describe a time you caught something that almost fell through the cracks. How did you handle it?

  • How do you prioritize when everything feels urgent?

  • What's your availability? Can you work 8am-5pm EST overlap hours?



3. References:  • At least 1 previous client/employer who can vouch for your work



4. Short intro:  • Why you're interested in this role

  • What makes you a great fit



Subject line: "Executive Assistant - [Your Name]"

[11:38 PM]We'll review applications within 3-5 days and reach out to top candidates for an interview.



- Austin Furtado, Founder

LYNKS AI Agency

title: High-Accountability Fleet Maintenance Coordinator (FMC)
description:
We don’t need a "helper"; we need a leader to take full ownership of our fleet maintenance. Your job is simple but demanding: Ensure our vehicles are 100% road-ready and our maintenance team (mechanics/inspectors) hits every deadline. No excuses.



Why You?



You are bored by easy jobs.



You naturally take charge and don't mind being the "bad guy" to hit a deadline.



You hate inefficiency and disorganization.



You prefer to be judged by your results, not your hours.



Your Command:



Oversee the Entire Lifecycle: You own the maintenance process from the 
nt a vehicle hits 4,900 miles until the service is closed.



Drive Accountability: You manage the mechanics and inspectors. If they are behind, you get them back on track.



Execute the Plan: Coordinate repairs, monitor performance, and ensure every task is done to our high standard.



Solve Problems: When a vehicle goes down, you find the fastest path to getting it back to our members.



Requirements:



Assertive Communication: You can handle tough conversations with technicians.



Systems Expert: You must be proficient in fleet software (Fleetio experience is a massive plus).



Decisive: You don't wait to be told what to do; you see the gap and fill it.



The No-Go List:



If you need your hand held, do not apply.



If you struggle with giving direct feedback, do not apply.



If you are not comfortable using technology to track every bolt and oil change, do not apply.



To Be Considered:

We move fast, and we expect our leaders to do the same.



Submit a Video Intro: Record a 2-minute video of yourself (use Loom, YouTube, or Google Drive).



The Content: Tell me exactly how you will ensure our mechanics hit their deadlines and how your leadership will keep our fleet at 100% readiness for our members.

title: Brand & Visual Identity Designer (I/C)
description:
Remote | Philippines-Based | Full-Time | U.S. Company



We are a U.S.-based organization entering a new growth phase and seeking a full-time Brand & Visual Identity Designer to help shape and elevate our brand direction.



This is not a basic graphic design role.



We are looking for someone who understands how visuals influence decision-making, how design positions authority, and how brand identity impacts perception.



You will help rebrand sales materials, refine visual identity, and support ongoing brand marketing initiatives.



What This Role Is



• Brand positioning through design

• Sales deck redesign with emotional intelligence

• Strategic image selection

• Visual storytelling

• Building consistency across all brand assets

• Supporting long-term brand direction



What This Role Is NOT



• Basic Canva editing

• Logo-only design

• Order-taking without strategic thinking

• Template recycling



We need someone who understands WHY certain visuals work and how design influences trust, credibility, and action.



Responsibilities



• Redesign and elevate sales presentations

• Develop brand identity consistency across materials

• Select and position images strategically

• Create marketing assets aligned with positioning goals

• Collaborate on visual direction for new initiatives

• Maintain brand cohesion across platforms

• Provide creative input on visual strategy



Requirements



• Strong portfolio demonstrating brand identity work

• Understanding of emotional design and buyer psychology

• Experience creating high-impact sales decks

• Ability to explain design decisions logically

• Strong communication skills

• Ability to work independently

• Reliable internet connection

• Professional home office setup



Work Structure



• Full-time, long-term position

• Initial overlap required with U.S. Eastern Time

• Hybrid flexibility once working relationship is established

• Collaboration during U.S. business hours as needed



Design work may be completed during your preferred creative hours, provided deadlines and collaboration needs are met.



Compensation



• Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

• Long-term creative partnership opportunity

• Opportunity to shape brand direction at a strategic level



Application Instructions (Mandatory – Read Carefully)



To be considered, you MUST complete ALL of the following:



Submit your resume



Submit your portfolio (must include brand identity and presentation work)



Submit a 1–2 minute video introduction



Complete the short online DISC assessment (5–10 minutes) here:







Applications missing required steps will NOT be reviewed.



Video Instructions



In your 1–2 minute video, please include:



• Your approach to brand positioning

• How design influences emotion and decision-making

• An example of a project where you intentionally used visuals to drive a specific response



We are looking for strategic thinking, not just technical skill.



This role is ideal for someone who sees design as positioning, not decoration. If you think in terms of perception, influence, and brand authority, we encourage you to apply.

title: Credit Operations Specialist
description:
Elite Credit Group is a fast-growing credit consulting company that has helped thousands of clients improve their credit and move closer to homeownership and financial freedom.



We are looking for a detail-oriented Credit Operations Specialist to support our dispute and reporting process.



This role is critical to our operations. The person in this position will be responsible for reviewing client credit reports, identifying changes, updating our CRM system, and coordinating daily dispute activity with our dispute managers.



If you are organized, experienced in credit reporting, and thrive in a structured environment, we would love to meet you.



Location

Remote



Schedule

Monday – Friday

10:00 AM – 3:00 PM PST

5 hours per day



Compensation

$4..50 per hour



Position may transition from part-time to full-time based on quality of work and reliability.



---



ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES



Daily review of client credit reports through SmartCredit and IQ Credit Monitoring



Download and upload new credit reports into our CRM system (Dispute Fox)



Analyze credit report changes such as:



• Deleted accounts

• Updated balances

• Status corrections

• Newly reported items

• No changes



Update the client file inside Dispute Fox with all new activity



Maintain accurate documentation of report updates



Notify the internal team through Slack when client updates are processed



Prepare and organize the daily dispute list for the dispute management team



Communicate internally with dispute managers to ensure disputes are processed efficiently



Respond to client questions when necessary regarding report updates or dispute progress



Maintain strict attention to detail and confidentiality with client information



Follow company processes and documentation standards



---



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



Minimum 5 years of experience working with credit reports or credit repair



Strong understanding of credit reporting including:



• Charge offs

• Collections

• Late payments

• Account status updates

• Credit monitoring platforms



Experience working with CRM systems such as:



HubSpot

Dispute Fox

or similar client management systems



Strong computer and document management skills



Ability to review reports and identify small changes quickly and accurately



Comfortable working in a structured workflow environment



---



PERSONAL QUALITIES WE VALUE



Highly detail oriented



Reliable and consistent



Coachable and open to feedback



Friendly and respectful communicator



Strong team player



Able to work under deadlines and daily production expectations



Professional and organized



Committed to high standards of work



---



HOW TO APPLY



If you believe you are a strong fit for this role, please send the following:



Your resume



A short paragraph explaining your experience with credit reports or credit repair



Your experience with CRM systems

title: LinkedIn Ghostwriter — AI & Automation Agency
description:
The Role

We're looking for someone to fully own and manage the founder's personal LinkedIn profile. The founder runs an automation agency serving e-commerce and logistics companies — so the content needs to reflect deep knowledge of AI, automation, and how businesses actually use these tools to grow. This isn't generic "5 tips for productivity" content. We need someone who understands the AI and automation space, follows the trends daily, and can turn that knowledge into scroll-stopping LinkedIn posts.



What You'll Do



Write and publish 4–5 LinkedIn posts per week in the founder's voice — a mix of insights, hot takes, case studies, and thought leadership around AI and automation

Stay on top of AI news and trends (new tools, use cases, industry shifts) and turn them into timely, relevant content

Engage daily on target prospects' and industry leaders' posts with thoughtful, value-adding comments — not generic fluff

Manage inbound DMs and send personalized outreach to potential clients and partners

Grow the founder's network strategically — connecting with e-commerce operators, logistics companies, agency owners, and tech decision-makers

Track key metrics weekly: follower growth, post impressions, engagement rate, DM response rate

Collaborate with the founder on content ideas — bring topics to the table, don't wait to be told what to write





Requirements



1+ year managing LinkedIn profiles (ghostwriting, personal branding, or agency experience)

Genuinely knowledgeable about AI and automation — you follow this space because you're interested, not because it's a job requirement

Can write in a natural, conversational, opinionated tone — not corporate, not ChatGPT-sounding

Understands the LinkedIn algorithm — what gets reach, what gets engagement, what gets ignored

Proactive and self-managing — you plan the content calendar, not the founder

Strong written English with the ability to match someone else's voice

Familiar with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, n8n, Make, etc.) — bonus if you actually use them



Apply here:

title: MCA Underwriter | Full-Time EST
description:
Hours: Mon–Fri, EST business hours overlap required





About the Role

We're a merchant cash advance company looking for a skilled underwriter to join our team. You'll be responsible for reviewing MCA applications, analyzing merchant financials, assessing risk, and making funding recommendations. This is a high-volume, fast-paced role where speed and accuracy both matter. You'll work directly with our sales and funding teams to move deals through the pipeline efficiently.



What You'll Do



Review and analyze incoming MCA applications and supporting documents

Examine 3–6 months of business bank statements to evaluate cash flow, daily balances, and revenue trends

Identify red flags such as NSFs, negative balances, stacking, and undisclosed positions

Calculate key metrics including average daily balance, monthly revenue, and deposit consistency

Determine funding amounts, hold-back percentages, and terms based on risk assessment

Issue approvals, declines, or request additional documentation with clear reasoning

Communicate underwriting decisions to the sales team with turnaround expectations

Maintain accurate records and notes in the CRM/underwriting platform

Meet daily volume targets (typically 15–25+ applications per day)

Stay current on MCA industry trends, compliance requirements, and risk factors





Requirements

Must-haves:



2+ years of hands-on MCA or alternative lending underwriting experience

Strong ability to read and interpret business bank statements quickly

Understanding of MCA-specific risk factors — stacking, split funding, seasonal businesses, etc.

Experience calculating daily balances, average monthly revenue, and position exposure

High attention to detail with the ability to spot inconsistencies and fraud indicators

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Available during US business hours (at least 9 AM–5 PM EST)

Strong written English for internal communication and deal notes



Nice-to-haves:



Experience with underwriting tools like DecisionLogic, Plaid, Ocrolus, or LendingFront

Familiarity with CRMs such as Salesforce, HubSpot, or industry-specific platforms

Background in other alternative lending products (revenue-based financing, business lines of credit, equipment financing)

Experience training or mentoring junior underwriters

Knowledge of UCC filings and lien searches





What We Offer



Stable, long-term full-time position — not a short-term project

Clear underwriting guidelines and support — you won't be guessing

Opportunity to grow into a senior or lead underwriter role

A team that values speed, good judgment, and reliability



How to Apply:

title: Operations Manager — Automation Agency
description:
Operations Manager Automation Agency |

Hours: Mon–Fri, EST business hours overlap required





Who We Are

We're a growing automation agency that builds custom n8n workflows, API integrations, and AI-powered systems for e-commerce and logistics companies. 



Who You Are

You're the person who walks into chaos and creates order — without being told how. You've managed operations at an agency or tech company before, you understand automation and APIs at a working level, and you don't need hand-holding to figure out what needs to happen next. You see a gap, you fill it. You see a fire, you put it out. You're the adult in the room.

This isn't a VA role. This is a right-hand operator position. You'll own the day-to-day operations so the founder can focus on selling and building.



What You'll Own



Client management — Be the main point of contact for active clients. Handle updates, requests, timelines, and expectations so the founder isn't in every Slack thread and
 chain.

Project management — Track all active builds across clients. Know what's on track, what's behind, and what's blocked — before anyone has to ask.

Scoping and QA — Review client requests, scope out what needs to be built, and QA completed n8n workflows and integrations before delivery. You don't need to be the best builder, but you need to understand what you're looking at.

Team management — Manage VAs and contractors. Assign tasks, review output, hold people accountable. Eventually, hire new tea
mbers as we grow.

Building systems — Create the SOPs, processes, and documentation that don't exist yet. Build the operating system for the agency from the ground up.

Light building — Handle simpler n8n workflows and automation builds independently, freeing the founder for complex architecture work.





Requirements



3+ years in operations, project management, or agency management

Working knowledge of automation tools — n8n, Make, or Zapier (you don't need to be an expert builder, but you need to understand workflows, APIs, and webhooks)

Experience managing remote teams (VAs, contractors, or developers)

Comfortable communicating directly with US-based clients via Slack,
, and occasional video calls

Highly organized with a track record of building processes where none existed

Self-directed — you figure out what needs to happen and do it without waiting for instructions

Strong written and spoken English

title: Real Estate Data Manager
description:
Company Overview: We are a fast-growing real estate investment firm focused on data-driven strategies to make informed decisions. We leverage technology to streamline processes, maximize lead generation, and drive better client and partner outcomes. We're looking for a skilled Real Estate Data Analyst who can help us make the most out of our platforms and enhance the efficiency of our operations.



Position Overview: We seek an experienced and detail-oriented Real Estate Data Analyst who is highly proficient in using tools such as Podio, Xencall, DealMachine, and REI Sift to gather, analyze, and manage real estate data. This role is ideal for someone who has hands-on experience in real estate data analysis and is comfortable working with CRM and lead generation tools in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities:



*Analyze, clean, and manage real estate data to support decision-making and strategy development.

*Manage and optimize our CRM system (Podio), ensuring efficient workflows and tracking of leads, deals, and tasks.

*Utilize Xencall to monitor and enhance our communication strategies for contacting and following up with leads.

*Integrate DealMachine to ensure optimal lead generation, tracking, and driving ROI on direct mail campaigns.

*Work with REI Sift to filter, clean, and sort lead lists, ensuring high-quality lead acquisition for our real estate business.

*Provide data insights and recommendations to the team based on trends and patterns observed in the data.

*Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to track KPIs, marketing campaigns, and real estate investment performance.

*Collaborate with other departments (sales, marketing, acquisitions) to improve processes and outcomes.



Required Skills & Qualifications:



*Proven experience as a Real Estate Data Analyst or in a similar role within the real estate investment industry.

*In-depth experience with Podio, Xencall, DealMachine, and REI Sift tools.

*Strong analytical skills with the ability to turn data into actionable insights.

*Expertise in Excel, Google Sheets, or similar data management tools for data cleaning and analysis.

*Excellent organizational and time-management skills with an ability to manage multiple priorities.

*Familiarity with real estate investment strategies, including direct mail marketing, lead generation, and CRM workflows.

*Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with remote teams.

title: Virtual Bookkeeper (PHP 535/HR - USD $9/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a part-time (~20 hours) Virtual Bookkeeper who is detail-oriented, with the potential to go full-time.



Benefits include:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay: $9USD/hr       [535 PHP/hr]

- Growth: This role is designed to grow into a full-time Lead Bookkeeper position.

- Trial Period: Opportunity to go from part-time to full-time after 90-day trial period

- Full-Time Perks: 13th-Month Pay & 18 Paid Days Off

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends





About Us 

We are a growing US-based accounting firm that specializes in Trade Service businesses (HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical). We are cloud-native, operating entirely within Google Workspace, and we utilize a modern tech stack to deliver high-quality financial insights to our clients.  



The Role 

We aren't looking for a "data entry clerk." We need a Full-Charge Bookkeeper who understands the 'why' behind the numbers. I'll ask you what your favorite dish is, answer lasagna in your application so I know you've read the full job posting. You will manage the full-cycle bookkeeping for a portfolio of clients, ensuring their data from field-service software (Service Titan/HouseCall Pro) flows correctly into QuickBooks Online.



Key Responsibilities:

- Full-Cycle QBO Management: From bank feeds and categorizations to complex month-end reconciliations.

- Workflow Mastery: Using Financial Cents to manage tasks and Dext/HubDoc for document fetching.

- Common Sense Auditing: Reviewing financial statements for accuracy and "raising your hand" when something doesn't look right.

- Journal Entries: Posting adjusting entries for depreciation, payroll accruals, and loan reconciliations.

- Tech Integrations: Ensuring third-party apps sync correctly with QBO.



Requirements:

- Education: Formal education in bookkeeping and accounting

- Experience: 5+ years in bookkeeping/accounting with a focus on US GAAP.

- Consistent Schedule: US Business Hours (8:00am - 5:00pm EST)

- Software Mastery: Expert-level QuickBooks Online and Excel skills.

- Tech Savvy: Well-versed in (or eager to master) Financial Cents, Service Titan, and Google Workspace.

- Infrastructure: A quiet workspace with a reliable internet connection and PC to connect to the virtual workstation (i5 processor / 8GB RAM preferred)

- Communication: Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)



You MUST apply with this link:

nts within long-form podcast conversations

 (video review and revisions)

Basic editing mistakes are not tolerated. This includes:

title: Investigate an AI and/or  VA Solution for Busy Sonographer Business Owner
description:
This is a research gig - 3 hours initially but may lead to ongoing weekly work. We need someone to research a concept / solution that we are seeking to assist to the owner of 3 very busy Womens Ultrasound and Maternal Fetal Medicine clinics. The owner, we'll call him Steve (not real name) is a Sonographer that  manages 15 other Sonographers across 3 sites AND sees patients of his own all day long. Steve is SUPER busy and currently manages his constantly growing 'to-do list' by putting post-it notes everywhere and anywhere. Steve is very time poor and struggles to keep up with the demands of his patients whilst trying to manage 15 other Sonographers, and a growing business. We need someone to help us investigate a technology solution (perhaps  some sort of wearable device ) that enables Steve to dictate To-Do's, save important notes, create & send
s, send messages via Microsoft Teams, add appointments to his schedule etc whilst on the move. We would like to avoid the need to type this into a device - it really needs to be a solution where Steve can verbally dictate whilst walking around or even whilst scanning patients. Steve spends a lot of time in his car driving between clinics and would like to also be able to use this potential solution whilst driving too. The solution might be purely a technology solution, or it could be a hybrid of a technology solution plus a Virtual Assistant in the Philippines that can help managing these tasks.   



I should also clarify, that this solution is NOT for my business (EXCEL-LENS ANZ). It is for my wife's company (Haven Ultrasound)  - I am organising it to help her out. I should be able to answer any questions you have, and if I can't answer it, I will bring my wife Leah into the conversation... I

title: Funding Analyst (On-site Sales Representative)
description:
Company Description



Lendflow empowers fintechs, lenders, and software companies with cutting-edge embedded credit infrastructure to build and offer tailored financial products. By utilizing an advanced credit decisioning engine, contextual product placements, and an extensive network of specialized lenders, Lendflow streamlines the creation and integration of credit solutions. This innovative platform allows businesses to enhance customer engagement, expand credit offerings, and provide small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) with easy access to capital for growth. Lendflow's solutions enable businesses to launch financial products efficiently and seamlessly within their ecosystems.



Role Description



This is a full-time, on-site role for a Funding Analyst (On-site Sales Representative) located in Cebu, Philippines. The primary responsibilities include assisting and guiding clients in securing funding solutions tailored to their needs. The role requires conducting thorough financial and credit analyses, maintaining strong client relationships through clear and effective communication, and collaborating with internal teams to align funding opportunities with client requirements.

title: IT Technical Support Engineer - Permanent WFH Remote, Flexible Hours (+10 GMT)
description:
*** DO NOT APPLY UNTIL YOU HAVE READ THIS AD IN FULL ***

We have been operating for 16 years, with the goal of making computers and technology friendlier to our awesome small business clients. We are seeking a Technical IT service officer to join our friendly team via a permanent, work-from-home arrangement. Here’s a few words from our founder: youtu.be/2hz3OBT-lPg



By joining the Amigo team, you will enjoy:



- A flexible work from home position, up to 40 hours per week, on a schedule that works for you

Ready to join? Here’s what you’ll need:



- A keen interest in working with and growing your skill sets through a wide variety of modern computing technologies (both Windows and Linux - bonus points if you have a home lab!)

- A high level of attention to detail (you must put the word "AMIGO" in the “Additional Comments” section of our application form to be considered)

- At least two years of experience working in an IT service position, ideally in an MSP that works with Windows 11, Microsoft 365 OR Google Workspace environments



This position will have many opportunities for growth, and over time you will have to encourage you to work with a wider range of technologies and platforms. Prior experience with the following would be greatly appreciated and will lead to greater earnings, although this is not a requirement:



- Debian-based Linux (eg. Linux Mint 22 / Ubuntu 24.04 or newer)

- Apple MacOS 13+

- Proxmox 8+ & Docker (or other hypervisor / virtualisation platforms)

- Small business networking and storage systems (eg. Opnsense, OpenWrt, Cockpit), including configuring Wi-Fi, DHCP, QOS, VLANs, VPNs, Samba, ZFS RAID, etc

- FreePBX 16+ / Asterisk, IP Phones & SIP



Your duties will include the following:



- Processing technical support requests, enquiries and system alerts

- Providing remote IT services via RMM & IP KVMs

- Assisting with new and existing IT systems, including setting up, migrating, monitoring, documenting and securing technical systems, such as workstations, servers and cloud-based infrastructure



If you have made it this far, great! Before you apply:



- You will be expected to learn quickly and contribute as part of a team. The workload will be both challenging and rewarding.

- We conduct background checks and our team is required to use managed remote workstations. Dishonest conduct will be quickly caught. If you’re thinking of using a mouse jiggler or being OE, please don’t apply.

- Applicants MUST submit their application via our application form, which can be found on the Amigo Technology Sunshine Coast website via the Careers section in the top menu. All other application methods will be IGNORED. 
/form-technical-officer-application



Please double check the responses to your resume to ensure they are correct - over 90% of applicants fail to submit their application with correct answers. We will only contact valid submissions. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Business Development Manager
description:
About the job



Please don't apply unless you are an overachiever and can prove it. Come & build a company within our fine, progressive company. We are in the Tech industry, but we don't hire backgrounds. We hire top producers.



We will train someone who has everything we want. Small base, but substantial performance rewards and commissions to get you to 100K and beyond each year. Must be excellent at creativity, market knowledge, and hungry to learn new trends and reach the masses. Must be highly self-motivated, a terrific presenter, and a communicator. Come and build your career within our open and flat-cultured progressive company. We have a superb reputation and need real stars to bring in the best accounts.



We are looking for a Business Development Manager. You will work in a company with a flat hierarchy and a culture that advocates straight talk. You will have much autonomy in planning your weekly work activities.



YOU CAN STILL APPLY IF YOU ARE FROM AUSTRALIA, NEW ZEALAND, EUROPE or USA.



JOB DESCRIPTIONS



- We are developing business strategies to draw in potential customers and solicit new customers from different channels.

- Identify client needs and suggest appropriate business solutions for tech to help grow revenue or reduce costs.

- Make presentations of the customized software/solutions to communicate benefits to customers during the lead generation.

- Proactively seek new business opportunities by contacting potential customers through cold
ing or responding to inquiries from different channels and campaigns.

- Creating relationships with customers to identify their potential needs and qualify their interests and viability to drive sales leads for software or IT services.

- Moving solid leads through the marketing funnel, connecting them to a salesperson, and arranging in-person meetings,
s, or phone calls.

- Following up with potential customers who expressed interest when contacted.

- Performing regular follow-up calls or
s and facilitating communication with existing customers to ensure their satisfaction and identify new potential needs.

- Collaborating with internal tea
mbers to ensure the company's goals and targets are met.

- Making different strategies for software services and products and identifying different target customers and companies in Singapore, AUSTRALIA, NEW ZEALAND, EUROPE, USA and beyond



REQUIREMENTS



- 5+ years experienced, young or old BUT Sales or Marketing or Business enthusiasts for the tech & software products.

- Successful completion of coursework or self-study in sales techniques, marketing, and communication may be advantageous.

- Good time management and client management skills.

- Good
 etiquette, well-written communication, and computer literacy skills.

- Strong verbal communication skills, well dressed, and confident in approaching potential customers.

- Strong track record of sales development. Able to manage cold and warm sales leads to obtain a purchase order for them for our IT services.

-  following sales pipeline and tools religiously.

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, startup environment, and be comfortable with ambiguity.



WHY THIS CAN BE JUST THE ONE FOR YOU



- Basic salary and higher performance/outcome bonus. So you can d
 how you get paid. No cap.

- Cover for insurance and medical benefits.

- Yearly Learning funds so you progress in what you do and learn new things.

- Yearly performance value bonus on the successful closing of a new client( with quality, timely and without friction) in All stages - even for repeat buyers

- Hybrid workplace. One day WFH and four days work in the office. This may change

- No dress code since we are a small company

- Monthly company dinners and outings

- Open and flat hierarchy culture. Come to the table and talk. We prefer kindness over niceness.

- Free books and self-learning tools from the company related to business, Product Management and People skills

- Learn different businesses by directly working with them

- Learn technologies and gain a deeper understanding of them. If you'd like to go deeper with code or tools, you are more than welcome to suggest or do. We appreciate pro-activeness.

- Options to do some project management and tech strategies so you understand 360 degrees of your work.

- If you got what it takes, The long-term next stage you can go to is to be a brand CMO or Country manager and lead a team of product managers, sales, and marketing staff under you to create and follow processes to expand the brand(s)/businesses.

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
POSITION OVERVIEW

We are hiring a Senior Graphic Designer (International Tea
mber) to support our Communications and Fundraising teams.



You will create:

- Fundraising appeals

- Impact reports

- Social media graphics

-
 campaigns

- Print collateral

- Program marketing materials

- Campaign branding assets



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

- Design print and digital materials aligned with brand standards

- Develop creative concepts from idea to final production

- Create graphics for social media,
, and web

- Produce high-level fundraising campaign visuals

- Prepare files for print production (pre-press knowledge required)

- Maintain consistency across all Foundation communications

- Collaborate with U.S.-based tea
mbers via Slack and project management tools

- Manage deadlines and prioritize multiple projects simultaneously



About the Phi Kappa Psi Foundation

The Phi Kappa Psi Foundation is a U.S.-based nonprofit organization, with a growing international workforce, committed to developing principled leaders through scholarships, leadership programming, and transformational educational experiences.



We serve thousands of alumni, donors, and undergraduate members across North America. Our communications and fundraising efforts directly support leadership programs and scholarship initiatives that impact students’ lives.



We operate under a Distributed Leadership Model, meaning leadership is shared, expertise is valued, and good ideas are expected to come from everywhere on the team.



Our culture is guided by our Team Credo, which emphasizes:

- Respect and fairness

- Collaboration and trust

- Integrity and ethics

- Excellence and innovation

- Leadership and reliability 



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- 4–7+ years professional graphic design experience

- Strong portfolio (REQUIRED)

- Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Cloud (InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop)

- Strong typography and layout skills

- Print production knowledge

- Experience designing for
 and social platforms

- Excellent English communication skills

- Experience working U.S. hours



THE IDEAL CANDIDATE

You are highly organized, detail-oriented, and results-driven, with the ability to manage multiple projects while maintaining a high standard of quality and consistency. You are self-disciplined and comfortable working independently, yet you also thrive as part of a collaborative team where ideas are shared openly and everyone contributes to achieving common goals. You welcome feedback as an opportunity to improve and are committed to continuous learning and professional growth. Most importantly, you are passionate about doing meaningful work that has a real impact. We are actively reviewing applications and looking to hire soon.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

- Competitive full-time salary (based on experience)

- Long-term role with growth potential

- Stable U.S.-based organization

- Collaborative team culture

- Opportunity to build high-visibility design portfolio pieces



WORKING HOURS

This is a full-time position aligned with U.S. Eastern Time operations. We are open to two scheduling options:



Option 1: Full U.S. Eastern Time Coverage

Work 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern Time (U.S.), Monday through Friday.

(This is 9:00 PM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time, depending on daylight savings adjustments.)



Option 2: Shift Overlap Schedule

Work a schedule that provides meaningful overlap with our U.S. team. This option must include:

- A minimum of 4–5 hours of live overlap between 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM Eastern Time

- Total shift of 8 hours per day



Example overlap schedules may include:

- 6:00 AM – 3:00 PM Eastern (6:00 PM – 3:00 AM PHT)

- 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM Eastern (7:00 PM – 4:00 AM PHT)

- 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM Eastern (10:00 PM – 7:00 AM PHT)



We are flexible and will consider both options for the right candidate. However, strong availability during core U.S. team collaboration hours is required.



HOW TO APPLY

1. Please follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.

2. Do NOT
 directly. All communication should happen within the OnlineJobs.PH messaging.

3. Begin your message with the word COMPASS so we know you read the entire post.

4. Subject line must say: Phi Psi Foundation – Senior Graphic Designer (ITM)

5. When replying to this job listing, include a link to your resume, work samples, and DISC profile if you have it. 

6. Answer the following questions: 

6A.  What is one design detail most people overlook that you always notice? 

6B.  Which project in your portfolio best represents your work and why?

6C.  In one sentence, suggest one improvement you would make to the design of our website homepage: 

7. Indicate which working hours option you prefer (Option 1 or Option 2)

8. Please confirm you are applying as an individual designer and not an agency.

9. Incomplete applications will not be considered.

description:

Certificates in Scrum

Experience working in global teams

Plus to have a knowledge of technologies, UI/UX, Any Programming language, Digital tools or frameworks and infrastructure





What you'll learn

Hone communication skills

What is in it for you

Project value bonus on the successful launch of sprints ( with quality, timely and without friction) in All stages, and you will be managing multiple projects

Learn different businesses by directly working with them

Optional to do some business proposals so you understand 360 degrees of your work.

The next stage you can go to is to be an Operations manager and lead a team of other project/product managers under you to create and follow processes that focus on Quality, Strategy, Timelines and user experience in whatever we do.

title: Senior Bookkeeper (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About Everything Accounted For (EAF)

At Everything Accounted For (EAF), we provide specialized bookkeeping services to businesses across a wide range of industries. Our clients range from small owner-operated companies to multi-million-dollar organizations with over 200 employees.

Our role is to handle the day-to-day financial operations behind the scenes so business owners can focus on growth. We maintain accurate books, perform month-end closes, and provide clear, timely financial reporting that clients rely on to make decisions.

We currently support over 50 clients and continue to grow.



The Role

We are looking for a Senior Bookkeeper who can own client files from start to finish, not just perform tasks.

This role is best suited for someone who:

- Is highly detail-oriented but also understands the bigger financial picture

- Is comfortable working independently and making judgment calls

- Enjoys solving problems and figuring things out

- Has experience managing multiple clients or entities simultaneously

This is not an entry-level role. You should be confident handling full-cycle bookkeeping with minimal supervision and producing clean, accurate books that are ready for accountant review.



Key Responsibilities

Full-Cycle Bookkeeping & File Ownership

- Own the accuracy and completeness of assigned client files

- Manage A/P, A/R, invoicing, and reconciliations

- Maintain and review charts of accounts

- Investigate discrepancies and resolve issues independently

Month-End Close

- Perform and complete month-end close processes

- Reconcile bank, credit card, and loan accounts

- Review financial statements for accuracy and anomalies

- Ensure books are accurate and ready for review at all times

Financial Reporting

- Prepare Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, and A/R Aging reports

- Maintain organized, audit-ready financial records

Payroll & Remittances

- Manage payroll entries and payroll runs

- Process payroll remittances, and WSBC where applicable

Process Improvement

- Identify inefficiencies and suggest improvements

- Help develop and refine internal systems and workflows

Team Collaboration

- Participate in tea
etings

- Stay available on Slack during working hours

- Support teammates and contribute to solutions



What We’re Looking For

Experience

- 5+ years of full-cycle bookkeeping experience

- Strong QuickBooks Online experience required

- Experience preparing books for year-end and working with accountants

- Experience managing multiple clients or companies simultaneously is strongly preferred

- Experience in a bookkeeping firm or multi-client environment is an asset

Technical Skills

- QuickBooks Online (required)

- Google Workspace, MS Office, Outlook, Dropbox

- Slack and Loom

- Experience with Stripe, PayPal, Sage, or Xero is a plus

Core Competencies

We are specifically looking for someone who demonstrates:

- Strong independent problem-solving ability

- Exceptional attention to detail

- Strong organizational and time management skills

- The ability to work efficiently without sacrificing accuracy

- Comfort switching between multiple files and priorities

- Reliability and accountability

- Professional judgment and discretion with confidential data

You should be comfortable:

- Investigating and resolving discrepancies without step-by-step instructions

- Learning unfamiliar processes or tools independently

- Asking thoughtful questions when necessary, but not relying on constant direction



Work Environment

- Fully remote position

- Up to 40 hours per week

- Core hours aligned with PST

- Collaborative team environment using Slack and video calls



Why Join EAF?

At EAF, we value:

- Problem-solving

- Accuracy and speed

- Initiative

- Continuous learning

- Always finding a better way to do things

Our team takes ownership, supports one another, and continuously improves how we work. You’ll have the opportunity to make a real impact and help businesses succeed.



How to Apply

Please include the word “EVERYTHING” in your subject line.

In your application, please also include:

1. A brief description of the most complex bookkeeping file you’ve managed

2. The number of clients or companies you handled at one time

3. An example of a bookkeeping issue you identified and resolved independently

Applications that do not include this information may not be reviewed.

title: AI Video & Image Creative / Editor (Full-Time or Part-Time, Remote)
description:
About Us

We’re a new AI video and image creative agency + lab working at the crossroads of cinema, art, storytelling, and advertising.

We create cinematic and dynamic visuals for both commercial brands and artistic projects, combining creative vision with the latest AI video, image, and sound tools.

We’re a small, ambitious team building something exciting — equal parts production studio and experimental creative lab.



?



The Role



We’re looking for a Video & Image Creative / Editor who loves storytelling, rhythm, and visual design, and is excited to grow with the new wave of AI-powered creation.



You’ll help create and edit cinematic videos, image compositions, and AI-based visuals, working closely with our creative director and strategist.

You’ll use tools such as Runway, Pika, Veo3, Higgsfield, Midjourney, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, and ChatGPT — and we’ll train you to master new ones as they emerge.



?



Requirements

 • Passion and experience in video editing or visual storytelling.

 • Basic familiarity with AI creative tools (Runway, Pika, Midjourney, etc.) or a strong willingness to learn.

 • Good eye for composition, light, rhythm, and cinematic feeling.

 • Comfortable following creative direction, SOPs, and feedback loops.

 • Communicative, reliable, and a genuine team player.

 • Basic audio-editing knowledge (or interest to learn).



?



Growth & Commitment

 • 30–40 hours per week (negotiable depending on skill level).

 • $600–$800 USD per month (negotiable).

 • Long-term role with real opportunities for growth — future positions include Senior Creative, R&D Specialist, or Art Director.

 • We support your training with AI video and image courses and access to premium creative tools.



?



To Apply



Please start your message with the word “Tommy” so we know you read the entire post carefully.



Then send:

 1. A few sentences about yourself and the stuff you like — your interests, inspirations, or creative influences.

 2. A short note on your experience and favorite tools.

 3. A link to your portfolio (Google Drive, YouTube, or website) showing your best AI edits, videos, or visuals.

 4. Your expected monthly rate (USD) and weekly availability.

title: AI Image Editing VA (Nano Banana / AI Generation)
description:
We are looking for a reliable AI image editing VA to help edit product photos for our Shopify store.



Your main task will be to replace the white models in product images with black models using AI tools while keeping the clothing product exactly the same.



You will also be responsible for uploading the edited images directly to Shopify product pages, so Shopify experience is required.



This is a part-time position. The first task will likely last 1 to 4 days, but we regularly have AI image generation work and may continue working together if the collaboration goes well.



We also work with multiple store owners, so good workers may receive additional work opportunities.



Main Tasks



Edit 100 to 500 product images



• Replace the white models with black models using AI tools

• Keep the clothing product identical

• Maintain realistic lighting and proportions

• Upload the edited images to the correct Shopify product pages

• Ensure product images remain clean and professional



Requirements



You must have experience with:



• AI image generation tools (Nano Banana or similar)

• Realistic AI image editing

• Shopify product listing and media management (mandatory)



You must also:



• Be available at least 6 hours per day when needed

• Work efficiently and follow instructions carefully

• Communicate clearly and be reliable



Payment



$3 per hour



We know approximately how long these tasks take.



If someone lies about hours worked, we will stop working with them immediately.



We value honesty and efficiency.



Test Task (Required to Apply)



To apply, you must complete a small test task.



A Google Drive link with 5 product images is provided.





Your task:



• Replace the white model with a black model

• Keep the clothing product exactly the same

• Maintain realistic lighting and proportions



Once completed, reply to this job post with your edited images.



Applications without the completed test will not be reviewed.



When Applying



Please include:



• The edited test images

• The AI tools you use

• Your experience with Shopify product listings

title: Video Editor & Image Designer
description:
ABOUT US 

We are a fast-growing DTC skincare eCommerce brand. We are looking for a long-term tea
mber, not a freelancer, who wants to build a stable career with us.



We believe in empowering our team. You will get access (and training!) on premium AI tools like Higgsfield, Gemini, and ChatGPT to make your workflow faster and more creative.



WHO YOU ARE 

We are looking for a "preditor" (Producer/Editor)—someone who understands storytelling, pacing, and marketing, not just button-pushing.



- You possess a "student mindset": You take feedback well, you don't take critiques personally, and you improve quickly. We are looking for someone who wants to learn and grow, not someone who thinks they already know everything.

- You are efficient: You can edit a high-quality 60-second video in 2-3 hours and create a social graphic in 1-2 hours without sacrificing quality.

- You are detail-oriented: You have 0% tolerance for typos in captions and overlays.

- You are tech-savvy: You are excited to use AI to generate ideas and speed up your work.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

- Short-Form Video: Edit engaging Reels, Shorts, and TikToks (15–90 seconds) focused on UGC, products, and trends.

- Long-Form Video: Edit YouTube videos, and VSLs (5+ minutes) with clean pacing and storytelling.

- Engagement: Add animated captions, text callouts, B-roll, and visual hooks to keep retention high.

- Graphic Design: Create static ad creatives, quote cards, thumbnails, and simple motion ads.

- Photo Editing: Retouch, resize, and clean up product/lifestyle images.

- Copywriting: Write and polish short English hooks/headlines for your videos and ads.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS (Must Have)

- Computer Specs: You must have a PC capable of editing 4K footage and running Adobe Premiere Pro/After Effects without lag or crashing. (Recommended: 16GB+ RAM, SSD Storage).

- Internet Connection: You must have a reliable, high-speed internet connection (Fiber preferred). You will be required to download and upload large batches of raw 4K video files from Google Drive daily.

- Software: Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred), CapCut, or Final Cut + Canva/Photoshop/Figma or equivalent.



WHY JOIN US? 

- Day Shift Schedule: Enjoy your evenings and weekends! Work normal PH business hours. 

- AI Training: We pay for the tools and teach you how to use them. 

- Stability: We are looking for a partner for the long haul. 

- Portfolio: Build a portfolio with a professional beauty brand.



Schedule & Pay:

- Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM–6:00 PM Philippine time

- $600/month



HOW TO APPLY (Read Carefully) 

To ensure you are paying attention to detail, applications that do not follow these steps will be ignored.



Please reply to this job post with the subject line: "Creative Editor - [Your Name]" and include the following:

- Your video introduction.

- Your Portfolio: A link to your best work. Please highlight Short-Form Videos (TikTok/Reels).

- Your updated resume.



Hiring Process:

1. Submit Application

2. Shortlisted candidates do a simple creative test

3. Short video interview

4. Job Offer



We look forward to meeting you!

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Working 45-50 hours/week, including evenings, weekends, and holidays

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

- Initial Hours: 10 hours/week, increasing to 45 hours/week over 45 days

- Training: Paid training provided

- Raises: Based on work performance



Hiring Process

This is an audition-based hiring process. We will select 3-5 candidates for a paid audition. After reviewing your work, we'll choose one full-time hire.

- Interview: To assess mutual fit

- Notification: Candidates will be contacted within 48 hours regarding audition status

- Video Chat: For day 1 of the audition



Responsibilities

Immediate Focus:

- Pitching to Songwriting Job Boards

- Album Launch Tasks

- Bookkeeping

- Onboarding & Interviewing Staff

- Explaining service and product prices

- Answering customer inquiries

- Obtaining customer information for shipping/services

- Managing our production team

- Communicating with tea
mbers/leaders

- Hitting monthly revenue goals



Future Responsibilities (If Qualified):

- Leading meetings

- Managing teams

- Reporting analytics

- Servicing customers



Skills and Qualifications

Essential:

- Persistence and determination

- Proposal writing skills

- Time management

- Product knowledge

- Customer service proficiency

- Strong English speaking/writing skills

- Reliable internet connection



Ideal Candidate Qualities

- Flexible and eager to learn

- High integrity and commitment

- Relentless execution

- Ability to work independently

- Competitive spirit

- Receptive to constructive criticism

- Effective communication skills



Benefits



Music Manager Incentive Program

The program motivates music managers to achieve monthly revenue goals, fostering a productive environment.



Eligibility: Current management team as of Jan 12, 2025

New hires must be with Pex Life Records for 6 months to qualify

Monthly Revenue Goals and Benefits:

- At $1,200 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $675 Minimum

- Commission: 10% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement



- At $2,400 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $900 Minimum

- Commission: 15% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: Social Security System Reimbursement, Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing

- Contractual Availability

- Flexible Scheduling: Choose your working days/hours

- Job Sharing: Train others to complete your tasks

- Revenue Lock-In Structure

- Contractual lock-in for pay based on hitting revenue goals over 2-12 months.

- Compensation

Monthly Salary: $505 USD (ifgoal isn't attained)

Start Date: 2 weeks after the interview (if selected)

Long-term Position: 32-40 hours/week

Available Hours: Sunday-Thursday 6:30 PM EST - 3:00 AM EST

Work Location: Remote



Only one position is available; apply now!



Application Instructions

In your proposal, please start with "purple elephant" to confirm you've read this job description. Include components of sales management such as writing proposals to acquire clients, appointment setting, and performing introductory calls to close clients. If we'd like to move forward, we'll send you a screening exercise followed by an interview invite if you pass.

title: Social Media and Outreach Consultant
description:
Social Media and Outreach Consultant

Role: Social Media Manager / Content & Engagement Lead

Schedule: Monday–Friday 5hrs per Day



1. Overview

The Cpmpany is a Franco-Australian luxury skincare brand with global distribution across Europe, the USA, the Middle East, and Asia–Pacific. Our social-media presence is central to strengthening brand awareness, nurturing retailer relationships, and driving wholesale acquisition.

This brief outlines the responsibilities for a Social Media Outreach consultant working 5 days per week. The role combines content creation, posting, daily engagement, retailer support, lead generation, and structured outreach.

The ideal partner has experience with luxury brands, strong aesthetic sense, excellent communication skills, and a strategic understanding of luxury retail ecosystems.

 

 2. Objectives

The Social Media Manager will be responsible for driving:

1. Engagement & Retailer Relationship Building

• Maintain daily interaction with all La Fervance retailers worldwide

• Support partners through likes, comments (when appropriate), and reposts

• Enhance brand visibility on retailers’ pages

2. Lead Generation & Retail Expansion

• Identify new luxury retailers (spas, boutiques, perfumeries, clinics)

• Introduce La Fervance professionally via DM and

• Build a consistent pipeline of qualified B2B leads

3. Content Volume & Visual Presence

• Increase posting frequency via retailer reposts

• Maintain a consistent luxury aesthetic across all content

• Support brand storytelling and campaign visibility

4. Social Media Consistency & Growth

• Manage day-to-day posting

• Maintain tone, hashtags, and brand image

• Drive strategic follower growth and engagement

 

3. Daily Responsibilities (Mon–Fri)

1. Retailer Engagement (Daily)

• Visit every retailer’s Instagram page

• Like and engage with all new posts

• If no new posts, interact with older feed content

• Aim: strengthen relationships, improve visibility, support partners

 

2. Content Reposting (Daily)

• Select high-quality content from retailer feeds

• Repost 5–7 reels per day on La Fervance Instagram

• Ensure:

luxury-aligned aesthetic

refined captions

correct retailer tagging

approved hashtags

• Aim: increase content flow without additional production cost

 

3. Retailer Network Expansion

• Review followers of our existing retailers

• Identify luxury spas, boutiques, beauty institutes, perfumeries, clinics

• Like 3–5 posts from each potential partner

• Ensure all accounts fit our luxury positioning

 

4. Retailer Outreach (Daily)

• For qualified luxury outlets, send introduction DMs

• Personalise the message based on:

brand style

recent posts

geographical positioning

• Use approved outreach templates

• Track all outreach

 

4. Weekly Responsibilities

1. Lead Generation

• Identify 30–50 new luxury retailer accounts weekly

• Send personalised DMs

• Document all lead-generation activity

 

2. Reposting Summary

• 35–49 reels per week reposted from retailer content

• All content must remain consistent with the Compaanys luxury aesthetic

 

3. Marketing List Outreach

• Marketing lists (50–100 contacts) provided weekly

• For each contact:

send personalised introduction

locate their Instagram

send matching DM

• Ensure consistency between
 and social message

• Track all communication

 

4. Weekly Reporting

A detailed report must be submitted every Friday covering:

• Retailer accounts engaged

• Leads identified and contacted

• Number of reels reposted

• DM replies, interest, and conversations

• Marketing list progress

• Recommendations for optimisation

• Insights from retailers or potential partners

 

5. Standard Posting (Existing Duty)

The manager will continue to:

• Post Company branded content (products, awards, campaigns, promotions)

• Ensure all posts follow:

luxury tone

correct hashtags

approved brand aesthetic

• Communicate with Jamie for priority posts or timely product updates

 

6. Tools & Access Required

• Instagram login (La Fervance)

• Retailer list with Instagram handles

• Outreach message templates

• Weekly marketing lists from Jamie

• Caption + hashtag bank

• Tracking sheet (Excel/Google Sheet)

 

7. KPIs

Performance Indicators

• Daily retailer engagement completed consistently

• 5–7 reposted reels per day / 35–49 weekly

• 30–50 new luxury leads identified weekly

• 50–100 marketing contacts worked through weekly

• 8–10 retailer leads converted monthly

• Clear weekly reporting submitted

 

8. Communication & Meetings

• Weekly check-in via
 or WhatsApp

• Monthly 30-minute performance call

• As needed: coordination for product launches, campaigns, and special events

title: Lead Generation & Research Assistant (Hospitality Industry – Australia)
description:
We are an Australian premium beverage brand looking for a lead generation and research assistant to help our sales team find high quality hospitality businesses.



Your role will be to research premium venues, distilleries, hotels, and bottle shops and identify the correct decision makers so our sales team can contact them.



This is a research-focused role that requires strong attention to detail.



You will follow a clear lead generation system and SOP provided by our team.



About Us



We are a premium mixer brand based in Australia.



Our products are sold in:



• cocktail bars

• premium restaurants

• hotels

• distilleries

• boutique bottle shops



We work with businesses that care about high quality beverages and premium spirits.



Responsibilities



Your responsibilities include:



• Research premium venues and businesses in Australia

• Identify decision makers (owners, beverage managers, buyers)

• Find direct contact information 
 and phone)

• Enter leads into HubSpot CRM

• Categorise leads by Tier (1, 2, or 3)

• Provide weekly lead reports

• Follow our Lead Generation SOP



You will mainly be researching businesses in:



• Melbourne (Victoria, Australia)

• Southeast Queensland (Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast)



Types of Leads You Will Research



Tier 1



• distilleries

• hotels

• hospitality venue groups

• grocery buying groups



Tier 2



• premium bottle shops

• event venues



Tier 3



• cocktail bars

• wine bars

• premium restaurants



Lead Quality



We only target premium venues.



Examples of venues that are good leads:



• cocktail bars

• boutique hotels

• craft distilleries

• premium bottle shops



Venues that are NOT suitable:



• sports bars

• standard suburban pubs

• nightclubs

• large liquor chains (Dan Murphy’s, BWS, Liquorland)



Weekly Targets



You will be expected to generate:



25 – 30 qualified leads per week



Each lead must include:



• company name

• contact name

• job title

•
 address

• phone number

• website

• notes explaining why the lead is relevant



Quality is more important than quantity.



Tools You May Use



You will use research tools such as:



• Google Maps

• LinkedIn

• Instagram

• company websites

• hospitality directories



Skills Required



• Lead generation experience

• Strong internet research skills

• Attention to detail

• Good written English

• Ability to follow systems and instructions

• CRM experience is helpful (HubSpot preferred)



Hours



Starting hours:



6–8 hours per week



This role may increase in hours depending on performance.



How To Apply



To apply, please include:



A short description of your lead generation experience



The tools you normally use for research



An example of a lead you would find for a premium cocktail bar in Melbourne



Your hourly rate



Also include the word “Long Rays” in your application so we know you have read this job description.





Application Test Task



To apply for this job, please complete this short task.



Find 2 premium cocktail bars in Melbourne, Australia and provide:



• Venue name

• Website

• Contact name (bar manager, beverage manager, or owner)

•
 address (do not use a generic
 address)

• Why you believe this venue is a premium lead



Please format your answer like this:



Venue Name:

Website:

Contact Name:

 (direct
 to the located person):

Reason This Is A Good Lead:

Lead

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
Join Our Property Management Team in Australia!

We are a dynamic property management company based in Australia, seeking a highly organised and proactive Real Estate Virtual Assistant to support our property leasing and advertising operations. This is a remote role suited for someone detail-oriented, reliable, and capable of managing multiple priorities efficiently.



If You Are:

Honest and reliable

Fluent in English, both spoken and written

Meticulous with attention to detail

Excellent in time management and punctuality

Capable of working independently without constant supervision

Skilled at following up and ensuring tasks are completed

Customer-focused with strong communication skills



We'd like to hear from you.



Primary Responsibilities:

Manage end-to-end shared accommodation operations across multiple properties, ensuring stable occupancy and smooth day-to-day running.

Maintain rent performance: monitor payments, manage arrears, implement payment plans.

Handle resident issues and escalations professionally, resolving disputes and complaints with clear documentation and a firm, fair approach.

Conduct routine inspections and compliance checks, ensuring property presentation, cleanliness standards, and house rules are consistently met.

Produce operational reporting for leadership/owners: occupancy, arrears, i
, compliance status.

Collaborate with leasing, maintenance, and finance teams to deliver a consistent resident experience and tight operational control.



Requirements:

Noise-cancelling headset with clear microphone

Reliable internet connection with backup options

Two monitors for productivity

Webcam for virtual meetings

Proficiency with Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets) and Microsoft Office

Positive attitude and ability to collaborate within a remote team environment

Minimum 2-3 years of experience in Property Management

Availability to work standard Australian business hours (9AM-5PM Sydney time zone)



How to Apply:

To be considered for this position, please submit the following:

Updated resume highlighting relevant experience.

Video Recording: Record a brief introduction of yourself, explaining why you believe you are the right fit for this role. Video should start with my name. Save the recording on a platform like Google Drive or Dropbox and share the link with us.

We appreciate all applications, but only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Working 45-50 hours/week, including evenings, weekends, and holidays

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

- Initial Hours: 10 hours/week, increasing to 45 hours/week over 45 days

- Training: Paid training provided

- Raises: Based on work performance



Hiring Process

This is an audition-based hiring process. We will select 3-5 candidates for a paid audition. After reviewing your work, we'll choose one full-time hire.

- Interview: To assess mutual fit

- Notification: Candidates will be contacted within 48 hours regarding audition status

- Video Chat: For day 1 of the audition



Responsibilities

Immediate Focus:

- Pitching to Songwriting Job Boards

- Album Launch Tasks

- Bookkeeping

- Onboarding & Interviewing Staff

- Explaining service and product prices

- Answering customer inquiries

- Obtaining customer information for shipping/services

- Managing our production team

- Communicating with tea
mbers/leaders

- Hitting monthly revenue goals



Future Responsibilities (If Qualified):

- Leading meetings

- Managing teams

- Reporting analytics

- Servicing customers



Skills and Qualifications

Essential:

- Persistence and determination

- Proposal writing skills

- Time management

- Product knowledge

- Customer service proficiency

- Strong English speaking/writing skills

- Reliable internet connection



Ideal Candidate Qualities

- Flexible and eager to learn

- High integrity and commitment

- Relentless execution

- Ability to work independently

- Competitive spirit

- Receptive to constructive criticism

- Effective communication skills



Benefits



Music Manager Incentive Program

The program motivates music managers to achieve monthly revenue goals, fostering a productive environment.



Eligibility: Current management team as of Jan 12, 2025

New hires must be with Pex Life Records for 6 months to qualify

Monthly Revenue Goals and Benefits:

- At $1,200 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $675 Minimum

- Commission: 10% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement



- At $2,400 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $900 Minimum

- Commission: 15% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: Social Security System Reimbursement, Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing

- Contractual Availability

- Flexible Scheduling: Choose your working days/hours

- Job Sharing: Train others to complete your tasks

- Revenue Lock-In Structure

- Contractual lock-in for pay based on hitting revenue goals over 2-12 months.

- Compensation

Monthly Salary: $505 USD (ifgoal isn't attained)

Start Date: 2 weeks after the interview (if selected)

Long-term Position: 32-40 hours/week

Available Hours: Sunday-Thursday 6:30 PM EST - 3:00 AM EST

Work Location: Remote



Only one position is available; apply now!



Application Instructions

In your proposal, please start with "purple elephant" to confirm you've read this job description. Include components of sales management such as writing proposals to acquire clients, appointment setting, and performing introductory calls to close clients. If we'd like to move forward, we'll send you a screening exercise followed by an interview invite if you pass.

title: Job Title: Admin & Division Operations Support
description:
We are hiring a full-time Admin VA to support our National Division Organiser. Your main responsibility will be reading incoming correspondence, summarising key information and turning it into clear action items. You must be able to identify tasks, flag urgent matters and ensure follow-ups are tracked properly.

 

You will work with spreadsheets daily to track division rollout progress, performance metrics and operational updates. Accuracy is critical. You will also update our website with current local divisional information, ensuring details are correct and consistent.

 

This role requires someone organised, proactive and comfortable working within a cross-trained team. You will collate information from multiple stakeholders, follow up when needed and help keep projects moving.

 

Strong written English, solid spreadsheet skills and experience with website or CMS updates are preferred. You must have a stable, fast internet connection and be available full-time Monday to Friday.

title: Merchandise Assistant
description:
Job Title: Merchandise Assistant

Department: Merchandise

Reports To: Merchandise Planner

Location: Remote

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (AEST)

Work Arrangement: Starting at 3 days per week, with the opportunity to increase to 5 days per week based on performance and business needs.

Compensation: $230 per week



About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented Merchandise Assistant to support the merchandising and buying strategy. This role plays a key part in ensuring high levels of data accuracy and providing administrative support to the Merchandise and Buying teams to help achieve business KPIs.



The successful candidate will work closely with cross-functional teams including merchandising, buying, and production to support product planning, reporting, and data management.



Key Responsibilities



Planning & Reporting

- Create weekly and monthly trade reports to support business performance analysis.

- Provide ad-hoc reporting throughout the season as required.

- Support forecasting for core product lines.

- Assist with allocations to boutiques in collaboration with the merchandising team.



Product & Data Management

- Maintain high levels of product data integrity within internal systems.

- Create and manage product records and attributes.

- Update launch dates and maintain accurate product information.

- Implement system data changes such as Recommended Retail Prices (RRPs).

- Create and maintain digital range plans for current and upcoming product ranges.



Buying & Production Support

- Raise purchase orders and manage product setup within systems.

- Generate re-orders and coordinate with the production team.

- Review production schedules against delivery plans and communicate any changes with relevant stakeholders.

- Support administrative processes to ensure buying and merchandising teams can execute effectively.



Skills & Experience

- Previous experience in office administration and data management.

- Strong Microsoft Excel skills.

- Experience working with enterprise retail systems or merchandise planning tools.

- Fashion or retail industry experience preferred.



Key Competencies

- Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy.

- Strong time management and prioritisation skills.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.

- Flexible and collaborative team player.

- Open to feedback and continuous improvement.

- Excellent written, verbal, and stakeholder communication skills.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Support achievement of ALR Retail Sales Budget.

- Support ALR TM$ and TM% Budget targets.

- Product sell-through target of 80%.

- Maintain high standards of data integrity across systems.

- Ensure purchase orders are raised on time and in full each season.



Why Join Us

This role offers the opportunity to be part of a collaborative merchandising team, contributing to the planning and execution of product ranges while developing valuable experience in retail merchandising and buying operations.



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. Please describe your experience using Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets for reporting or data management. What functions, formulas, or tools do you commonly us



2. What tools or systems have you used to manage product data, inventory, or purchase orders? Please list the tools and briefly describe how you used them.



3. Have you worked with an ecommerce business, particularly a fashion or clothing brand? If yes, please provide the name of the company or brand, your role, and the tasks you handled related to product data, merchandising, or inventory.

s or follow-ups

s or texts to maintain engagement

 templates & brainstorm outreach ideas or automations to improve productivity Documentation & Training Support

Requirements
