title: Video Editor for an E-commerce Brand
description:
ABOUT A MAN AND HIS CAVE



A Man & His Cave is one of Australia’s leading man cave and lifestyle brands, supplying premium products nationwide across pool tables, arcade machines, pinball machines, kegerators, furniture, and bar accessories.



This role is exciting because your work will directly impact revenue. You will not just edit videos. You will craft high-performing direct response ads that drive measurable results. If you enjoy blending creativity with marketing psychology and seeing your edits convert into sales, this role is for you.





ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor with strong experience in direct response advertising. You will be responsible for producing engaging, scroll-stopping ad creatives for paid media campaigns across platforms such as
, Instagram,and YouTube.



You must understand ad hooks, retention strategies, pacing for performance, and how to edit for conversions, not just aesthetics.



This role will start at approximately 15 hours per week, with the expectation of scaling up to full-time hours within the next six months as the company continues to grow and creative production increases. Applicants should be open to expanding their availability as the role evolves.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Edit high-converting direct response video ads for paid social campaigns

- Create multiple ad variations for A/B testing

- Add captions, motion graphics, and dynamic text overlays

- Cut and optimize footage for strong hooks within the first 3 seconds

- Repurpose long-form content into short-form performance ads

- Sync video pacing with script messaging and brand voice

- Incorporate feedback quickly and iterate based on performance data

- Organize and manage raw footage, assets, and project files

- Collaborate with media buyers and copywriters to align creative with campaign strategy





DAILY AND WEEKLY TASKS



Daily:

- Edit 1 to 3 short-form direct response ads

- Review scripts and apply structured hook, problem, solution, offer framework

- Export and format creatives for different platforms

- Communicate progress updates



Weekly:

- Produce multiple ad variations for testing

- Optimize top-performing creatives

- Attend brief strategy discussions

- Organize project folders and maintain clean file systems





REQUIRED TOOLS AND PLATFORMS



You must be proficient in most of the following:

- Adobe Premiere Pro

- After Effects

- CapCut or similar short-form editing tools

- Canva for quick graphic overlays

- Google Drive

- Slack

- Asana

- Meta Ads Manager familiarity is a plus





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required Experience and Skills

- Demonstrated experience in editing direct response video advertisements for eCommerce brands, with a strong portfolio showcasing performance-driven creatives

- Solid understanding of conversion-focused editing principles, including hook development, audience retention techniques, pacing optimization, and clear call-to-action integration

- Proven ability to structure ads using established direct response frameworks such as hook, problem, solution, proof, and offer

- Experience producing UGC-style creatives tailored for paid social platforms including
, Instagram, and YouTube

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects, with the ability to incorporate motion graphics, dynamic text overlays, and performance-oriented visual elements

- Strong understanding of platform-specific best practices, including aspect ratios, formatting requirements, and audience behavior trends

- Ability to interpret creative briefs, scripts, and performance feedback to iterate and optimize content efficiently

- Strong storytelling skills with attention to detail in audio, visuals, subtitles, and overall viewer experience

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills to ensure clear collaboration with cross-functional teams

Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining accuracy, organization, and adherence to deadlines



Must Have Traits

- Reliable and consistently meets deadlines

- Detail-oriented and quality-focused

- Strong communicator

- Open to feedback and fast iterations

- Proactive problem solver

- Organized and structured workflow

- Takes ownership of results



Technical Requirements

- Stable internet connection

- Backup internet connection preferred

- Must be available during required AEST overlap hours

- Camera and microphone for team meetings



If you are passionate about performance marketing and want your work to directly impact business growth, we would love to hear from you.



To apply, please complete the application form here: 





Note: If you are unable to click the application link due to the OnlineJobs.ph interface, please copy the link and paste it directly into your browser.

title: Creator Recruitment & UGC Coordinator (Remote)
description:
Company: Biohackn (Dubai-based wellness & performance brand)



About Biohackn:



Biohackn is a Dubai-based wellness company focused on performance, recovery, and longevity. We build tools that help people improve sleep, breathing, recovery, and daily routines.



We are now expanding our UGC (User Generated Content) creator network and are looking for someone who can help us recruit creators and build a strong creator community around our products.



Role Overview



Your main responsibility will be to find and recruit content creators on Instagram and TikTok who can create short videos featuring Biohackn products.



This role is similar to creator scouting and outreach. You will identify creators, send messages, move conversations to WhatsApp, onboard them into our creator program, and track everything in a structured system.



We are looking for someone young, energetic, and naturally social who understands internet culture, TikTok trends, and viral-style content.



Key Responsibilities



Search for creators on Instagram and TikTok daily

Send outreach messages to potential creators

Follow up with creators who respond

Move conversations to WhatsApp for onboarding

Explain the creator program clearly and professionally

Share onboarding form and collect shipping details

Track all outreach and responses in a spreadsheet or CRM

Maintain relationships with creators and answer questions

Help manage creator submissions and campaigns



Daily Targets

50 Instagram outreach messages per day

40 TikTok outreach messages per day

10 follow-up messages to existing leads

Maintain tracking sheet for all outreach and responses



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is:



Young, energetic, and proactive

A natural “people person” who enjoys talking to creators

Very organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable sending outreach messages daily

Familiar with TikTok, Instagram, and viral content trends

Interested in content creation and social media growth

Reliable and consistent with daily tasks



We strongly prefer candidates who have previous experience with:



Influencer outreach

UGC creator programs

TikTok or Instagram creator management

Influencer marketing agencies

Skills That Help

Understanding of viral TikTok or Reel-style content

Ability to recognize good hooks and engaging creators

Experience communicating with influencers or creators

Strong written English communication



Tools You Will Use

Instagram

TikTok

WhatsApp

Google Sheets / CRM

Google Forms



How to Apply

Please send:

Your experience with influencer outreach or social media

Links to TikTok or Instagram accounts you have worked with (if applicable)

Your WhatsApp contact number

title: Shopify Growth Marketing Specialist
description:
? Shopify Growth Marketing Specialist 

Premium Australian Coffee Brand 

Remote – Philippines 



About Our Company 



We are a premium Australian coffee brand operating on the Shopify ecosystem, focused on delivering exceptional coffee quality, customer experience, and sustainable digital growth. 



Our business is built around three core principles: 



• Premium product quality 

• Customer experience excellence 

• Data-driven online marketing performance 



We are scaling our e-commerce presence and are looking for a high-level Shopify Growth Marketing Specialist who can think strategically, execute campaigns effectively, and drive measurable business outcomes. 



This role is ideal for a performance-driven digital marketer who wants to work with a serious brand focused on long-term online growth. 



Your Mission 



Your primary mission is to: 



• Grow online revenue 

• Improve marketing efficiency 

• Optimise customer acquisition and retention 

• Scale profitable advertising performance 



You are not just managing campaigns — you are driving business growth. 



Key Responsibilities 



• Manage and optimise our Shopify store performance 

• Improve product pages using SEO and conversion optimisation techniques 

• Write high-converting product descriptions and marketing content 

• Analyse customer behaviour and sales funnel performance 

• Plan, launch, and scale Meta 
/Instagram) advertising campaigns 

• Manage TikTok advertising performance 

• Optimise campaigns for return on ad spend (ROAS) 

• Test audiences, creatives, and marketing messaging 

• Manage
 marketing using Klaviyo or similar platforms 

• Develop customer lifecycle marketing campaigns 

• Improve customer retention and repeat purchase rates 

• Create promotional campaigns including bundles and seasonal offers 

• Provide performance insights and strategic growth recommendations 



Who We Are Looking For 



• Proven experience scaling Shopify stores 

• Strong performance marketing experience (Meta and TikTok required) 

• Advanced understanding of e-commerce funnels 

• Experience in premium consumer, food & beverage, or coffee brands is highly desirable 

• Excellent English communication and copywriting skills 

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision 

• Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset 



Performance Metrics 



Success will be measured by: 



• Increase in monthly online revenue 

• Improvement in store conversion rate 

• Reduction in customer acquisition cost (CPA) 

• Growth of
 subscriber database 

• Improvement in return on advertising spend (ROAS) 



Compensation 



Part-Time Role – 10 hours per week 

$8 – $15 USD per hour (based on experience and proven performance) 



Performance bonuses may be considered for exceptional results. 



This Role Is NOT Suitable For 



• Beginners in Shopify marketing 

• Candidates without paid advertising experience 

• People who cannot analyse performance data 

• Generic social media managers without conversion marketing experience 



How to Apply 



Please submit your portfolio, previous campaign results, and examples of successful e-commerce marketing work.

title: Performance Marketing Manager (Google & Meta Ads)
description:

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Working 45-50 hours/week, including evenings, weekends, and holidays

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

- Initial Hours: 10 hours/week, increasing to 45 hours/week over 45 days

- Training: Paid training provided

- Raises: Based on work performance



Hiring Process

This is an audition-based hiring process. We will select 3-5 candidates for a paid audition. After reviewing your work, we'll choose one full-time hire.

- Interview: To assess mutual fit

- Notification: Candidates will be contacted within 48 hours regarding audition status

- Video Chat: For day 1 of the audition



Responsibilities

Immediate Focus:

- Pitching to Songwriting Job Boards

- Album Launch Tasks

- Bookkeeping

- Onboarding & Interviewing Staff

- Explaining service and product prices

- Answering customer inquiries

- Obtaining customer information for shipping/services

- Managing our production team

- Communicating with tea
mbers/leaders

- Hitting monthly revenue goals



Future Responsibilities (If Qualified):

- Leading meetings

- Managing teams

- Reporting analytics

- Servicing customers



Skills and Qualifications

Essential:

- Persistence and determination

- Proposal writing skills

- Time management

- Product knowledge

- Customer service proficiency

- Strong English speaking/writing skills

- Reliable internet connection



Ideal Candidate Qualities

- Flexible and eager to learn

- High integrity and commitment

- Relentless execution

- Ability to work independently

- Competitive spirit

- Receptive to constructive criticism

- Effective communication skills



Benefits



Music Manager Incentive Program

The program motivates music managers to achieve monthly revenue goals, fostering a productive environment.



Eligibility: Current management team as of Jan 12, 2025

New hires must be with Pex Life Records for 6 months to qualify

Monthly Revenue Goals and Benefits:

- At $1,200 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $675 Minimum

- Commission: 10% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement



- At $2,400 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $900 Minimum

- Commission: 15% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: Social Security System Reimbursement, Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing

- Contractual Availability

- Flexible Scheduling: Choose your working days/hours

- Job Sharing: Train others to complete your tasks

- Revenue Lock-In Structure

- Contractual lock-in for pay based on hitting revenue goals over 2-12 months.

- Compensation

Monthly Salary: $505 USD (ifgoal isn't attained)

Start Date: 2 weeks after the interview (if selected)

Long-term Position: 32-40 hours/week

Available Hours: Sunday-Thursday 6:30 PM EST - 3:00 AM EST

Work Location: Remote



Only one position is available; apply now!



Application Instructions

In your proposal, please start with "purple elephant" to confirm you've read this job description. Include components of sales management such as writing proposals to acquire clients, appointment setting, and performing introductory calls to close clients. If we'd like to move forward, we'll send you a screening exercise followed by an interview invite if you pass.

title: Looking for someone to run this brand
description:
Looking for someone passionate about clean food & local farms to help build something meaningful 



I’m currently building a platform called FarmToLocal — a place where everyday people can easily find fresh, non-toxic food from local sources. 
 is the demo site. 



The vision is to create a platform that:



• Lists local farms

• Helps people find egg producers & raw dairy

• Showcases farmers markets

• Hosts clean food products from trusted producers

• Makes it easy for families to support local agriculture instead of big food corporations



More and more parents are waking up to how toxic much of our food system has become — especially when it comes to our kids. Because of that, I believe there’s a huge opportunity to build something that truly helps people.



What I'm looking for



Someone who would like to help build this project from the ground up. Someone who can grab the bull by the horns and knows what needs to be done in order to make this work. 



The role would involve things like:



• Researching local farms and food producers across the USA

• Finding USA-based food products that could be listed on the platform

• Researching social media videos and content we can recreate for our brand

• Helping brainstorm content ideas around healthy food and local sourcing

• Assisting with outreach to farms, farmers markets, and producers

• Helping organize and grow the FarmToLocal directory

• Affiliate marketing experience is a must** 

• Ability to create scripts for our video creator to use (simple short form and possible long form) 

• Ability to use AI to save time and maintain high efficiency is a must** 



Important:

All farms, products, and research should be USA-based. You’ll need to become familiar with American food brands, farms, and producers, and help find content and products that fit within that ecosystem.



The good news



You wouldn’t be doing this alone.



The project will be backed by a small digital marketing agency that will handle:



• Website development

• SEO

• Social media marketing

• content production

• growth strategy



We’ve successfully built and marketed farm-related websites before, so the infrastructure and marketing side is covered.



Who would be a great fit



Someone who:



• Cares deeply about healthy food and ingredient transparency

• Supports local farmers and regenerative agriculture

• Is organized and enjoys research and project management

• Understands or is willing to learn about USA food brands, farms, and markets

• Wants to be part of something that could grow into a large movement



Compensation



We’re open to different structures depending on the person.



If you’re interested, please send a message or comment with what you would be comfortable taking this on for, whether that’s:



• An hourly rate

• A percentage of affiliate commissions generated

• Or a combination of both

• Intern and work for free until affiliate commissions come in 



This space is already exploding, and the shift toward clean food and local sourcing is only getting stronger.



If you believe in the mission and want to help build something meaningful from the ground up, reach out and let’s talk.



Let’s build something great together

description:

title: Content & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Content & Digital Marketing Specialist (Full-Time Opportunity)



Remote Position | 38 Hours Per Week 

Long-Term Opportunity | Australian Company



Born Digital is a strategy-led digital marketing agency based in Australia.



We work with product and service-based businesses to build structured, high-performing lead generation systems — not random marketing activity.



We are looking for an experienced Content & Digital Marketing Specialist who can execute high-quality marketing content across multiple client accounts.



This is not an entry-level role.

We need someone who understands marketing performance, buyer psychology, and structured execution — not just posting on social media.





Your Responsibilities



You will work closely with the Founder (who leads strategy) and external specialists such as developers and paid ads managers.



Your role is to turn strategy into polished marketing execution.



Content & Campaign Execution



You will help create and manage:



• Website and SEO-driven content

• Landing pages using WordPress / Elementor

• Downloadable lead magnets (whitepapers, guides, reports)

• LinkedIn content and newsletters

• Supporting
 / Instagram content where relevant

•
 marketing campaigns and automated flows (B2B + eCommerce)

• Webinar presentation decks and slides

• Client communications and campaign updates



You should be comfortable taking a strategy or brief and turning it into clear, professional marketing assets.



What “Good” Looks Like in This Role



The right person for this role:



• Thinks commercially, not just creatively

• Understands buyer psychology and marketing funnels

• Can write clear, persuasive B2B copy

• Cares about structure, clarity and quality

• Understands how different marketing channels work together

• Works well inside systems and processes

• Is organised and reliable



We value quality and consistency over speed.



Growth Opportunity



There is strong potential to grow into a Project Management or Account Lead role for the right person.



This would involve:



• Managing marketing projects

• Coordinating tasks across tea
mbers

• Improving internal systems and workflows

• Communicating with clients

• Helping manage delivery across accounts



Long-term, this could evolve into running projects and managing a small team.



Requirements



To be successful in this role you should have:



• 5+ years experience in digital marketing or content roles

• Strong written English (very important)

• Experience working with B2B or service-based businesses

• Experience with WordPress / Elementor

• Experience with
 marketing platforms (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign or similar)

• Strong organisational skills

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



What You’ll Get



• Stable, long-term role with an Australian company

• Fully remote work

• Flexible part-time structure initially

• Clear pathway to full-time work

• Exposure to international clients and strategy

• Opportunity to grow into leadership



We are building a structured, long-term agency — not a short-term freelance environment.

title: Real Estate Media Virtual Assistant
description:
Are you someone who thrives in a dynamic environment and enjoys taking on a variety of tasks throughout the day? Do you have a passion for organization and helping businesses run smoothly? If so, we'd love to have you join our team!



About Us:

We are ZABE Media, a growing real estate photography business that prides itself on delivering high-quality visuals to our clients. We believe in working hard, having fun, and supporting each other along the way!

We're looking for a Virtual Assistant who shares our values and is eager to help us streamline our operations.



What You'll Be Doing:

- Quality Control & Photo Delivery: Review edited photos each morning in Lightroom when they return from our editors. Check for straight lines, proper brightness, and overall consistency before delivering them to clients. You will be the final set of eyes before galleries are sent out!

- Retouch Requests: Manage photo revision requests by communicating clearly with editors, tracking updates, and ensuring clients receive changes promptly.

- Client Acquisition: Use our Instagram outreach system to send outbound messages daily, track conversations, and follow up with potential new clients.

- Customer Success: Maintain strong relationships with our current clients by responding to messages professionally, following up after shoots, and keeping them informed about updates and new services from ZABE Media.



What We're Looking For:

- Willingness to Work in Central Time (8am – 12pm CT): Since most of our clients are based in this time zone, we need someone available and responsive during these hours.

- Strong Written English: Clear, professional communication is important since you will be interacting with clients directly.

- Attention to Detail: Quality matters to us. We need someone who takes pride in catching small mistakes before clients see them.

- Reliability & Organization: You should be dependable, able to manage multiple tasks, and comfortable following systems.

- Positive Attitude: We value a friendly, respectful, and team-oriented environment.

- Flexibility & Adaptability: We are growing quickly, so being open to learning and adjusting as we improve our systems is important.



Why You'll Love Working with Us:

Supportive Team: You’ll be working with just two owners, and we will be here every step of the way to answer any questions you may have.

Clear Systems & Expectations: We value structure and consistency, so you’ll always know what success looks like.

Room to Grow: As our business expands, there will be opportunities for a higher workload and more hours. 

If you are interested: 



 your resume, a screenshot of an internet speed test, and a video introducing yourself highlighting 3-5 points on why you’re a good fit to 
 and we will reach out with next steps!

title: Junior Landscape Draftsman (2D / 3D / Rendering) – International Projects
description:
*Please do not apply if you're not very familiar with the Landscape Design Space.



We’re looking for a Junior Landscape Draftsman who can support our local team with 2D drafting, 3D modeling, and rendering for international landscape projects (US, AU, UK, and more). 



You’ll work closely with senior designers and project leads to turn concepts into clear, buildable drawings and compelling visuals. If you love landscape design, are detail-oriented, and want daily exposure to global standards, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

 • Prepare 2D landscape drawings (plans, elevations, sections, details) using CAD software.

 • Build 3D landscape models (e.g., SketchUp or similar) based on design briefs and CAD files.

 • Produce high-quality renders and presentation images for client submissions.

 • Update and revise drawings based on markups, redlines, and feedback from senior staff.

 • Assist in organizing drawing sets for tender, construction, and presentation purposes.

 • Maintain clean file structures, layer standards, and naming conventions.

 • Coordinate with project managers to meet deadlines across different time zones.



Qualifications

 • 1–3 years of experience as a Landscape Draftsman, CAD Technician, or similar role

(Strong fresh grads with solid portfolios are welcome to apply).

 • Proficiency in 2D CAD (AutoCAD or similar).

 • Working knowledge of 3D modeling (preferably SketchUp).

 • Experience in rendering (Lumion, D5, Enscape, V-Ray, or similar) is a big plus.

 • Basic understanding of:

 • Landscape / site plans

 • Planting plans

 • Hardscape layouts

 • Levels / grading and details

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to follow standards and templates.

 • Comfortable working with foreign clients and communicating in English (written and spoken).

 • Willingness to learn fast, receive feedback, and grow into a more senior role over time.



Compensation, Credits & Growth

 • Starting (Probationary): P18,000/month

 • With good performance, salary can grow to P40,000/month and higher



We use a Credit Policy System to measure and reward:

 • Output & Quality – accuracy of drawings, clarity, reduced revisions

 • Speed & Reliability – hitting deadlines, responsiveness

 • Dedication – consistency, ownership, and professionalism

 • Long-Term Contribution – staying, improving, and helping the team grow



Important:

Salary is directly correlated with your Credit score in our system.

Higher credits = higher salary and opportunities.



What We Offer

 • Work on international landscape projects with growing long-term clients.

 • Training and mentoring to help you level up your skills.

 • Clear path from Junior to Mid / Senior Draftsman.

 • Remote work setup with performance-based incentives and bonuses.

 • A merit-based environment where your growth depends on your effort and results.

title: Remote Marketing Manager
description:
Remote Marketing Manager



NLC Engineering | Mining Maintenance Sector

Remote | Full Time | Perth Time (8:00am – 4:00pm AWST)



NLC Engineering is a growing engineering business servicing the mining maintenance sector across Western Australia. We specialise in line boring, machining, fabrication and field services for major mining companies and contractors.



We are looking for an experienced Marketing Manager to take ownership of our marketing function and help convert our strong industry position into measurable business growth.



This is a hands-on role suited to a practical marketing all-rounder who understands that marketing is not just about engagement — it’s about generating revenue and supporting the sales pipeline.



As a business with fewer than 25 employees, this role will start broad and grow alongside the business as you help expand our reach and commercial impact.



Working Hours



This is a remote position, however you will be required to work Monday to Friday from 8:00am to 4:00pm Perth time (AWST) to ensure alignment with the leadership team and business operations.



About the Role



You will work closely with the business owner and leadership team to plan and execute marketing initiatives that generate real commercial outcomes.



We already have strong foundations in place:



HubSpot CRM system



A database of nearly 5,000 industry contacts



Existing vendor approvals with major mining companies and contractors



However, these assets are currently underutilised, and we are looking for someone who can unlock their potential and turn them into consistent sales opportunities.



Your responsibilities will include:



Managing and optimising HubSpot CRM and marketing automation



Designing and running
 marketing campaigns to engage our existing database



Building awareness of our services with existing mining industry contacts



Managing and growing our organic social media presence



Creating and editing short marketing videos and content



Supporting the promotion of our machining, fabrication and parts services



Working closely with leadership to support sales opportunities and major projects



Tracking marketing activity and demonstrating clear return on investment



AI & Innovation



We believe the future of marketing belongs to people who can leverage AI effectively.



You will have:



A solid understanding of modern AI tools used in marketing and content creation



The ability to use AI to dramatically increase your productivity and impact



A growth mindset and curiosity to keep testing new tools



We are not looking for someone who will be replaced by AI.

We are looking for someone who can use AI to 10X the value they bring to the business.



About You



You understand that marketing in a small business must directly contribute to revenue growth.



You will likely have:



5+ years marketing experience, ideally in B2B, industrial or technical sectors



Strong experience using HubSpot CRM



Experience managing
 marketing campaigns and databases



Skills in organic social media and content marketing



Basic video editing and content creation



The ability to measure performance and link marketing activity to business outcomes



You are:



Self-motivated and comfortable working remotely



Practical and hands-on



Commercially minded



Curious about new technologies and tools



Motivated by creating real business impact



Why Join NLC Engineering



Flexible remote working arrangement



Opportunity to build and shape the marketing function



Direct involvement in strategic business growth



Work closely with leadership in a growing engineering company



Significant opportunity to create real impact using existing industry relationships and contacts



To Apply



Please send:



Your resume



A short cover letter



Examples of marketing campaigns or projects you have worked on

title: Technical Web & Systems Administrator
description:
Focus: Website Updates & Maintenance, API Integrations, Data Analytics & Systems Management



Role Purpose

To serve as the digital backbone of MusicNT, ensuring our network of 7 Wordpress websites is up-to-date, functional, data-accurate, and seamlessly integrated with our booking and communication tools. This role requires a blend of web development, systems logic, and meticulous data tracking.



1. Web Development & Content Management

Multi-Site Maintenance: Perform regular content updates (content provided), security patches, and theme/plugin management across all 7 MusicNT web properties.

Front-End Tweaks: Use HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript to ensure all sites remain mobile-responsive and visually aligned with MusicNT branding.

Landing Page Optimisation: Build and refine high-conversion pages for events like the NT Music Awards and National Indigenous Music Awards.



2. Systems, APIs & Integrations

Form Architecture: Expertly build and manage complex logic within Gravity Forms and Jotform and Workforms (Monday.com).

API Management: Monitor and troubleshoot API connections to ensure data flows correctly between the websites, CRM tools, Monday.com databases and payment gateways.



3. Data Analytics & Tracking (The 7-Site Oversight)

GA4 Strategy: Ensure Google Analytics 4 is correctly implemented and pulling accurate data across all 7 domains.

Cross-Domain Tracking: Setup and maintain tracking via Google Tag Manager (GTM) to ensure user journeys are captured when moving between different MusicNT sites.

Conversion Monitoring: Map "Key Events" (successful Jotform submissions, Acuity bookings, etc.) into GA4 to provide clear reporting on engagement.



4. Workflow & Communication

Project Management: Operate exclusively within Monday.com for all task tracking, internal comms, and project updates.

Reliability: Provide rapid response times to new tasks and "site down" emergencies during agreed hours.

Reporting: Deliver concise updates on site health and traffic metrics as requested.

Peak time: Be available for quick turnaround and to work on tasks concurrently during our our peak program delivery time between March–September

Off peak time: complete site maintenance and reporting-related tasks as required. There may be scope for building and populating a new MusicNT main website for the right applicant (from supplied site map and home page mockup).



Required Skills & Qualifications



English Fluency: Professional-level written and verbal English.

Technical Stack: Proven experience with WordPress, Gravity Forms, Jotform, and Acuity.

Analytics: Proficient in Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager.

Systematic Thinker: Proficient user of Monday.com for workflow automation and task management.

Time Management: Highly organised with the ability to context-switch between 7 different brand priorities without losing focus.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Site Uptime: All 7 sites remain updated, secure, and functional.

Data Accuracy: Zero "dark data" gaps in GA4; all forms are tracking conversions correctly.

Task Efficiency: Tasks moved from "In Progress" through Testing, client Review and to "Done" in Monday.com within agreed turn-around times.

Communication: Active and clear daily check-ins via your designated PM tool.

title: Sales Manager
description: We are looking for a dynamic and results-driven Sales Manager to lead our sales team and drive revenue growth by developing and executing effective sales strategies, identifying new business opportunities, and building strong relationships with corporate clients and partners. The ideal candidate must have a Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field, proven sales experience (preferably in the hospitality industry), strong leadership and negotiation skills, and the ability to analyze market trends, prepare sales forecasts, and consistently meet or exceed targets. Interested applicants may submit their updated resume to

title: Customer Service Representative at Spectre Ventures
description:
Good day! If you’re passionate about delivering top-notch customer service and excited to make a real difference in a dynamic company, we’d love to hear from you! Spectre Ventures is on the hunt for a part-time Customer Service Representative to support the growth of our online businesses, including eCommerce brands and content websites.



What You Will Do:

As a Customer Service Representative at Spectre Ventures, you’ll:

- Provide excellent customer service across multiple brands to boost satisfaction and loyalty.

- Handle customer inquiries efficiently on Zendesk, managing at least 40 tickets daily with an 85% CSAT score, under 5-minute First Response Time, and under 24-hour Resolution Time.

- Assist potential customers with pre-sale questions and support existing ones by solving issues, giving order updates, and encouraging reviews after great experiences.

- Take care of admin tasks like order logging, problem screening, processing returns, data entry, and issuing replacements or refunds as needed.

- Perform basic Shopify duties, including order fulfillment, cancellations, edits, refunds, invoice creation, and discount code generation.

- Suggest ideas to improve the efficiency and consistency of our customer service processes.



Our Ideal Candidate:

- Brings 3+ years of e-commerce customer service experience via phone and
.

- Is skilled in using Zendesk and Shopify.

- Has strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Knows how to use G-Suite tools (Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Meet).

- Shows empathy and understanding toward customers while balancing business needs.

- Is a dedicated problem solver who loves helping others, works independently, and embraces a growth mindset.

- Owns a personal computer/laptop with high-speed internet, a webcam for remote work, and a noise-canceling headset for G-Meet meetings.



Job Details:

- Part-time: 24 hours per week, Monday to Saturday (Saturday work required).

- Salary: $300/month.

- Payment: Monthly.



At Spectre Ventures, we’re all about learning and growth. We provide trainings and many opportunities to learn new skills and grow within the company. If you thrive in a supportive yet challenging setting and are eager to grow personally and professionally, we invite you to apply and join us on this exciting journey!



Apply Now and Let’s Build Something Great Together!



Important: Please read the requirements carefully before applying. Candidates who don’t meet the criteria won’t be considered. Include your resume/CV with your application to qualify and add a short video introduction too.

title: Front Office Supervisor
description: We are looking for a reliable and service-oriented Front Office Supervisor to oversee daily front desk operations, supervise and train front office staff, ensure smooth guest check-in and check-out procedures, handle guest concerns professionally, and maintain high standards of customer service while coordinating closely with housekeeping and other departments. The ideal candidate must have a Bachelor’s degree in Hospitality Management or a related field, proven experience in front office operations, strong leadership and problem-solving skills, excellent communication abilities, and willingness to work flexible shifts, including weekends and holidays.

title: Virtual Assistant – Admin, Graphic Design & M365
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a skilled, proactive Virtual Assistant who can handle a mix of personal assistant duties, administrative operations, graphic design, and Microsoft 365 tools. This is a remote, long-term position with consistent hours and room to grow.

What You'll Do

Personal & Administrative Support

•           Manage calendar, schedule meetings, send reminders, and suggest scheduling optimizations

•           Handle
 correspondence and draft replies via Outlook

•           Follow up with clients, vendors, or contacts on my behalf

•           Perform data entry and maintain organized records and spreadsheets

•           Update CRM or project management tools (training provided)

•           Research vendors, tools, contacts, or topics as needed

•           Assist with miscellaneous tasks to keep daily operations running smoothly

Graphic Design

•           Design and format professional forms and documents

•           Create marketing materials (flyers, banners, social graphics, etc.)

•           Produce polished graphics and visuals for reports and presentations

•           Maintain visual consistency across all materials

Microsoft 365

•           Organize and maintain SharePoint sites, libraries, and permissions

•           Manage Teams channels, meetings, and communication workflows

•           Handle file organization and collaboration across the M365 ecosystem

•           Identify and suggest ways to improve workflows using M365 tools

What We're Looking For

•           Strong written and spoken English

•           Proficient in Microsoft 365 — especially SharePoint, Outlook, and Teams

•           Graphic design skills with a portfolio or work samples (Canva, Adobe, or similar)

•           Highly organized, proactive, and solutions-oriented

•           Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

•           Prior experience as a VA or in an administrative/operations role

Nice to Have

•           Experience supporting a business owner or executive

•           Familiarity with tools like Notion, Trello, Asana, or HubSpot

Hours

10 -20 hours/week — flexible business hours

How to Apply

Please send your resume, 2–3 work samples of graphic design work, and a short paragraph on your administrative support experience and a short paragraph on your experience with Microsoft 365 — particularly SharePoint. Applications without these will not be considered.

To confirm you read this post, begin your application with the word "Organized."

title: Recruiter
description:
We are currently looking for an experienced Recruiter to find, screen, and hire qualified caregivers to support our growing home care services.



Qualifications:



-Bachelor’s degree

-Previous recruiting or HR experience preferred (healthcare or home care industry a plus)

-Excellent organizational and time management abilities. 

-Capability to work independently and meet hiring goals.

-Proficient in online recruiting platforms.



Responsibilities:

-Develop and implement recruiting strategies to attract caregivers. 

-Post job ads on various platforms (Indeed, job boards). 

-Screen resumes and conduct phone interviews.  

-Maintain applicant tracking and recruitment records.  

-Work with the scheduling and management team to identify staffing needs. 

-Follow company policies and state regulations.

title: OET TEFL/TESOL Certified ESL Tutor for Healthcare Professionals (OET Focus) - Remote/Part-Time
description:
Hi there! We are Relocal (relocal.co), a global talent mobility platform. We help Indonesian healthcare professionals (nurses) secure careers abroad, primarily in the Middle East (Saudi Arabia).



We are currently building a pipeline of high-quality Filipino ESL Tutors to train our nurses and help them pass their required English assessments (such as OET or EnglishScore).



You are a great fit if:

- You have a verified TEFL or TESOL certification (Please specify the awarding body and total training hours in your application).

- You have a minimum of 2 years of ESL teaching experience, ideally with adult learners.

- MANDATORY: You have experience teaching OET (Occupational English Test) or Healthcare English to medical professionals.

- You are comfortable working remotely and have a stable internet connection for video calls.

- You are patient, culturally adaptable, and know how to encourage non-native speakers who might be intimidated by standardized testing.



The Role:

- Conducting 1-on-1 or small group online English tutoring sessions for Indonesian nurses.

- Focusing on practical communication, medical vocabulary, and test-taking strategies.

- Providing constructive feedback to help candidates reach deployment-ready English levels.



Working Arrangement:

- Type: Part-time / Freelance / Project-based (Flexible hours based on your availability and the student's schedule).

- Rate: Please state your expected hourly rate (in USD) in your application.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

To ensure you have read this entire post, please start your application message with the word: "HEALTHCARE TUTOR".



In your application, please include:

1. A brief summary of your ESL and OET teaching experience.

2. Your expected hourly rate (USD).

3. Attach your TEFL/TESOL certificate.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: MARKETING LEAD - Online Jobs - (Part time Ongoing)?
description:
Marketing Lead



20 hours per week | Ongoing | Remote



We’re looking for a mid-level Marketing Lead who is equally comfortable building strategy and executing hands-on, and who thrives in regulated, detail-driven environments.



This role supports three related but distinct brands operating in the medical and wellness space:

 • Dripclub – premium IV and wellness clinics

 • Dripclub Mobile – licensed mobile healthcare services

 • Evolve Medical Solutions – medical devices and B2B clinical supply



Each brand has its own audience, compliance boundaries, and tone — and your role is to bring cohesion, clarity, and 
ntum across all three.







ABOUT THE ROLE



This is not a “post and boost” marketing role.



You’ll be:

 • Translating leadership direction into clear, compliant marketing strategy

 • Executing campaigns end-to-end (content, channels, optimisation)

 • Monitoring real performance data, not vanity metrics

 • Acting as the first point of contact between marketing and the leadership team

 • Providing real-time reporting and insights to inform decisions



You’ll work closely with leadership, operations, and clinical stakeholders — so confidence, discretion, and precision matter.







WHAT YOU’LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR



Strategy & Execution

 • Develop and execute marketing strategies aligned to regulated healthcare environments

 • Plan and manage campaigns across social,
, and digital platforms

 • Balance short-term traction with long-term brand positioning

 • Ensure brand voice and visual alignment across all channels



Performance & Analytics

 • Track social and campaign performance using meaningful metrics (reach, ?engagement, conversion, lead quality)

 • Maintain real-time visibility of marketing performance for leadership

 • Adjust campaigns based on data, not assumptions

 • Contribute to performance-based bonus outcomes tied to measurable traction and growth



Collaboration & Leadership Interface

 • Act as the primary marketing contact for the leadership team

 • Translate business objectives into marketing actions

 • Provide clear updates, insights, and recommendations

 • Work confidently within a highly structured, compliance-aware organisation







TOOLS YOU’LL USE



You must be confident working with:

 • GoHighLevel (campaigns, workflows, funnels, tracking)

 • Trello (planning, execution, collaboration)

 • Canva (brand-aligned assets)

 • Blaze AI (content support and optimisation)

 • 
 (supporting integrated clinic systems and operational workflows)



You should also be able to demonstrate successful campaign management, not just theory.







WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



Essential

 • Mid-level marketer with hands-on execution experience

 • Proven ability to build and execute marketing strategies

 • Exceptional written and conversational English

 • Experience working in highly regulated industries (medical, healthcare, legal, finance, or similar)

 • Strong understanding of brand positioning and audience alignment

 • Confidence working directly with senior leadership

 • Comfortable being accountable for outcomes, not just outputs



Highly Regarded

 • Experience in medical, wellness, or compliance-heavy environments

 • Exposure to legal frameworks or compliance-led marketing

 • Ability to explain performance data clearly to non-marketers

 • Calm, professional communication style under pressure







PERFORMANCE & BONUSES



This role includes performance-based bonuses linked to:

 • Measurable social media traction

 • Campaign engagement and growth

 • Quality of leads and audience alignment



This means:

 • Clear expectations

 • Transparent metrics

 • Shared wins when campaigns perform







HOURS & STRUCTURE

 • 20 hours per week

 • Ongoing, long-term role

 • Flexible scheduling with accountability for delivery and reporting







HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



To apply, please include:

 1. A short note explaining why this role appeals to you, and why working across multiple brands in a regulated environment is of interest.?

 2. Examples of campaigns you’ve managed, including:

 • The objective

 • Your role in the campaign

 • The outcomes or results achieved?

 3. Confirmation of your experience working in regulated or compliance-heavy environments (e.g. medical, healthcare, legal, finance).?

 4. A brief outline of how you would think about the target audience for each of the following brands:

 • Dripclub

 • Dripclub Mobile

 • Evolve Medical Solutions?

This does not need to be a formal strategy. We are interested in how you approach demographics, decision-makers, and messaging differences rather than a prepared campaign.?

 5. Your availability and preferred working hours, noting that availability must align with ACST.



Applications that do not address these points will not be considered.

title: Senior Telesales Representative
description:
Key Responsibilities



- Conduct outbound cold calls to SME business owners to introduce KPay’s payment solutions and generate interest.

- Qualify leads and schedule appointments for field sales representatives to conduct in-person or virtual meetings.

- Understand and communicate KPay’s value proposition clearly and persuasively to prospects across different industries.

- Maintain accurate records of calls, lead status, and meeting outcomes using CRM tools.

- Meet and exceed daily, weekly, and monthly targets for calls made, leads generated, and meetings booked.

- Follow up on warm leads from marketing campaigns and inbound inquiries when applicable.





Key Requirements



- 6+ years of experience in telesales, or a hardselling role, ideally targeting SMEs.

- Strong communication and persuasion skills, with a clear and confident phone presence.

- Resilience and persistence, with the ability to handle objections and rejection professionally.

- Goal-oriented mindset, with a strong drive to meet and exceed KPIs and team targets.

- Organized and detail-oriented, able to manage lead pipelines and follow up consistently.

- Basic computer literacy, with experience using CRM systems or lead-tracking tools.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team, coordinating effectively with field sales and marketing.

- Being fluent in English is a must, knowing more languages would be a plus.

title: Social Media & Admin Assistant
description:
We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support both social media management and general administrative tasks for a growing media and marketing business.



This is a long-term role for someone who can use their initiative, think ahead, and take ownership of tasks - not just wait for instructions.



Key Responsibilities

Draft Instagram and
 captions based on brand guidelines

Create simple Canva graphics

Organise content calendars

Suggest improvements or ideas proactively



Admin:

Organizing Google Drive folders

Light research and reporting

Supporting with day-to-day operational tasks



What We’re Looking For



Strong written English

Experience with social media (Instagram &
 - LinkedIn and TikTok are a bonus)

Confident using Canva and Google Workspace

Highly organized and detail-focused

Proactive and able to work independently

Comfortable using ChatGPT responsibly to draft content

Stable internet connection



We value someone who:

Suggests better ways to do things

Takes pride in producing polished work



How to Apply



Please include:

A short introduction about your experience

Examples of social media captions you have written

Examples of graphics you have created for social media

Your favourite productivity tool and why

The word “Proactive” at the top of your application



Paid trial task will be required

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Airbnb Pricing Strategist | £5–£7/hour | UK Hours
description:
Hello. I am looking for a performance-driven Airbnb Pricing Strategist who actively improves revenue.



This role focuses on daily revenue execution: reviewing occupancy, ADR, and booking pace, identifying underperforming properties, and implementing structured pricing adjustments that move numbers. 



Details:

– £5–£7/hour (based on proven STR pricing performance)

– Full-time

– UK business hours

– Remote



What You’ll Do:

– Review occupancy, ADR, and booking pace daily/weekly; flag and fix underperforming properties

– Extract and compare data from PriceLabs and competitor listings; diagnose booking gaps

– Adjust pricing rules, overrides, minimum stays, LOS strategy, gap-filling logic, and seasonality pricing

– Analyse listing ranking and conversion; recommend improvements in titles, positioning, and structure

– Support structured reporting, KPI tracking, and performance dashboards (revenue work is a priority)



Good Fit If You:

– Think analytically and can clearly explain decisions using numbers

– Have strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

– Have experience working with marketplace or pricing data

– Understand short-term rental performance metrics (UK market knowledge preferred)

– Can show proven results improving occupancy, ADR, or revenue

– Work independently, identify issues proactively, and present findings clearly



Nice to Have: hands-on PriceLabs experience, experience managing UK-based STR portfolios, structured reporting background



To Apply:

Send a short message and include ORANGE in your title, along with the NUMBER OF YEARS you’ve worked in the short-term rental industry

title: Bookkeeper / Finance Manager | £4–£6/hour | Flexible Hours
description:
Hello. I'm looking for an experienced Xero Bookkeeper / Finance Manager who can confidently manage multi-company bookkeeping and produce clean, structured monthly management reporting. The focus is on running a proper month-end process, keeping accounts accurate, and staying ahead of issues.



Details:

– £4–£6/hour

– Part-time

– Initially 2 days per week

– Flexible working hours

– Remote



What You’ll Do:

– Manage bookkeeping across 4 companies plus a holding company

– Perform weekly bank and credit card reconciliations

– Maintain accurate coding of transactions with complete documentation

– Process supplier invoices and categorise expenses correctly

title: Real Estate ISA
description:
About the Role

I'm a solo real estate agent with a marketing director/ assistant working in San Diego County, California — one of the most active and competitive markets in the country. I'm looking for an experienced, motivated Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to become my right hand on the phones.

Here's the deal: when I'm out showing homes, meeting clients, and closing deals, I need someone keeping the pipeline alive. That means calling leads the moment they come in, following up with past clients, prospecting expired listings and FSBOs, and making sure no opportunity slips through the cracks.

This is NOT a data entry or admin role. You will be on the phone 80-90% of your day. If you love talking to people, handling objections, and setting appointments — keep reading.







What You'll Be Doing Every Day

Making 80-150+ outbound calls per day (cold and warm)

Following up with new internet leads within 5 minutes of them coming in

Calling expired listings, FSBOs, circle prospecting, and geo-farming leads

Qualifying leads using the LPMAMA framework (Location, Price, Motivation, Agent, Mortgage, Appointment)

Setting qualified appointments on my calendar for buyer and seller consultations

Nurturing long-term leads through consistent follow-up calls, texts, and
s

Managing and updating CRM daily with detailed notes after every contact

Reactivating old/cold leads in the database

Sending daily activity reports: calls made, conversations had, appointments set

Coordinating with me on hot leads and pipeline updates



Who I'm Looking For

Required:

Minimum 1 year of experience as a Real Estate ISA (U.S. residential market)

Fluent English with a clear, confident speaking voice and neutral accent

Experience with real estate CRMs (Follow Up Boss, Sierra, or similar)

Proven track record of setting appointments and converting leads

Comfortable with cold calling, objection handling, and rejection

Strong internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps) and a quality headset/microphone

Webcam for regular check-in meetings

Reliable computer setup with backup power (UPS preferred)

Available to work Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time



Preferred (not required, but a plus):

Experience with San Diego or Southern California real estate market

Familiarity with Vulcan7, RedX, Mojo Dialer, or similar dialer systems

Experience calling expired listings and FSBOs specifically

Knowledge of basic U.S. mortgage and real estate terminology

2+ years of ISA experience



Compensation & Growth

Base pay: $1,000 – $1,200/month depending on experience

Appointment bonuses: $25 per qualified kept appointment

Closing bonuses: $100 – $200 per closed deal that originated from your lead

Performance reviews every 90 days with potential for raises

Long-term position — I want someone who grows with the business, not a short-term hire

As the business scales, there's opportunity to lead an ISA team



How to Apply

Please include ALL of the following in your application — incomplete applications will not be considered:

Your resume with specific real estate ISA experience highlighted

A 60-second audio recording of you doing a mock cold call to an expired listing. Pretend you're calling a homeowner whose listing just expired and you want to set an appointment. Show me your energy, your script handling, and your objection skills.

A short video introduction (1-2 minutes) telling me about yourself, your ISA experience, and why you'd be great for this role

Answers to these questions:

How many calls per day did you average in your last ISA role?

What CRM systems have you used?

What was your appointment-to-close conversion rate (if you know it)?

What is your current internet speed? (run a speed test at speedtest.net)

Do you have a backup power source (UPS or generator)?



What It's Like Working With Me

I'm direct, I communicate clearly, and I value honesty. I don't micromanage — I care about results. If you're hitting your numbers, you'll have a lot of freedom in how you work. I give feedback regularly and I invest in people who show initiative.

I want this to be a long-term partnership. If you're looking for a stable, well-paying role where you can make a real impact on a growing real estate business in one of the best markets in the U.S. — let's talk.



San Diego County real estate — serving buyers and sellers across the county.

description:

CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

title: Full-Time Accountant/Bookkeeper
description:
Full-Time Accountant/Bookkeeper

US-Based Interior Design & Property Management Company

Location: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

 Schedule: Full-Time, Eastern Time hours (8AM - 5PM EST)

 Compensation: $800 - $1,500 USD/month (based on experience and qualifications)



About the Company

We are a growing US-based company operating in both interior design and property management sectors. We work with residential and commercial clients across the United States, managing design projects, client relationships, and property operations. As we continue to scale, we need a skilled accountant/bookkeeper to maintain our financial accuracy and support our business operations.



The Role

We're seeking an experienced Accountant/Bookkeeper to manage the financial operations of our business. This is a critical role that requires someone detail-oriented, experienced with US accounting practices, and capable of managing multiple projects and accounts simultaneously.



You'll be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, managing invoicing and payments, tracking project budgets, and ensuring our books are clean and compliant. You'll work closely with our US-based CPA who will ultimately create the financial statements. This role will primarily support our design business operations but may also assist with property management accounting as needed.



Key Responsibilities



Accounts Receivable (AR):

Generate and send client invoices accurately and on time

Track outstanding invoices and follow up on overdue payments

Process and record incoming payments

Reconcile client accounts and resolve payment discrepancies

Maintain organized records of all receivables



Accounts Payable (AP):

Process vendor invoices and expense reports

Schedule and execute timely vendor payments

Reconcile vendor statements and resolve billing issues

Track and categorize all business expenses

Maintain vendor records and payment history



QuickBooks Management:

Respond to financial inquiries from management



Required Qualifications:

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

, Melio, etc.)

8:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST

Some flexibility within Eastern Time zone hours

Work Environment:

Fully remote position

Must have reliable high-speed internet

Dedicated, quiet workspace required

Professional communication setup (computer, headset for calls if needed)



Compensation & Benefits

Salary Range: $800 - $1,500 USD/month

Additional Benefits:

Paid time off (vacation and sick leave)

Holiday pay

Performance-based bonuses

Opportunity for salary increases based on performance

Long-term growth potential as company scales



About Working With Us



Company Culture:

Small, collaborative team environment

Direct access to company leadership

Your work directly impacts business decisions

We value accuracy, integrity, and proactive communication

We invest in the right tools and systems to help you succeed



Growth Opportunity:

As we grow our design business and scale from ~30 properties to 50+ our c-hosting business, this role will expand

Potential to manage a team as we grow

Opportunity to shape our financial systems and processes

Long-term career growth for the right person



Why Join Us:

Work with US-based business and gain valuable experience

Exposure to both design and property management industries

Modern tools and systems (we don't cut corners on software)

Supportive team that values your expertise

Stable, growing company with long-term vision



Application Process

To apply, please submit:

2. Cover letter (brief) addressing:

- Why you're interested in this role

- Your experience with US accounting and tax systems

- Your availability to work Eastern Time hours

- Question 2: How do you handle AR collections? Describe your process for following up on overdue invoices.



4. Work sample (optional but preferred):

If you have a sample financial report (P&L, Balance Sheet) you've created, please include it (remove any confidential client information)



How to Apply

Submit your application through OnlineJobs.ph attaching all requirements.

Questions?
: 



What Happens Next

Initial Interview: 15-20 minute video call to discuss your experience and availability

Final Interview: 30-45 minute discussion about the role, compensation, and fit

Offer: Job offer extended to selected candidate



We're looking for someone who can grow with us long-term. If you're detail-oriented, experienced with US accounting, and ready to take ownership of our financial operations, we want to hear from you!



Apply now and help us build a solid financial foundation as we scale.

title: Philippine-Based Virtual Assistant for Brand Account Making by Calling Brands
description:
Description:



We are seeking a dynamic and motivated Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for establishing and managing bulk buying wholesale accounts with designated brands in the USA. This position involves outbound calling, brand convincing, and establishing long-term relationships to enhance our wholesale FBA portfolio on Amazon.



Responsibilities:



Outbound Calling: Initiate calls to designated brands in the USA to introduce our authentic business and present the opportunity for bulk buying wholesale accounts.



Brand Convincing: Convince brands of our legitimacy, showcasing our successful track record of reselling brand items on Amazon, and articulate how our optimization and PPC campaigns can boost their sales.



Portfolio Management: Manage and optimize wholesale FBA portfolios on Amazon, ensuring each brand account is well-maintained and fully utilized.



Communication Skills: Handle brand inquiries with professionalism and excellent communication skills, ensuring a positive and collaborative relationship with each brand.



Analytical Expertise: Utilize analytical skills to assess brand needs, optimize listings, and strategize PPC campaigns to increase brand visibility and traffic.



Weekly Commitment: Work 4 hours daily, 5 days a week, with the potential for an increased hourly rate based on performance.



Requirements:



Location: Based in the Philippines.

Experience: Proven experience in outbound calling, brand convincing, and brand account management on marketplaces like Amazon.

Communication: Excellent communication skills in English.

Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze market trends, optimize listings, and strategize PPC campaigns.

Long-Term Commitment: Looking for a candidate interested in a long-term commitment with the opportunity for growth within the team.

To Apply:



If you are interested in joining our team and meet the requirements outlined above, please include the following in your proposal:



Brief overview of your relevant experience.

Answer the question: How many brand accounts have you previously established in the USA marketplace by calling different brands?

Explain how you can produce good results in a short time.

Note: Please include the word "Filip" in your proposal to indicate that you have fully read the job post and understood the requirements.



We look forward to reviewing your applications and finding the right candidate to lead our brand accounts team in the future.



Best Regards,

Maverick Mall Solutions

title: Looking for a Thumbnail Designer for my Space/Universe YouTube Channel
description:
Hey!

I am looking for a talented designer to create thumbnails for my space and universe YouTube channel.

Pay is $5 per thumbnail.

I will provide the video title, a brief description of the video topic, and any specific ideas I have for the thumbnail. You will be responsible for the creative execution.

I am looking for someone who:



Has experience creating YouTube thumbnails specifically

Has a strong understanding of what makes a thumbnail perform well, high CTR design, bold text, contrast, visual hierarchy

Proficient in Photoshop, Canva, or similar design tools

Fluent in English

Able to deliver within 24 hours

Familiar with the space and science aesthetic, dark backgrounds, cinematic imagery, dramatic composition



The style should be cinematic and mysterious. Think dark backgrounds, bold white text, dramatic space imagery. Our channel covers deep space topics so thumbnails should feel epic and slightly unsettling, not bright and cartoonish.

If you have read the middle of this job description, please type your favorite planet at the beginning or end of your proposal.

Please look at channels like BeyondTheBlue (black thumbnails), and Cosmic Lens for reference on the aesthetic we are going for.

If you have ever made thumbnails for a space, science or documentary style YouTube channel, please attach samples of your work.

I look forward to hopefully working with you!

Questions:



Share 3 thumbnail examples you have made that you are most proud of

Have you ever designed thumbnails for a space or science channel? Please share examples

What software do you use to create thumbnails?

Please only share Google Drive, Imgur or direct image links
