title: Paralegal Document Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a detail-oriented Legal Document Specialist to join our credit repair and consumer law practice. This is a full-time remote position focusing on legal document preparation and data management for federal court cases and client exhibits.



Primary Responsibilities



Document Preparation:

- Draft legal documents using provided templates and guidelines

- Transfer data accurately from marked reports into formatted exhibits

- Copy and integrate case information into various legal documents

- Prepare exhibits for court submissions and arbitration proceedings

- Ensure all documents meet formatting requirements for federal court filings



Data Management:

- Extract information from credit reports and consumer files

- Organize case data into structured documents

- Maintain accuracy when transferring information between documents

- Follow specific formatting guidelines for legal submissions



What Makes This Role Unique

This position requires attention to detail and sustained concentration. The work itself is straightforward and follows clear procedures, but accuracy is critical since these documents are used in legal proceedings. You will be transforming raw data and marked reports into professional legal exhibits that directly impact client cases.



Requirements



Essential Qualifications:

- Excellent English writing skills with strong grammar and spelling

- Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy

- Ability to maintain focus during repetitive tasks

- Comfortable working with legal documents and terminology

- Proficient in Microsoft Word and PDF editing software

- Reliable internet connection and computer setup



Preferred Qualifications:

- Previous experience with legal documents or paralegal work

- Familiarity with U.S. court document formatting

- Experience with data entry or document processing



What We Provide



Training and Support:

- Comprehensive training program covering all procedures

- Clear templates and step-by-step guidelines

- Ongoing support and feedback

- Regular quality checks to ensure accuracy



Work Environment:

- Stable, long-term position with growth potential

- Work from home flexibility

- Consistent workload

- Professional development in U.S. legal procedures



Ideal Candidate Profile

You thrive in structured environments where precision matters. You take pride in producing error-free work and understand that even small mistakes can have significant consequences. You're patient with tedious tasks and can maintain high concentration levels throughout your workday. You're eager to learn about U.S. consumer law and legal document standards.



How to Apply

Please submit your resume and answer these questions:

1. Describe your experience with document preparation or data entry

2. How do you maintain accuracy when performing repetitive tasks?

3. What is your current internet speed and computer specifications?

title: Real Estate Deal Analysis / Property Feasibility VA
description:
We are an Australian property development company looking for a highly analytical Virtual Assistant to assist with real estate deal analysis and feasibility studies.



You will be responsible for analysing residential property opportunities across Queensland and other Australian regions and building detailed feasibility reports to determine if deals meet our required profit margins.



This is NOT a basic admin role. We are looking for someone strong with numbers, spreadsheets, and research.



Responsibilities:

 • Research suburb data (median price, days on market, demand trends)

 • Analyse comparable sales using Australian real estate platforms

 • Build detailed feasibility spreadsheets (purchase price, renovation costs, holding costs, selling costs, profit margins, ROI)

 • Input and structure renovation budgets

 • Calculate LVR, equity splits, investor returns (e.g., 15% p.a. structures)

 • Present clean, professional summary reports

 • Deliver completed feasibility reports within 72 hours of property submission



Requirements:

 • Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills (advanced formulas required)

 • Experience with real estate analysis (preferred)

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Ability to follow financial models and refine them

 • Excellent written English

 • Fast turnaround and reliable communication



Bonus if you have:

 • Experience analysing Australian property

 • Experience with development or renovation feasibility models

 • Understanding of ROI, IRR, LVR, and investor structuring



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with our company.



To apply, please answer:

 1. Have you built property feasibility reports before?

 2. What spreadsheet formulas are you strongest in?

 3. Provide an example of financial analysis you have completed.

 4. How quickly can you turn around a full feasibility report?





Please begin your application with the word “Allure” so we know you have read this job post carefully.

title: NDIS Rostering and Admin Coordinator
description:
We’re Hiring: NDIS Rostering and Admin Coordinator



We’re looking for someone who isn’t just looking for “a job.” We need someone who shows up, owns their work, and keeps the engine running behind the scenes. No juggling clients. No excuses. Just dedication, accuracy, and accountability.



This role is the backbone of our support services—managing rosters, keeping staff, and ensuring participants get the care they need without disruption.



What You’ll Do:

 • Coordinate daily shifts for carers and clients.

.

What You Need:

 • Excellent English—spoken and written. You need to communicate clearly and confidently.

 • Availability to work AWST hours (Perth time zone).

You Are:

title: Risk Analyst - US Company - Remote
description:
First things first…

This is a 100% remote position (candidate must be based in the Philippines or Colombia). This role is internal but may have minimal client-facing responsibilities. The current salary range for this position is $1,200 - $2,000/month USD.  





What You’ll Do

The Risk Analyst serves as a key resource within MQMR’s Compliance Management department, providing oversight, expertise, and client-facing support across a broad range of compliance functions. This role is primarily responsible for reviewing and validating the accuracy of data, analyses, and reports related to Fair Lending, and compliance with laws and regulations that include, but are not limited to, the following:



- Equal Credit Opportunity Act (ECOA) and Regulation B

- Home Mortgage Disclosure Act (HMDA) and Regulation C

- Fair Housing Act 

- State Fair Lending Laws, as applicable

- GSE/Agency Requirements, as applicable 



The Risk Analyst will audit loan files, run data analysis reports through a third-party software system, and ensure that findings are accurate and recommendations are practical and aligned with client expectations. Additionally, the Risk Analyst will collaborate directly with clients by participating in kick-off calls, reviewing results, answering questions, and providing actionable recommendations to strengthen compliance programs and mitigate risk.





Key Responsibilities

- Supports the Fair Lending and HMDA Support product, which includes assistance with the following tasks and projects:

          - HMDA Data Integrity Reviews

          - Fair Lending Data Analyses

          - Policy, Procedure, Documentation and Report Reviews

          - Determining findings and observations for Clients

          - Recommending Action Steps to Mitigate or Eliminate Risk

          - Develop and write comprehensive Fair Lending Analysis Reports for MQMR's Clients

- Reviews Results of Fair Lending Data Analysis

          - Ensures accuracy and completion

          - Ensures analyses performed align with contract and client expectations

          - Reviews and opines on recommendations for solutions for clients to implement

- Reviews Results of HMDA Data Integrity Reviews

          - Ensures accuracy of results and completion

          - Reviews and opines on root cause analysis for errors and recommendations for solutions

- Assist Clients with the identification of errors with their HMDA Loan Application Register (LAR), and identify solutions to correct data fields





What Will Make You Successful

- 1-3 years of experience in the origination industry required, preferably related to HMDA Loan Application Register (LAR) submissions and Fair Lending Data Analysis.

- 1-3 years of experience auditing mortgage loans to ensure regulatory compliance, including guidelines and pricing exceptions.

- A love for writing and the ability to adapt to writing in a business format to communicate clearly.

- Proficient project planning skills, including the ability to organize, prioritize and control job responsibilities.

- Strong analytical and critical-thinking skills with the ability to solve complex problems and easily communicate findings.

- Ability to work independently and collaboratively with a team.

- Proficiency with Microsoft Office.

- Confidentiality: Must be able to safeguard sensitive information.

- Bachelor’s degree strongly preferred; however, will consider candidates with equivalent experience.





What We Do At MQMR

MQMR is a progressive leader in mortgage compliance, bringing a nimble approach to an antiquated, highly regulated industry that requires us to be the best of the best. We don’t just do audits; we bridge the gap between risk and compliance to give mortgage leaders the "peace of mind" they need to sleep at night. 



Our culture is fast-paced and driven by transparency—this isn't a place for those who just want to clock in. We’re often told that one year at MQMR is the equivalent of 3–5 years of learning elsewhere, so if you’re ready to solve complex problems and truly "Climb Higher," you’ve found your home.





Why Join the MQMR Team?

Are you a critical thinker who’s ready to move our compliance function beyond 'check-the-box' auditing to solve complex problems and bridge the gap between regulatory requirements and client-facing excellence?



If so, join us! Working at MQMR means living and breathing our core values: Commit to Quality, Create Solutions, Collaborate as One, Cultivate Raving Fans, and Climb Higher. Here, you’ll do more than just “work a job”—you’ll solve complex, meaningful problems, stretch your skills, and make a tangible impact on our clients’ peace of mind.



We are more than just a firm; we are a community that has mastered virtual culture. We’ve been 100% remote since 2020, maintaining a 70+ Employee Net Promoter Score. We host monthly virtual activities and wellness challenges. We offer a holistic environment with flexible PTO where we don't count days, annual performance bonuses, and comprehensive health and wellness plans.



We’re looking for people who are hungry to build and learn—not just clock in and out. If you share our values and are excited by the challenge of bridging the gap between risk and compliance, we’d love to hear from you.



If you are interested, please apply directly through our job posting:

, Instagram, LinkedIn)

title: AI Video Editor & Prompt Specialist (100 Videos/Month/Hourly Rate)
description:
We’re a creative agency producing AI-generated video ads for Amazon and social media. With growing client demand (100 videos monthly), we’re expanding our team.

* Edit and produce high-quality AI-assisted video ads.

* Write clear, effective prompts for AI video generation tools.

* Collaborate with our team to meet deadlines for multiple clients.

* Excellent video editing skills (proficiency in Premiere, Filmora, or similar).

* Familiarity with AI video tools (e.g., Kling AI, VEO 3, or similar platforms).

title: Accountant
description:
SENIOR ACCOUNTANT





Location: Philippines

Reports to: Head of Accounting

Employment Type: Full-Time Independent Contractor, Remote





At Firm Five, we modernize bookkeeping and fractional controllership. We serve a client base of emerging brands with $2M–$50M annual revenue in Canada and the US, helping them not only maintain their financial reporting but also optimize and automate their financial processes. Our clients rely on us for all things accounting and administration (we don't do tax work), and we take pride in delivering clarity, efficiency, and financial insight.





POSITION SUMMARY:

We are looking for an experienced and strategic Senior Accountant that will handle the full accounting cycle for US and Canadian clients. Your primary responsibility is to complete all the accounting in QBO or Xero for clients in various industries on a monthly basis.





COMPENSATION RANGE:

PHP 70,000–110,000 per month, based on experience and skill level





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

Chart of accounts setup

Bank reconciliations

Bank categorizations

Receipt management

Profit and loss, balance sheet, cash flow statement preparation

Accounting for sales tax (No actual tax filings)

Accrual accounting and balance sheet adjustments

Excellent client communication via slack and
 (in English)

Adjusting entries and COGS

Opening balances and catchup bookkeeping





QUALIFICATIONS:

Bachelor's degree in Accounting

CPA designation in the Philippines

3-5 years experience managing full cycle accounting for a book of clients, ideally in an accounting or bookkeeping firm

E-Commerce or inventory experience preferred but not required





CHARACTERISTICS TO SUCCEED:

Passionate about numbers, accounting, and client management

Excellent communication skills with a passion for simplifying financial data

Proven project management skills with an ability to withhold deadlines successfully

Dependable collaborator with a strong team-oriented approach

Thrives in a high-pressure environment while navigating many competing priorities

Reliable internet and work from home equipment (laptop, keyboard, mouse)

Backup power supply





WHY YOU WILL LOVE WORKING WITH US:

Competitive Salary & Benefits

Early employee incentive plan linked to growth of the company

Fully Remote with Flexible Hours (9AM to 1PM EST + 4 flexi hours)

Paid Holidays & Vacation

Paid Sick/Personal Days

Growth Opportunities

Bi-Weekly pay direct to your bank account via Wise

No screen tracking tools





OUR COMMITMENT TO EQUITY & INCLUSION:

At Firm Five, we are committed to fostering a culture of equity, inclusion, and respect. We value diversity in all its forms and believe that every individual deserves to be treated with dignity and given equal opportunities to thrive. We strive to create an environment where all people feel welcome, supported, and empowered. We are dedicated to continuous learning, reflection, and improvement in our practices and policies.

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
Video Editor — UGC & Social Content (Remote, Philippines-Based)

We're a Female Condom company looking for a talented video editor based in the Philippines to join our team on a freelance basis. If you have a great creative eye, love social media content, and know how to make videos feel alive — keep reading.



What you'll be doing

You'll be taking raw UGC footage and transforming it into scroll-stopping social content for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. This means adding motion graphics, fun animations, captions, and sound design that elevate the video without losing that authentic, real-person feel. You'll work primarily on short-form content (Reels, TikToks) and will play a big role in shaping how our brand shows up visually on social.



What we're looking for

You have a genuine feel for what makes content perform on social — you watch Reels and TikToks and instinctively know why something works. You can take a raw, unpolished clip and make it gripping without making it feel produced or salesy (think about the videos that content creators in New York City are making). You understand the difference between content that feels like an ad and content that actually stops people from scrolling — and you always aim for the latter. You're comfortable with motion graphics and animation and know how to use them to add energy and personality rather than noise. You're proactive, communicative, and take creative ownership of your work.



Must-haves

You're proficient in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or CapCut (or a combination). You have experience editing short-form social content specifically — a portfolio that shows this is essential. You have a strong sense of pacing, music, and sound design. You're reliable, meet deadlines, and communicate clearly in English. Experience with After Effects or motion graphics tools. 



Nice to haves

A background in or passion for health, wellness, or lifestyle content. Experience working with UGC creators or social-first brands.



How to apply

Please send your portfolio or reel, a brief note about your editing style and experience. Please also include three examples of videos you think might fit the concept that we're looking for. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert
description:
GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert – Marketing Operations



We’re hiring a highly skilled GoHighLevel expert to take ownership of our funnels, automations, and CRM systems. If you understand workflows inside and out and can keep marketing operations running smoothly without constant supervision, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do



* Build and optimize funnels, landing pages, and automation workflows

* Set up pipelines, calendars, triggers, forms, and integrations

* Manage CRM, tagging, segmentation, and lead nurturing sequences

* Troubleshoot issues and ensure flawless system performance

* Handle onboarding setups for new clients or campaigns

* Test and QA all automations before launch



What We Expect



* Strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel

* Ability to follow and improve SOPs

* Proactive mindset — you anticipate problems before they happen

* Clear, consistent communication and organized workflows

* Strong attention to detail — no broken triggers or messy setups

* Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines



We’re looking for someone structured, reliable, and ownership-driven who can keep our marketing engine running at a high level.

title: Fleet Operations Coordinator (Rental Car Company
description:
Company: Turn n Go LLC

Industry: Vehicle Rental / Transportation

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Compensation: $3.50/hour (Training Period Applies)

Schedule: Part-Time to Start (Evening & Weekend Coverage – U.S. EST Time Zone)



?



About Us



Turn n Go LLC is a growing rental car company based in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. We provide vehicles to rideshare and gig economy drivers. As we scale our fleet, we are hiring a Fleet Operations Coordinator to manage backend operations, roadside support, insurance verification, and after-hours communication.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable handling structured processes.



?



Position Overview



The Fleet Operations Coordinator is responsible for maintaining operational control of our rental fleet during evening and weekend hours. This role ensures issues are documented, escalated properly, and resolved efficiently.



You will be working alongside our Executive Assistant and reporting directly to ownership.



?



Core Responsibilities



1. Roadside Assistance Coordination

 • Collect detailed i
 information from drivers

 • Open roadside tickets (AAA / insurance vendors)

 • Coordinate tow requests, flat tire support, jump starts, etc.

 • Document every i
 in internal tracking system

 • Escalate major issues when necessary



2. Insurance Verification & Policy Setup

 • Verify renter insurance coverage

 • Confirm required protections:

 • Additional Interest

 • Loss Payee

 • Proper coverage limits

 • Assist with policy setup calls when needed

 • Maintain insurance tracking logs



3. Toll & Violation Processing

 • Review incoming toll notices

 • Assign violations to correct renter

 • Draft and submit dispute letters when applicable

 • Maintain organized documentation records



4. Communication Coverage (Evenings)

 • Handle renter communication volume during EST evening hours

 • Log all issues clearly

 • Maintain professional tone at all times



5. Internal Documentation

 • Maintain structured digital records

 • Follow SOP checklists

 • Provide end-of-shift summary reports



?



Required Skills

 • Strong written English

 • High attention to detail

 • Organized and process-driven

 • Comfortable handling structured workflows

 • Calm under pressure

 • Experience with Google Docs / Sheets

 • Ability to follow chain-of-command



?



Preferred 

 • Operations coordination experience

 • Property management or fleet management background

 • Insurance verification experience

 • Roadside dispatch experience



?



Training Structure

 • Week 1: Unpaid structured training (shadowing, SOP learning, workflow review)

 • Week 2: Paid training at $3.50/hour

 • Ongoing performance review after 30 days



This role will grow in responsibility and compensation as the company scales.



?



Important: Application Instructions



To ensure you read the entire job description, please follow these instructions carefully:



When applying, use this exact subject line:



Subject Line: Ready To Operate With Precision



Applications without this exact subject line will not be considered.



In your message, include:

 1. A short paragraph explaining why you are a good fit

 2. Your experience with structured operations

 3. Your available working hours in EST

 4. Your internet speed

 5. A screenshot of your workspace

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

Responsibilities



Customer Service

 • Respond to customer inquiries via
, chat, or phone

 • Provide friendly and professional assistance to customers

 • Resolve basic customer issues and escalate complex problems when needed



Sales Support

 • Assist customers with product or service information

 • Follow up with leads and customer inquiries

 • Help the sales team with quotes, order processing, and customer communication

 • Maintain accurate customer and lead information



Data Entry & Admin

 • Enter customer and order information accurately into company systems

 • Maintain spreadsheets and customer records

 • Assist with general administrative tasks when required







Requirements

 • Excellent spoken and written English

 • Clear and professional neutral accent

 • Previous experience in customer service or sales support

 • Strong communication and people skills

 • Good data entry and typing skills

 • High attention to detail

 • Ability to stay organized and work independently

 • Reliable internet connection







Bonus Skills (Not Required)

 • Experience supporting sales teams or handling leads

 • Experience with CRM systems

 • Previous experience working with international customers







What We Offer

 • Full-time remote position

 • Long-term stable role

 • Supportive team environment

 • Opportunity to grow with the company





How to Apply



Please include the following with your application:

 1. Your resume

 2. A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself

 3. A short paragraph describing your customer service and sales support experience

 4. Include the word “Support” at the top of your application so we know you read the full job description.

ABOUT US

title: Full stack .NET Developer
description:
We are looking for a Senior Developer with strong .NET and ReactJS experience to join our IT development team. If you excel in building high?quality enterprise applications, collaborating with cross?functional partners, and delivering scalable, secure, and efficient solutions—this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities



Develop, test, debug, and maintain software solutions with a focus on high-quality design.

Lead key system design and integration decisions and communicate technical direction to implementation teams.

Collaborate with business partners, architects, and project teams to identify technical and functional requirements.

Manage system enhancements and ensure adherence to industry-standard software design practices.

Analyze business requirements and translate them into detailed technical designs and development tasks.

Estimate feasibility, cost, timelines, and system compatibility for project work.

Implement new capabilities in business applications and troubleshoot defects or performance issues.

Contribute to project planning, scheduling, and delivery milestones.

Ensure that application performance standards and operational expectations are consistently met.

Basic Qualifications

Minimum of 5 years hands-on development experience with .NET technologies for web services.

Solid understanding of the software development lifecycle and ability to work effectively in team environments.

Strong technical, analytical, and communication skills with high attention to detail.

Expertise in core .NET concepts including multithreading, generics, serialization, and thread pools.

Experience developing Web APIs and services including REST, SOAP, and related frameworks (e.g., WSDL, SOAP UI).

In-depth experience implementing authentication and authorization for Web APIs.



Proficiency in writing optimized SQL queries and organizing data using Microsoft T-SQL.

Hands-on experience with RDBMS platforms such as SQL Server and libraries like Dapper.

Experience deploying .NET applications via GitHub Actions to Azure App Services or Kubernetes environments.



Experience using development tools such as Visual Studio and VS Code.

description:
we are winding down our ecommerce businesses that have a presence on amazon and use shopify and stripe and billing crms.

we need someone who can do quickbooks (expert) and have expert excel skills - also reconcile, p&l and forecast.  We need to look at product costs, marketing costs and true profits after costs.  If interested please add me tg at kellyoshea1

title: Content Creator & Social Media Manager
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION

Company: True Aesthetics

 Position: Performance Content Creator & Social Media Manager

 Department: Growth Marketing / Creative

 Employment Type: Contract, Part-Time

 Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

 Compensation: $7/hour

 Schedule: 4 hours/day, 5 days/week (80 hours/month)

 Reports To: Operations Manager



ABOUT TRUE AESTHETICS

True Aesthetics is building the future of medical aesthetics. We are scaling a national network of independent, best-in-class clinics while creating trusted consumer brands that make aesthetic and wellness care simpler, more transparent, and more accessible.

Our flagship program, TrueTox, is redefining how patients experience injectables through a flat-fee membership model that replaces unpredictable per-unit pricing with consistent, full-face treatment plans delivered by board-certified providers. Powered by performance marketing and proprietary operational infrastructure, we acquire and retain thousands of consumer members while driving sustainable growth for our provider network.

We are a high-growth, founder-led company partnering with premier medical aesthetic clinics across the country. As we scale from early-stage disruptor to category-defining enterprise, we are obsessed with operational excellence, financial discipline, and exceptional execution. Every role at True Aesthetics directly contributes to building the most trusted, scalable platform in aesthetics and wellness.



POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a performance-obsessed Content Creator & Social Media Manager who understands that beautiful creative means nothing if it doesn't convert. This role exists at the intersection of creative production and growth marketing—you will design, test, and iterate scroll-stopping Meta ad creative that drives customer acquisition while maintaining consistent organic social presence across TrueTox (B2C) and True Aesthetics (B2B) channels.

This is NOT a traditional brand designer role. You are a performance creative specialist who lives and breathes Meta ad best practices, understands what makes thumb-stopping creative convert, and can produce high-velocity creative testing at scale.

Your primary mission: Generate profitable Meta ad creative that lowers Cost Per Acquisition (CPA) and increases ROAS while building brand awareness through strategic organic social content.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Performance Creative Production (70% of time)

Meta Ads Creative Development:

Design and produce 15-25 high-performing Meta ad variations weekly (images, carousels, videos, stories)

Create scroll-stopping creative specifically optimized for Meta's algorithm and auction dynamics

Develop creative in multiple formats: UGC-style, lifestyle, before/after, testimonial-driven, educational, promotional

Build creative frameworks that can be rapidly iterated and tested at scale

Produce video ads using stock footage, text overlays, transitions, and motion graphics

Design carousel ads that tell compelling stories and drive click-through

Create story/reels ads optimized for vertical mobile consumption

Creative Testing & Iteration:

Execute systematic A/B testing of creative concepts, messaging, imagery, and formats

Analyze creative performance data daily (CTR, CPM, CPA, ROAS) and identify winning patterns

Rapidly refresh underperforming creative and scale winning concepts

Implement feedback from Meta Ads Manager on creative performance trends

Test new hooks, angles, and messaging approaches based on market insights

Maintain creative testing velocity of 3-5 new concepts weekly

Combat ad fatigue by rotating creative before performance drops

Performance Optimization:

Understand Meta's creative best practices: aspect ratios, file sizes, text limits, engagement signals

Design with Meta's algorithm in mind: thumb-stopping first 3 seconds, clear value prop, strong CTA

Optimize creative for mobile-first viewing and platform-specific behaviors

Balance brand consistency with performance-driven testing and iteration

Stay current on Meta platform changes, new ad formats, and creative trends

Monitor competitor creative and identify opportunities to differentiate

Creative Asset Management:

Organize creative library by campaign, format, performance tier, and testing status

Maintain version control and naming conventions for all creative assets

Archive winning creative and document performance insights for future reference

Provide creative assets in correct specs and formats for Meta Ads Manager



Organic Social Media Management (30% of time)

Content Scheduling & Publishing (via Buffer):

Schedule and publish organic content across Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn

Manage separate content calendars for TrueTox (B2C consumer-focused) and True Aesthetics (B2B clinic-focused)

Maintain consistent posting rhythm: 5 posts weekly per brand (TrueTox + True Aesthetics)

Optimize posting times based on audience engagement patterns

Ensure content mix balances educational, promotional, testimonial, and brand storytelling

Content Creation (Organic):

Design feed posts, stories, reels, and TikToks for TrueTox and True Aesthetics

Write engaging captions aligned with brand voice for each audience (B2C vs B2B)

Curate user-generated content, testimonials, and treatment results (following compliance guidelines)

Develop educational content explaining TrueTox membership benefits and aesthetic treatments

Create B2B content showcasing clinic partner success stories and partnership benefits

Repurpose high-performing paid creative for organic channels when appropriate

Community Management:

Monitor comments, mentions, and DMs across all platforms

Respond to audience engagement within 24 hours in appropriate brand voice

Flag customer service issues or partnership inquiries to Operations Manager

Track sentiment and common questions to inform content strategy

Performance Tracking:

Monitor organic reach, engagement rate, follower growth, and top-performing content

Report weekly on organic social metrics and content performance

Identify trending formats, sounds, and content opportunities on TikTok and Instagram

Provide insights on audience preferences and content opportunities



Collaboration & Reporting (Ongoing)

Daily sync with Meta Ads Manager on creative performance and testing priorities

Weekly creative review with Operations Manager to align on strategy and KPIs

Proactive communication about workload, creative concepts, and performance trends

Rapid iteration cycles based on real-time performance data and feedback

Ad-hoc design requests for
 marketing, landing pages, or sales materials as needed



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience & Track Record

Minimum 2-3 years creating performance-driven creative for Meta Ads 
, Instagram)

Proven portfolio demonstrating Meta ad creative with measurable performance results (CTR, CPA, ROAS)

Experience managing high-velocity creative testing (10+ variations per week)

Track record of improving ad performance through creative iteration and optimization

Experience with organic social media management across Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn

Background in beauty, wellness, healthcare, DTC, or e-commerce industries strongly preferred

Familiarity with direct-response marketing and conversion-focused creative

Performance Creative Expertise

Deep understanding of Meta ad creative best practices: hooks, formats, messaging, CTAs

Proven ability to design scroll-stopping creative that performs in competitive auctions

Experience with creative testing frameworks and data-driven iteration

Knowledge of what creative elements drive performance (urgency, social proof, value prop clarity)

Understanding of ad fatigue cycles and creative refresh strategies

Ability to balance brand guidelines with performance optimization

Familiarity with UGC-style content, testimonial-driven creative, and lifestyle imagery

Design & Technical Proficiency

Expert-level proficiency in Canva (primary design tool) — required

Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) — required

Video editing skills (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar) — required

Basic motion graphics and animation skills for video ads

Understanding of design principles: composition, typography, color theory, visual hierarchy

Knowledge of platform-specific specs: Meta feed/story/reels, TikTok, LinkedIn

Ability to work efficiently within brand guidelines while optimizing for performance

Experience with stock photo/video libraries (Unsplash, Pexels, Storyblocks)

Social Media & Scheduling Tools

Proficiency with Buffer (required for content scheduling)

Experience managing multi-brand social calendars with distinct audience targeting

Understanding of Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn algorithms and best practices

Copywriting skills for social captions, ad copy, and headlines

Awareness of trending formats, sounds, and viral content strategies

Experience with Meta Business Suite for organic performance tracking

Communication & Language

CEFR C1 English proficiency or equivalent required (near-native fluency)

Excellent writing skills for ad copy, social captions, and creative briefs

Strong visual storytelling ability

Ability to receive and implement performance feedback constructively

Clear communication about creative strategy, testing hypotheses, and results

Technical Requirements

Reliable high-speed internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps)

Quiet, professional home office environment

Computer capable of running design and video editing software smoothly

Webcam for video check-ins

Personal Attributes

Performance-obsessed — you measure success by conversion metrics, not just aesthetics

Rapid executor — you produce high-quality work at velocity without sacrificing craft

Data-driven — you let performance data guide creative decisions and iteration

Test-and-learn mindset — you embrace failure as learning and iterate relentlessly

Trend-aware — you stay current on social media, ad creative, and aesthetic trends

Self-directed — you manage workload, meet deadlines, and proactively communicate

Comfortable with ambiguity — you thrive in fast-moving environments with shifting priorities

Detail-oriented — you catch errors before publishing and maintain brand consistency



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience in medical aesthetics, MedSpa, beauty, or wellness marketing

Background creating UGC-style or testimonial-driven ad creative

Motion graphics or animation skills for dynamic video ads

Photography or photo retouching/manipulation skills

Experience with Figma or other design collaboration tools

Understanding of Meta Pixel tracking and conversion optimization

Familiarity with TikTok Ads or other paid social platforms



PERFORMANCE METRICS (KPIs)

You will be evaluated on the following outcomes:

Performance Creative (60%)

Creative Output: 15-25 Meta ad variations produced weekly

Testing Velocity: 3-5 new creative concepts tested weekly

Creative Performance: Contribute to CTR benchmarks of 2%+ on paid creative

Ad Longevity: Design creative that maintains performance for 2-3 weeks before fatigue

CPA Improvement: Support month-over-month CPA reduction through creative iteration

Quality Standards: 95%+ of creative approved on first or second revision

Organic Social Media (30%)

Posting Consistency: Maintain 5-7 posts per week per brand (TrueTox + True Aesthetics)

Engagement Rate: Track and improve organic engagement over baseline

Follower Growth: Contribute to steady follower growth across platforms

Community Management: Respond to comments/DMs within 24 hours

Content Calendar Adherence: 100% on-time content scheduling via Buffer

Collaboration & Process (10%)

Communication: Participate in all scheduled check-ins and provide timely updates

Turnaround Time: Meet deadlines and communicate proactively about capacity

Brand Adherence: 100% compliance with TrueTox and True Aesthetics brand guidelines

Asset Organization: Maintain organized, clearly labeled file structure



CREATIVE DELIVERABLES (WEEKLY EXAMPLES)

Paid Creative (70% of time):

15-25 Meta ad variations: feed images, carousels, story ads, reels/video ads

3-5 new creative concepts for A/B testing

Creative performance reports and iteration recommendations

Organic Social (30% of time):

10-14 scheduled posts across all platforms (TrueTox + True Aesthetics)

Instagram: 3-4 feed posts, 5-7 stories


: 2-3 posts

TikTok: 1-2 videos

LinkedIn: 1-2 posts (True Aesthetics B2B focus)

Caption writing for all organic posts

Community engagement and response management

Ad-hoc:


 marketing graphics

Landing page elements

Presentation slides or sales materials as needed



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Hourly Rate: $7/hour USD

Monthly Hours: 80 hours (4 hours/day, 5 days/week)

Monthly Compensation: $560 USD

Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly via international transfer or PayPal

Performance Bonuses: Potential bonus structure tied to ad creative performance metrics (CTR, CPA improvement, ROAS contribution)

Growth Opportunity: High performers may expand to full-time hours, take on larger campaigns, advance to Senior Performance Creative or Creative Lead roles



WORK SCHEDULE

Shift: 4 hours/day, 5 days per week (Monday-Friday)

Preferred Hours: Flexible, with some overlap with US Central Time for collaboration with Meta Ads Manager and Operations Manager

Start Date: Immediate (within 2 weeks of offer acceptance)



TOOLS & PLATFORMS YOU'LL USE

Design & Video:

Canva (primary design tool)

Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere)

CapCut or similar video editing tools

Stock libraries: Unsplash, Pexels, Storyblocks

Social Media Management:

Buffer (content scheduling — required)

Meta Business Suite (organic performance tracking)

Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn (native apps)

Project Management & Communication:

Roam (team communication)

Asana, Monday, or Trello (project tracking)

Google Drive or Dropbox (file sharing)

Loom (video updates and creative walkthroughs)

Analytics & Performance:

Meta Ads Manager (creative performance data)

Platform-native analytics (Instagram Insights,
 Analytics, etc.)



CREATIVE PHILOSOPHY & BRAND DIRECTION

Performance Creative Principles:

Hook within 3 seconds — capture attention immediately or lose the scroll

Clear value proposition — communicate TrueTox benefits instantly

Strong call-to-action — drive specific conversion behavior

Mobile-first design — optimize for vertical, small-screen viewing

Test relentlessly — assume nothing, validate everything with data

Authentic over polished — UGC-style often outperforms overly produced content

Scroll-stopping first, beautiful second — performance trumps perfection

Brand Aesthetic:

Modern, approachable luxury — premium but not pretentious

Empowering and authentic — real people, real results, real confidence

Bold and contemporary — cutting-edge design that stands out in aesthetics space

Trustworthy and expert — medical credibility without being clinical or cold

Audience-Specific Considerations:

TrueTox (B2C): Women 30-55, interested in injectables, value-conscious, seeking transparency and trust

True Aesthetics (B2B): Clinic owners, practice managers, aesthetic providers seeking partnership and growth

Creative should balance aspiration with relatability, science with beauty, and performance with brand storytelling.



APPLICATION PROCESS

To apply, please submit:

1. Resume/CV

Highlighting relevant performance creative and social media experience with measurable results (CTR, CPA, ROAS, engagement rates).

2. Portfolio (REQUIRED)

Showcasing:

Meta ad creative with performance metrics (include CTR, CPA, or ROAS if available)

Examples of creative testing iterations (before/after, A/B variants)

UGC-style or testimonial-driven ad creative

Video ads or motion graphics work

Organic social content (feed posts, stories, reels, TikToks)

Brand work demonstrating visual consistency across campaigns

Portfolio must demonstrate performance-driven creative, not just aesthetic design.

3. Cover Letter (max 300 words)

Address the following:

Your approach to performance creative vs. brand creative

An example of an ad campaign where you improved performance through creative iteration (include metrics)

Why you're interested in the medical aesthetics industry

Your experience with Buffer or other social scheduling tools

4. Performance Creative Test Assignment

Scenario:

 Create a high-performing Meta ad campaign for TrueTox membership targeting women 30-50 interested in Botox.

Key Message: "$189/month tox membership — no surprise costs, no per-unit pricing."

Deliverables:

3 creative concepts (different hooks/angles)

2 formats per concept (feed image 1080x1080 + story ad 1080x1920)

1 carousel ad (3 cards, 1080x1080 each)

1 video ad (15-30 seconds, vertical format)

Brief explanation (1-2 paragraphs) of your creative strategy and testing hypothesis

Requirements:

Use royalty-free stock photos/videos (Unsplash, Pexels, Canva library)

Submit as PDF or shared Canva link

Include ad copy/headlines for each variant

5. References

One professional reference who can speak to your performance creative work and ability to meet deadlines.



INTERVIEW PROCESS

Qualified candidates will go through:

Portfolio Review (30 min) — Review creative work and discuss performance results

Creative Strategy Interview (45 min) — Discuss testing frameworks, performance optimization, and creative philosophy

Live Design Challenge (30 min) — Timed exercise creating Meta ad variation based on brief

Paid 2-Week Trial — Create real Meta ad creative and organic social content for True Aesthetics campaigns with compensation



EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER

True Aesthetics is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic.

To Apply: Send application materials to 
 with subject line: "Performance Content Creator - [Your Name]"

Application Deadline: Rolling basis until position is filled



True Aesthetics reserves the right to modify this job description as business needs evolve.

title: Ecommerce Catalog and Channel Performance Manager (SHOPIFY & WALMART)
description:
The Ecommerce Catalog & Channel Performance Manager will own catalog health, channel performance, and profitability oversight across Shopify and Walmart Seller Central. This is a strategic oversight role — you will guide listings, advertising, inventory, and financial performance while coordinating closely with internal teams and external agencies. This is not an execution-only role; you will ensure that strategy is followed, metrics are met, and partners are held accountable.

Responsibilities





Catalog Management

Oversee product listings on Shopify and Walmart Seller Central.

Ensure titles, attributes, images, variations, and compliance requirements are accurate and optimized.

Audit listing quality, suppression issues, and content gaps.

Coordinate with internal staff and external agencies on updates, launches, and optimizations.



Channel Expertise

Monitor ranking, conversion, pricing, fulfillment models, and fee structures across both platforms.

Track Buy Box, content score, listing quality, and policy compliance on Walmart.

Manage collections, navigation, bundles, and merchandising on Shopify.



Performance & Metrics Monitoring

Track traffic, conversion rate, AOV, ROAS, TACOS, margin, and contribution profit.

Build dashboards pulling data from Shopify, Walmart, advertising platforms, and internal reports.

Identify trends and recommend corrective actions.

Hold agencies accountable for performance against KPIs.



Inventory & Forecasting

Monitor inventory levels, sell-through, and aging stock.

Coordinate replenishment planning to prevent stockouts and overstock.

Forecast demand based on seasonality, promotions, and historical data.



Profitability Oversight

Analyze landed cost, platform fees, ad spend, discounts, and chargebacks.

Monitor SKU-level contribution margin and flag margin erosion.

Recommend pricing or promotional adjustments as needed.





Competencies and Qualifications

Must-Have





3–5 years experience managing Shopify and/or Walmart Seller Central.

Strong Shopify catalog management expertise.

Deep familiarity with Walmart Seller Central operations and Buy Box dynamics.

Experience tracking performance metrics and ecommerce KPIs.

Ability to build dashboards and analyze large datasets.

Strong understanding of ecommerce unit economics.

Experience working with and managing external agencies or vendors.

Proven ability to drive accountability and performance outcomes.



Nice-to-Have





Experience with Shopify merchandising, bundles, and site navigation optimization.

Contribution margin and SKU-level profitability analysis experience.

Inventory planning and demand forecasting experience.

Familiarity with BI or reporting tools.

Degree in Business, Marketing, Analytics, or related field.

Strong understanding of US consumer behavior and market dynamics.



Key Qualities





Data-driven and detail-oriented.

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

Strategic thinker with ability to translate insights into action.

Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

Comfortable challenging partners when performance does not meet expectations.





What We Offer



100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines.

Growth & Learning – Be part of a fast-paced, data-informed e-commerce team.

Creative Impact – Your designs directly influence customer engagement and sales performance.

title: Senior Accountant
description:
Moe’s Group is HIRING a Senior Accountant



We’re looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Senior Accountant to manage core accounting operations and ensure accurate financial records across the organization. The ideal candidate has strong experience with QuickBooks, understands financial reporting processes, and can support month-end and year-end closing activities while maintaining compliance and financial accuracy. 



?? DO NOT APPLY if you do not have experience working with US GAAP.



About Us:



Moe’s Group is a global leader in skincare manufacturing, trusted by over 100 international brands. We combine innovation, quality, and a personalized approach to help businesses scale and succeed in competitive markets. From manufacturing to brand strategy, our end-to-end services are designed to exceed expectations, backed by a team committed to customer satisfaction and long-term success. At Moe’s Group, we don’t just support brands—we empower them to lead.



What you’ll do:



-Manage day-to-day accounting operations using QuickBooks

-Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

-Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and documentation

-Assist with month-end and year-end closing processes

-Prepare and manage 1099 filings and maintain vendor records

-Ensure compliance with financial documentation and reporting requirements

-Support internal financial tracking and financial reporting processes

-Collaborate with internal teams to ensure accurate financial data and processes



What we’re looking for:



-5 years of accounting experience

-Strong experience using QuickBooks is required

-Experience in manufacturing or inventory-based businesses is preferred

-Highly organized with strong attention to detail

-Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

-Ability to manage multiple accounting tasks and meet deadlines

-Hands-on experience with US GAAP is required

-CPA highly required



Why join us?



-100% remote work opportunity

-Long-term stable job with significant room for professional growth

-Fixed weekends off

-All necessary tools, courses, and subscriptions provided



Learn more about our company by visiting our website:





For the latest updates and opportunities, follow us on LinkedIn:

www.
/company/moesgroup

title: Part-Time Discord Community Manager — Phone Repair Industry
description:
We're building 
 for independent repair shops, techs, and parts vendors. Our 
 community is growing and we need someone who can keep it alive and useful.

— Show up in the 
 daily. Welcome new members, start conversations, answer basic questions.

title: Appointment Setter (Outbound Calls) for Fitness and Coaching Business - Day Shift
description:
We are Stronglife Health & Performance, an Australian fitness and nutrition coaching company helping men transform their health. We are expanding our remote team in the Philippines and looking for a high-performing Appointment Setters who can confidently make outbound calls to warm leads and book them for consultations.



About the role:

1. Call leads using our dialer (warm inquiries, follow-ups, and re-engagement)

2. Qualify leads and book them into scheduled appointments

3. Call booked appointments to confirm attendance when needed

4. Call leads who missed their appointments and rebook them

5. Update CRM notes accurately and in real time

6. Follow structured call frameworks (not robotic word-for-word scripts)

7. Join daily huddles and weekly coaching sessions

8. Consistently hit weekly KPIs (dials, bookings, show-up rate)

9. Coordinate closely with the General Manager and the sales team to ensure smooth handovers

10. Send daily reporting on KPI status for the day.



Before you apply, make sure you hit the following requirements:

1.  Minimum 4 years experience in outbound calling, appointment setting, telemarketing, or BPO sales (if you do not meet this requirement, we will not proceed with your application)

2. Strong spoken English (clear, confident, natural)

3. Stable internet (25 Mbps or higher)

4. Laptop/PC (i5 and above, 8GB RAM minimum)

5. Noise-free work environment

6. Comfortable working with KPIs and dashboards

7. Can work AU shifts





Compensation:

First month

$8 AUD per hour (logged through hubstaff)

Incentive: Same outbound commission structure in outbound comms (contract value of sold x 3%)



Second month onwards (if met KPIs)

$10 AUD per hour

Incentive: Same outbound commission structure in outbound comms (contract value of sold x 3%)



HOW TO APPLY:

We will not entertain applications here. Please send your entries using the google form below



Please fill out this google form:





This application only contains 4 questions and a short voice recording requirement.

Please answer all items accurately and honestly.

title: Social Media Manager & Content Creator
description:
Social Media Manager & Content Creator



Full-Time | Long-Term | Remote



Hi! We’re looking for a high-performing Social Media Manager & Content Creator to join our Australian marketing team.



This role is ideal for someone who understands content creation, social media management, and short-form video editing, and who can confidently help execute content plans across multiple platforms.



We’re looking for someone who is both creative and organised, with a strong eye for visual content and a solid understanding of how social media works.



If you have experience working with brands in the medical, aesthetic, beauty, cosmetic, or wellness industry, this role will be a great fit.



Role Overview



You will be responsible for managing day-to-day social media execution, content creation, and publishing across our main platforms including Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube.



You will work closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and Australian marketing team to implement the content strategy and ensure that all posts maintain a consistent, premium brand identity while supporting overall growth and engagement goals.



Your role will focus on executing content plans, creating engaging visuals and videos, and maintaining an organised publishing workflow.



This is a full-time (40 hours per week), long-term opportunity for someone looking to grow with a structured and professional marketing team.



Key Responsibilities

1. Social Media Management & Execution



Manage the day-to-day posting and publishing of content across Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube.



Execute the monthly content calendar developed by the marketing team.



Write engaging captions with strong hooks, clear calls-to-action, and platform-appropriate tone.



Ensure that all content follows the brand guidelines and maintains a consistent voice and visual identity.



Stay updated with current social media trends, algorithm changes, and content formats, and apply relevant ideas to content production.



Assist in maintaining organised workflows for scheduled posts and content preparation.



2. Content Creation & Video Editing



Create high-quality short-form video content for platforms such as Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



Edit videos using tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing software.



Edit long-form content including podcasts, consultations, interviews, and educational content.



Repurpose long-form videos into multiple short-form clips optimized for social media engagement.



Design engaging carousel posts, story graphics, and branded visual assets using Canva or similar design tools.



Create YouTube thumbnails and supporting visual assets when required.



Ensure that all creative output aligns with the brand’s premiu
dical aesthetic and visual standards.



Maintain a clean, professional editing style suitable for healthcare and medical-related content.



3. Publishing, Scheduling & Optimization



Upload and schedule content across all social platforms in accordance with the content calendar.



Format posts correctly including captions, hashtags, metadata, and platform-specific settings.



Ensure that content is optimized for discoverability, engagement, and strong visual presentation.



Maintain organised posting schedules and structured content workflows.



Ensure that content is delivered and published on time according to campaign schedules.



4. Collaboration & Communication



Work closely with the Senior Social Media Manager and the Australian marketing team to execute content plans effectively.



Coordinate with the VA team to ensure smooth workflow and scheduling.



(Note: The VA team manages DMs and comments, so you will not be responsible for replying to messages.)



Provide clear updates and communicate professionally with tea
mbers.



Must be able to communicate clearly and confidently in English.



Compensation & Work Schedule



Full-Time Position



?1,500 per day (starting rate)

Up to ?1,900 per day (performance-based progression)



Performance bonuses available



40 hours per week

(Monday–Friday)



Stable long-term contract opportunity



Opportunity to work with an established Australian medical brand



Opportunity to grow within the marketing team



Required Qualifications



Proven experience managing social media accounts for brands or businesses.



Strong experience in short-form video editing for platforms such as Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



Experience creating social media graphics and visual content using Canva or similar tools.



Experience executing monthly content calendars and structured posting schedules.



Strong caption writing skills including hooks, storytelling, and calls-to-action.



Understanding of social media algorithms, engagement strategies, and platform best practices.



Video Editing Tools



Experience editing short-form videos using tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing software.



Highly organized, proactive, detail-oriented, and able to follow structured workflows and deadlines.



Ability to work independently in a remote team environment.



How to Apply



Please send the following to:







Subject line:

Application – Social Media Manager



Your
 must include:



* Your portfolio

* Your CV

* Examples of Reels or short-form videos you have edited



If you’re passionate about creating high-quality content, understand premium aesthetics, and enjoy working in a structured and professional team environment, we would love to hear from you.

title: Virtual Assistant With Growth Potential
description:
MASTERMIND PROGRAM ASSISTANT

Full-Time | Philippines | 600/month | Must work US Time Zone hours



We aren’t looking for a basic virtual assistant. We’re looking for a Client Accountability Operator who protects retention, enforces standards, and ensures no client slips through the cracks.



At Speak Your Way To Cash®, we’ve grown from zero to an Inc. 5000 company — and we’re just getting started. Our mission is to empower experts and entrepreneurs to turn their voices into revenue.



This role is not about “helping.”

It is about protecting revenue, enforcing follow-through, and keeping our 400+ clients moving.



You will be the operational heartbeat behind our Mastermind and Academy programs. If someone misses a payment, you call. If someone misses a call, you follow up. If engagement drops, you flag it. If a client wins, you capture it.



This is a performance role. Not a passive one.





WHAT YOU’LL DO



You will support the Director of Client Success, Mastermind Coach, and Academy Coach.



Daily Responsibilities

• Monitor missed payments and immediately call clients who fall behind.

• Send payment follow-up
s and document all communication in CRM.

• Track revenue submission forms and flag missing reports.

• Monitor engagement dashboards (Green/Yellow/Red).

• Flag 30+ day inactivity.

• Follow clients on social media and track major life or business updates.

• Alert leadership to major milestones, crises, or contract wins.

• Track missed Q&A or hot seat calls and reach out when clients miss both.

• Update CRM notes and automations.

• Track birthdays and personal milestones.



Weekly Responsibilities

• Update retention dashboards.

• Prepare Red/Yellow/Green client reports for Director review.

• Monitor WhatsApp inactivity and missed submissions.

• Follow up on testimonial opportunities (3–5 month mark).

• Support testimonial collection and coordination.

• Audit onboarding completion (forms, activation milestones).

• Track challenge participation and engagement levels.



Monthly Responsibilities

• Assist in renewal pipeline tracking.

• Compile client wins for internal Wins Report.

• Monitor onboarding completion rates.

• Prepare milestone tracking summaries.

• Support white-glove gift coordination (birthdays, bereavement, celebrations).





CRITICAL FUNCTION: PAYMENT & ACCOUNTABILITY CALLS



If a client misses payment:

• You call within 24 hours.

• You speak clearly, confidently, and professionally.

• You follow a structured script while remaining human.

• You document the outcome immediately.



You must have a strong, confident, polished phone voice. This is mandatory.





WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



? You are confident on the phone and not afraid of difficult conversations.

? You speak clear, professional English with strong verbal communication skills.

? You have experience in client success, collections, or account management.

? You are organized and love dashboards, trackers, and systems.

? You follow up until something is resolved.

? You understand urgency and move fast.

? You are comfortable enforcing standards politely but firmly.

? You can work US time zone hours consistently.





WHO THIS ROLE ISN’T FOR



? You avoid confrontation.

? You dislike making phone calls.

? You need constant supervision.

? You struggle with follow-through.

? You get uncomfortable asking clients about payments.

? You are looking for a low-pressure job.



This role protects revenue. It requires backbone.





WHAT YOU BRING



• Proven experience in virtual assistance, client support, collections, or CRM management.

• Demonstrated track record of managing multiple clients or accounts simultaneously.

• Experience using CRMs and tracking systems.

• Strong written and spoken English.

• Bachelor’s degree preferred.

• Strategic + tactical thinking with clean execution.

• Strong phone presence with professional tone and confidence.





COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



• $800/month (Full-time).

• Performance-based bonuses possible based on retention and payment recovery.

• Direct impact at a high-growth Inc. 5000 company.

• Visibility, ownership, and growth opportunities into higher client success roles.





HOW TO APPLY



: 

Subject line: Program Assistant – Your Name



Include the following:

1. A written sample
 to a client who is 14 days behind on payment.

2. A Loom video (3–5 minutes) explaining:

• Why you want this role

• Why you are confident making payment collection calls

• Why you are a strong fit for a high-performance environment



Applications without both requirements will not be reviewed.





This is not a content company.

This is a results company.



We show up on our clients’ worst day and their biggest contract day.



Apply now. Show us how you’ve done this before, what you’ve built, and how you’ll take this role to the next level.

title: Quality Surveyor / Estimator
description:
Residential Construction Estimator / Quantity Surveyor

(Remote – Australian Residential Projects)



EDM Building is a residential construction company specialising in new homes and renovations in the Kiama region of NSW, Australia.

We are looking for a highly organised and detail-oriented Estimator / Quantity Surveyor to support our pre-construction and cost planning workflows.

This role requires someone who can work independently, take ownership of estimating tasks, and deliver accurate outputs with minimal or no supervision. You must be proactive in identifying scope issues, clarifying uncertainties, and maintaining estimating systems.

You will work closely with Eli (Director) and the project management team to analyse project scopes, perform quantity takeoffs, prepare estimates, and continuously improve EDM’s estimating systems.

This is a long-term remote role suited for someone who is analytical, proactive, and capable of managing estimating responsibilities independently.



Primary Goal

Deliver accurate, timely, and profitable estimates that convert into buildable projects while supporting EDM Building’s cost planning systems and pre-construction workflows.



Key Responsibilities

Scope Analysis

Review site visit videos, photos, and notes from Eli.

Analyse architectural drawings, specifications, and project information.

Identify inclusions, exclusions, and grey areas in scope.

Draft simple plans or clarifications using field notes when required.

Quantity Takeoffs & Estimating

Perform quantity takeoffs using Bluebeam from drawings.

Generate trade-specific quantities and cost breakdowns.

Apply accurate labour and material unit rates.

Ensure quantities align with construction methodology.

Cost Estimating & Quoting

Build and maintain cost templates in Wunderbuild.

Apply contingency, overheads, and profit margins.

Manage the full quote lifecycle from takeoff to submission.

Ensure estimates are clear, accurate, and buildable.

Estimating Systems Development

Develop assemblies and unit rate systems in Wunderbuild.

Transfer and validate data from Cordell construction cost databases.

Maintain EDM’s historical cost libraries.

Continuously improve estimating accuracy and pricing logic.

Subcontractor & Supplier Coordination

Send RFQs (Requests for Quotes) to subcontractors and suppliers.

Analyse and compare trade pricing.

Identify scope gaps, exclusions, or inconsistencies.

Recommend preferred subcontractors based on pricing and scope alignment.

Back-Costing & Cost Refinement

Review actual project costs vs estimates after project completion.

Analyse cost variances and identify improvements.

Update estimating libraries and pricing systems accordingly.

Procurement & Pre-Construction Support

Provide accurate quantities and pricing data for procurement decisions.

Assist with long-lead materials and high-value items.

Support the Construction Manager and Director during pre-construction planning.



Work Style Requirements

This role requires a professional who can:

Work independently with minimal or no supervision

Take full ownership of estimating tasks from start to finish

Be proactive in identifying missing scope or project risks

Manage multiple estimates while maintaining accuracy and deadlines

Communicate clearly when clarification is required

To ensure reliability and availability, the estimator must not work for other employers or clients during EDM’s agreed working hours.



Requirements

Degree in Quantity Surveying, Construction Management, Engineering, or related field

Experience with construction estimating or quantity takeoffs

Ability to read and interpret architectural and construction drawings

Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail

Excellent written communication skills

Ability to manage tasks and deliver outputs independently



Preferred Skills

Experience using Bluebeam, Wunderbuild, or Buildxact

Experience in residential construction estimating

Familiarity with construction cost libraries and unit rates

Exposure to Australian construction standards (not mandatory)

Training will be provided to help you understand Australian residential construction systems and EDM’s internal processes.



What We Offer

Long-term remote role with an Australian construction company

Flexible work hours with partial overlap with Australian working hours

Paid Australian public holidays

Paid birthday leave

Training and support for professional growth

Health and wellness allowance after completing the trial period and meeting KPAs

Opportunity to help build and improve EDM’s estimating systems



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your CV / Resume

A brief introduction outlining your estimating experience

Your current salary or hourly rate



Your expected/asking salary or hourly rate

Please include the phrase:

“Residential Construction OZ Rockstar”

at the top of your application message to confirm you have read the full job post.



Application Questions

Please answer the following in your application:

1. Attention to Detail

What do you believe is the most important quality of a good construction estimator, and why?

2. Software Experience

List any estimating or construction software you have used (for example: Bluebeam, Buildxact, Planswift, CostX, Excel estimating templates, etc.).

3. Availability Confirmation

Please confirm that you will be fully available during EDM’s agreed working hours and will not work for other employers or clients during those hours.

title: Sales Development Specialist (GoHighLevel)
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Sales Development Specialist (SDR)

Location: Remote (Chicago Time Zone preferred)

Hours: Part-Time (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CT) with potential to grow into Full-Time

Compensation: Base + Commission (performance-based incentives)



About the Role

This is not a general admin role. We are looking for a sales-focused, proactive virtual assistant who can:

- Generate leads and fill the sales pipeline

- Cold call and connect with potential clients (especially small law firms)

- Manage communication and onboarding of new clients

- Take ownership of results with minimal supervision

- You will play a critical role in helping the business grow by reaching more potential clients and increasing revenue.



Key Responsibilities

- Conduct outbound calls to potential clients to introduce services

- Generate qualified leads and maintain the sales pipeline in HighLevel CRM

- Assist with client onboarding (Zoom calls, account setup, and workflow guidance) as needed

- Create or adapt outreach scripts and messaging for cold calls and
 campaigns

- Track and report performance metrics: number of calls, qualified leads, and closed clients

- Work independently, creatively, and proactively to solve problems and generate results



Required Skills & Qualifications

- Strong verbal communication skills and confidence on the phone

- Sales-driven mindset with a focus on generating results

- Self-starter: able to work independently without micromanagement

- Creative thinking: able to craft outreach strategies and adapt messaging

- Comfortable with tools like HighLevel CRM and Zoom (experience is a plus)

- Organized and reliable with strong time-management skills

- Motivated by performance and commission-based incentives



Preferred Traits

- Previous experience in sales or business development

- Familiarity with small law firms or professional service industries

- Comfortable working part-time initially, with growth into full-time possible

- Goal-oriented: able to track KPIs and contribute to pipeline growth



Performance Expectations

- Generate at least 2 new clients in the first month (stretch goal: 5)

- Build a growing pipeline of qualified leads

- Take initiative and continuously improve outreach strategies



Why Join the Team?

- Work directly with a business owner in a growth-focused, flexible environment

- Opportunity to take ownership and shape your role

- Earn commission based on performance

How to Apply
